name: Senate Conservatives
subject: THIS race sets the tone on Election night.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter, this state will be one of the first to report a winner, and it’s critical Republicans win.

If President Trump and Rick Scott lose in Florida, we are in for a long and scary night.

The Democrats are pouring millions into Florida because they know it’s the key to stopping President Trump and keeping Chuck Schumer in charge of the Senate.

We must prepare a war chest big enough to ensure a victory in Florida. [**Can you help us reach our ambitious goal of $500,000 by chipping in $10, $20, or $30 right now?**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=693cb0b602124c55971a59794c8c5761&_e=0MwBVszf_nDOK4xzn8ocMPVHAFO-udEtJA-vLykYKBbeWI7iztaXPsj7S-fDItqqbudcKOffNzm0Q1YqizW3XWlckvXPbG2HyLD-ADemJhVEcXETALFTxNxI91K2J-1JgOS00VtCkmfhx7fHblyTXhJqAGjQDAeQMIe8O5DnEnHKHai79wNmKGtHJWwFK4nP4YB5N08IR94M9qOcHHEZw0his9AARO8yneZN8QMrDjThSaKnXGMCBzC5BpG6MIv2X-cMnsxCDkvPDu6APMJBt53sMO2JC5WTW4RAnHIrPEkGdrnDnnpaNHUtCTl5HOo4rCBH_pni1sY5or99mNqLNbH8DXb90EH_m6kjyDZtW6MFqXeI9p7bLEf9084DJrTX)

subject: I need you to throw your full support behind Jacky right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
**I NEED you to read this, friend!**

Jacky Rosen’s Senate race in Nevada could determine whether the GOP wins back Senate control – and polling has shown her locked in a _statistical tie_ with her Trump-endorsed GOP opponent for months.
I’m going to give it to you straight: Keeping Nevada and the Senate blue isn’t going to be easy. Jacky's extreme GOP opponent is already breaking fundraising records, and dark money groups like the Koch network are pouring millions into Nevada to flip it red.

**That’s why I’m calling on every single Democrat to throw their full support behind Jacky right now. That includes YOU, friend!**
After 50 years of working in politics, I can tell you that Jacky has what it takes to win. But to do that, she desperately needs the same kind of massive grassroots support that helped Democrats eke out a victory in Nevada and defend the Senate in the last election – a real nail-biter that came down to just 7,928 votes.

I’m going to give it to you straight: Keeping Nevada and the Senate blue isn’t going to be easy. Jacky's extreme GOP opponent is already breaking fundraising records, and dark money groups like the Koch network are pouring millions into Nevada to flip it red. That’s why I’m calling on every single Democrat to throw their full support behind Jacky right now. That includes YOU, friend! After 50 years of working in politics, I can tell you that Jacky has what it takes to win. But to do that, she desperately needs the same kind of massive grassroots support that helped Democrats eke out a victory in Nevada and defend the Senate in the last election – a real nail-biter that came down to just 7,928 votes. clean_body: I am now officially the Democratic nominee against Lauren Boebert, and a brand-new poll shows Boebert is still incredibly vulnerable! = Hello, I am emailing to ask you to give $5 to my campaign against Lauren Boebert. Here’s why: I am officially the Democratic nominee against Lauren Boebert, and a brand-new poll shows Boebert is still incredibly vulnerable! In 2022, Adam Frisch nearly defeated Lauren Boebert. He lost by just 546 votes. That scared Lauren Boebert so much that she came running to my district. But the voters of eastern Colorado don’t want a carpetbagging extremist more concerned with getting on Fox News than the needs of her constituents. Even Republicans are done with Boebert: 57% voted for someone else in the primary! We can finally kick Lauren Boebert out of Congress in November, but the only way I’ll be able to win is if we hit every fundraising goal and have the resources to fully fund my campaign. We’ve set a goal of raising another $75,000 before our next fundraising deadline, but right now, we’re still incredibly short. So I have to ask: = Please use the links in this email to start a weekly donation through ActBlue: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Every dollar you give today will bring us one step closer to finally sending Lauren Boebert packing, and truly no amount you can afford is too small. I will never be able to fully express how thankful I am to have your support. Thank you, Trisha ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. I'm sure you get a lot of these requests, but this is very real and very urgent: Is there anything I can say to convince you to **[chip in $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91464301/493964638/-1893289703?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=5&refcode=jtk2604-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWIxNjUwOC03ZTYyLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pmJL-4L4PI9MwV_ppTG7UvBUdChqVm3ztxuSLxtcXOU=)** before my midnight deadline?
**What if I told you the polls show we're statistically tied** with our Trump-backed opponent and early voting is just around the corner?

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: My decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
_*Sent in support of Elissa Slotkin for Michigan and Lucas Kunce for U.S. Senate*_
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/68829?refcode=em20240824-7439&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=7439%2E614464%2EXpmQuA)
Peter -
It’s official: I am the Democratic Nominee for U.S. Senate in Michigan. I know our campaign has sent a lot of emails your way, so I want to take a few minutes to tell you about my decision to run for Senate in the first place, and why your support is so important in our success.
But if you’re ready to become a donor to our campaign right away you can use this link:
**[SPLIT A DONATION →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/68829?refcode=em20240824-7439&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=7439%2E614464%2EXpmQuA)**
The truth is, we all know America is going through something right now. We seem to be living from crisis to crisis. But there are certain things that should be really simple:
Like living a middle-class life in the state that invented the middle class.
Like making things in America so that we’re in control of our own economic security.
Like protecting our children from the things that are truly harming them.
And preserving our rights and our democracy so that our kids can live their version of the American dream.
I’m running for Senate because I believe that we need a new generation of leaders that thinks differently, works harder, and never forgets that we are public servants.
But my decision to run for Senate is also deeply personal to me, and it's related to what motivated me to first run for the House in 2018.
It's about my mom. She was diagnosed with stage IV ovarian cancer in 2009 — and didn't have health insurance at the time. She had let it lapse after the insurance companies had gouged her for years because she happened to have a pre-existing condition. She passed away in 2011, but that experience — of desperately trying to get her care at the same moment we were filling out bankruptcy paperwork — motivated me to run then, and keeps me motivated to fight now. I remember the exact moment that I decided to enter public office: when the then-GOP controlled House of Representatives, the body I now serve in, voted to repeal those protections for people with pre-existing conditions.
Six years later, the Republican leaders, fueled by the extreme wing of the party, are continuing the march to repeal things that the average Americans want. They want to privatize Social Security and Medicare, repeal drug price protections like allowing Medicare to negotiate, then there’s the rights they’re obsessed with repealing: a woman’s right to choose, voting rights, and any possible gun safety legislation.
By winning this Senate seat, we’ll help ensure that Democrats retain the (slight!) majority and can pass legislation that expands access to healthcare. Not the obsession with taking things away.
To be upfront: Winning this race is going to take a lot of resources. A crazy amount. And we have to do it without raising a single dollar from corporate PACs.
**[That is why I would love it if you would consider donating $10 or whatever you can to my campaign and Lucas Kunce today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/68829?refcode=em20240824-7439&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=7439%2E614464%2EXpmQuA)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/68830?refcode=em20240824-7439&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=7439%2E614464%2EXpmQuA) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/68830?refcode=em20240824-7439&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=7439%2E614464%2EXpmQuA) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/68830?refcode=em20240824-7439&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=7439%2E614464%2EXpmQuA) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/68830?refcode=em20240824-7439&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=7439%2E614464%2EXpmQuA) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/68830?refcode=em20240824-7439&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=7439%2E614464%2EXpmQuA) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/68830?refcode=em20240824-7439&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=7439%2E614464%2EXpmQuA) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/68829?refcode=em20240824-7439&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=7439%2E614464%2EXpmQuA)
---
Thank you,
Elissa

Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=7439%2E614464%2EXpmQuA). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Eugene Vindman
subject: The phone call that changed everything
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC
body:
Friend — Give me just a moment to tell you the story of a phone call that changed everything.
I’m Eugene Vindman. My brother Alex and I used to serve on the White House National Security Council. I was the senior ethics official on the Council.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/91464466/493969726/1320819669?amount=3&refcode=UTS_FR_90DO_240824_2_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNjM2EwZDY3LTgxNjItZWYxMS05OTFhLTYwNDViZGRiZmM0YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=p8XCvHapHUgpA0xaMFK_YyU5mMmzAO_qHbDw1U_oB2s=)
In 2019, Alex overheard a phone call in which President Trump attempted to extort our allies in Ukraine. Trump threatened to withhold military aid unless President Zelenskyy investigated his political rival.
After Alex reported the call to me, we both blew the whistle on Trump. We reported Trump’s corrupt phone call up the chain of command, and it led to his impeachment.
Even though the decision to blow the whistle on Donald Trump was the right thing to do, it cost my brother and me our military careers after the former-president retaliated against us. But I am not done serving.
**I’m running for Congress in Virginia to fight back against Trump and the far-right Republicans who enable his abuse of power and attacks on our Democracy.**
And more than that, I’m running to push our country forward across the board. To restore abortion rights everywhere, act on climate change, and lower costs for working families.
So here’s the deal. If we win Virginia’s 7th district, we win a highly competitive swing district and make it that much more likely that Democrats take back the House.
And if we take back the House, we can begin to make progress on those issues while safeguarding against any Republican attempts to roll back our rights.
So, with Virginia’s Primary Election Day just around the corner, please:
[_**Split a contribution between me and Upset the Setup to support my campaign for Congress. Help us build a real grassroots movement in defense of democracy.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/91464467/493969727/1320819669?amount=3&refcode=UTS_FR_90DO_240824_2_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNjM2EwZDY3LTgxNjItZWYxMS05OTFhLTYwNDViZGRiZmM0YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=p8XCvHapHUgpA0xaMFK_YyU5mMmzAO_qHbDw1U_oB2s=)

clean_body: Friend — Give me just a moment to tell you the story of a phone call that changed everything. I’m Eugene Vindman. My brother Alex and I used to serve on the White House National Security Council. I was the senior ethics official on the Council. = In 2019, Alex overheard a phone call in which President Trump attempted to extort our allies in Ukraine. Trump threatened to withhold military aid unless President Zelenskyy investigated his political rival. After Alex reported the call to me, we both blew the whistle on Trump. We reported Trump’s corrupt phone call up the chain of command, and it led to his impeachment. Even though the decision to blow the whistle on Donald Trump was the right thing to do, it cost my brother and me our military careers after the former-president retaliated against us. But I am not done serving. I’m running for Congress in Virginia to fight back against Trump and the far-right Republicans who enable his abuse of power and attacks on our Democracy. And more than that, I’m running to push our country forward across the board. To restore abortion rights everywhere, act on climate change, and lower costs for working families. So here’s the deal. If we win Virginia’s 7th district, we win a highly competitive swing district and make it that much more likely that Democrats take back the House. And if we take back the House, we can begin to make progress on those issues while safeguarding against any Republican attempts to roll back our rights. So, with Virginia’s Primary Election Day just around the corner, please: = If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: = = = = = = Thanks for hearing me out, friend. I hope I can count on your support. — Eugene Vindman Eugene Vindman served in the U.S. Army and the National Security Council. name: Bob Casey
subject: So much is at stake
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
What I said at the DNC:
| | |
---
Friend,

I spoke at the Democratic National Convention earlier this week to share the stakes of this election.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91464539/493970594/-1620693407?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1784-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTFlNDJlM2QtODI2Mi1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=OxonrCfjj7HSCUA5F7qIfJECs7mV3whF7PHiNMfsGvA=)
**Here’s the simple truth: Pennsylvania is the battleground that will decide this election** – and with the Democratic ticket official, it’s time to hit the ground running.
Our fundamental rights are on the ballot this November. If we want to protect our basic freedoms like women’s rights, workers’ rights, and voting rights, we must keep our Commonwealth blue.
My opponent is a Wall Street multi-millionaire who’s only out for his bottom line, even if it hurts working families, and he’s made it clear that he would be a “yes” vote for Donald Trump’s extreme agenda. He doesn’t understand what Pennsylvanians are going through or what they need.
I believe you need to know people to represent them. I was born and raised in Scranton, Pennsylvania. I raised my family there, and I still live there today.
Here in Pennsylvania, we strive to be a Commonwealth in life as well as in name. I know the challenges we face, fight for our values, and will always stand up for working people over big corporations and special interests.
We cannot keep our Senate majority or the White House without winning in Pennsylvania, which is why your support is so critical.
[**With so much at stake, please split a donation between Debbie Mucarsel-Powell and me today. Your support will make a real difference this November.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91464540/493970595/-1620693407?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1784-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTFlNDJlM2QtODI2Mi1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=OxonrCfjj7HSCUA5F7qIfJECs7mV3whF7PHiNMfsGvA=)

clean_body: | | | One of my favorite parts about being on the campaign trail is meeting supporters just like you, Peter. I truly mean that, and I know Tim feels the same way. That is why I wanted you to know about our Click with the Candidates. sweepstakes. You and a friend could meet me and Governor Walz at a special event ahead of Election Day! Our team will cover your hotel and airfare -- and we will even take a photo to capture the moment. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | The support this team has shown us since I announced Governor Tim Walz as my running mate has been incredible. We are feeling the energy at every stop in every state we visit, and I am looking forward to meeting the lucky winners. | | With only 72 days until Election Day, every dollar counts. Thank you for being on our team, and best of luck! Kamala Kamala Harris Vice President of the United States | | | ---|---|---

body:

**The GOP has spent decades building state power, gerrymandering districts, and propelling their anti-American agenda across the country. From gutting abortion access to infringing on LGBTQ+ rights, state Republicans have become a one-stop shop for advancing the far-right agenda.** But state Democrats are right on their heels. They’re doing everything in their power to ensure these extremist policies don’t come to fruition. clean_body: Michelle and Barack Obama know the critical importance of coming together to create change – now they’re calling on you. | | | | | ---|--- The GOP has spent decades building state power, gerrymandering districts, and propelling their anti-American agenda across the country. Even the Obamas have sounded the alarm: Former President Barack Obama and former First Lady Michelle Obama know just how critical coming together right now to rally behind Democrats is. body:
I want to hear from you >>
| Friend, I just finished up an ELECTRIFYING week in Chicago at the Democratic National Convention!

Kamala Harris, Tim Walz, President Biden, and so many INCREDIBLE Democrats reminded us why this fight is so important — _I’ve never been more fired up!_ **As one of our most loyal supporters, I want to know what YOU thought of the Democratic National Convention!** | ***VPP’s Official DNC Survey***

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=16357%2E878179%2EQwezlG). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=16357%2E878179%2EQwezlG).**

name: The Federalist Wire
subject: News outlet reveals Biden allies kept this one secret about the president from Americans
body:
DAILY NEWS | August 25, 2024

News outlet reveals
Biden allies kept this one secret about the president from
Americans
For years
Democrats have tried to protect Joe Biden. This has been the case
even when he's been involved in corrupt behavior.

And this news outlet has revealed
that Biden allies have kept this one secret about the president
from Americans.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

Trump's newly announced
plans as commander-in-chief spark fear in the eyes of the Left

Donald Trump knows
how to get under the skin of Democrats. It's by simply creating
policy proposals that are the antithesis of what they believe in.

➞ Continue Reading

Bill Clinton faces grim
reality after alarming DNC appearance

The former Democrat
president is stumping hard for the Harris campaign. But that may
be backfiring on him in a major way.
➞ Continue Reading

Biden-Harris admin makes
terrifying nuclear announcement you'll never believe

This country is not
ready for a war against her enemies. You can thank the current
White House for that.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

Your privacy is important to us.

comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

body:
let’s get the job done

Friend, this is Jim Banks, Navy Reserve officer, Afghanistan veteran, and Republican nominee for U.S. Senate in Indiana.
_**[Take it from me, the Senate needs more conservative veterans -- and we have a chance to get the job done in November.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ziusl7lfdhean0fm1a5bk2pln6ushun4hbj2h1mg_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1cljm1oj1c9h2bs)**_

**[Take a look at who Tim Sheehy, Sam Brown, Dave McCormick, and Mike Rogers are up against.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbnpbmkchf2gr1hia1ehpe974e4lqnilqdqc8kv8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1cljm1oj1c9h2bs) **

**[In Montana, Jon Tester](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zeqgbutkfvo2dh3ne931jgd2vsdsj0o4h44hk77g_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1cljm1oj1c9h2bs)** has fully supported the Biden-Harris war on American energy.

**[In Nevada, Jacky Rosen](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zudv93s47nnmofds51v5sl9tj65gl9e6iv63oqlo_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1cljm1oj1c9h2bs)** has done nothing about the invasion at our southern border.

**[In Pennsylvania, Bob Casey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zclq3sirbvhj024n5svc8v4rjd1qcm84l70e7sug_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1cljm1oj1c9h2bs)** has rubberstamped every single unhinged, far-left Democrat policy you can think of.

**[And in Michigan, Elissa Slotkin](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8m6tlbr2h1nmvricf0ub21ooq5gm94adj2ucie0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1cljm1oj1c9h2bs)** was hand-picked by Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and Chuck Schumer.

**[Tim, Sam, Dave, and Mike have proven themselves in service to our country.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvbhdncnma1d93tfntmfm0nqg0hh780cm3qiv250_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1cljm1oj1c9h2bs) **

_**[Their opponents have proven themselves in service to the woke mob. ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp4s2kocsc7u5bl5i1uj1aecd79r7vbcqkctcd08_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1cljm1oj1c9h2bs)**_

**[But there's no time to lose.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zherggi5nnsoin26qcgoeolcqc78vi52pff5tnfg_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1cljm1oj1c9h2bs) **Their opponents are raising and spending _**[MILLIONS](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb1p92pf64bc6f7j8hdd36jqmulbmhff0nkb7tbg_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1cljm1oj1c9h2bs)**_ from rich elites to keep those Senate seats blue.

**[I'm building a movement of small dollar donors to fight back, and I need YOU to stand with me.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze3lkklutja038t3v0jpjb3v53t8nbcp5rotc78o_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1cljm1oj1c9h2bs)**

name: Hillsdale College via GOP Presidential
subject: Unmasking the Far-Left Agenda
body:
We have never seen anything like what we are seeing today in America!

This sponsored message from GOP Presidential is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbvdffbkkt1t8bj3o6sb5ic94jn1rvs9a1i90cao_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1clge0o35c5h2bs)
---
| | Fellow American,

Over the last year, the agenda of the far Left, along with its media and Big Tech allies, has become all too clear.

Together, these forces want to **circumvent the First Amendment, suppress conservative speech and political activity** , and push their own **false** and **dishonest** narrative about American history and about what's happening today.

More and more, stories that question the far-Left's narrative are dubiously "fact-checked" or censored outright, while conservative opponents of the Left are "de-platformed."

**We have never seen anything like what we are seeing today in America!**

The roots of our current crisis can be traced to the late 1960s when radicals who scorned America and its way of life began taking over our colleges and universities.

It took them several decades to cement their dominance over American higher education, but we are seeing the fruits of their labors today: we see it in the media, and we see it in Silicon Valley.

We are also seeing it in professional sports, in corporate America--much of which is now capitulating to far-Left demands--and increasingly in K-12 education.

**Liberty in America is under serious threat. As I travel around the country, worried citizens ask me if there is a way to meet this crisis. I never hesitate to say there is, despite how uphill the fight may seem.**

A vital part of the fight--and one in which Hillsdale College is uniquely able to lead--is to reach and teach additional millions of citizens with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty.

**You are making that fight possible by supporting our educational outreach efforts, such as _Imprimis_ , America's leading digest of liberty.**

Hillsdale launched _Imprimis_ over 50 years ago to promote limited government, free enterprise, individual rights, personal responsibility, and a strong national defense. Each issue covers a timely political, economic, or cultural issue from a constitutional perspective.

Today, with the far Left's dramatic escalation of its assault on free speech and informed patriotism, _Imprimis_ is more critical than ever.

Think of what we have seen in the last few years: unprecedented and unconstitutional lockdowns, lawless violence in our cities, and even the destruction of historical monuments.

On top of this, we are now seeing an escalation of the effort to shut off any debate about these issues--an effort to limit or curtail speech that is **simply** and **clearly un-American**.

There is a good reason that conservative radio and TV host Mark Levin says _Imprimis_ is the publication he most looks forward to reading each month.

You'll be pleased to know that its circulation has grown this year to more than 6.6 million. That's 6.6 million paper copies that are **mailed to homes and businesses** ten times per year.

Our research also shows that _Imprimis_ subscribers share their copy with two to three other people on average, giving _Imprimis_ even greater reach and influence.

And while a circulation of more than 6.6 million is undoubtedly impressive--_Imprimis_ has a greater circulation than the _Wall Street Journal_ and _The New York Times_ --we are determined to do more.

Since _Imprimis_ launched in 1972 with a circulation of about 1,000, **Hillsdale College has never charged for a subscription.**

**But the fact that we offer _Imprimis_ free of charge does not mean that producing and mailing _Imprimis_ is without cost. **

Even using non-profit postage rates, the price for printing and mailing each issue of _Imprimis_ to so many subscribers ten times a year is a significant financial undertaking.

**Our immediate goal is to increase the circulation of _Imprimis_ to over 7 million American households and businesses this year. To do so, we must address the question of production and mailing costs.**

Your generous support today will help us reach our _Imprimis_ goal and expand our other successful educational outreach efforts.

You know that education is liberty's surest defense--and that education is needed now more than ever!

That's why, in addition to _Imprimis_ , we are investing in our other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. We're doing this through our **[Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpf9ke8qngtgg8rm7lt6et54qhhnns6of7qmvgh8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1clge0o35c5h2bs).**

These efforts include:

* **Educating millions of Americans, especially younger Americans, through free online courses** —on topics including the Constitution, American history, and free-market economics.

* **Providing hundreds of thousands of young Americans with free copies of the Declaration of Independence and Constitution** —Hillsdale has already distributed over 600,000 free copies of these founding documents, and we receive more requests every week.

* **Educating thousands of K-12 students** in Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 public and private schools—there are already more than 90 such schools across the country, each having a strong curricular component in American civics.

I hope you'll agree that after everything we've seen in the last few years, the need for _Imprimis_ and Hillsdale's other educational outreach efforts is undeniable.

Hillsdale is the only college in America equipped to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans about our nation's great heritage of liberty and about the need to defend freedom and limited government.

Almost unique among American colleges and universities, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation.

**This independence from the government also means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.**

[ Will you give generously to our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions** --which includes expanding the reach and influence of _Imprimis_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbkveebn0agms1pst3mdm1nvmn47kmdhknam2620_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1clge0o35c5h2bs)?

If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on American principles and the American way of life, please show your support for Hillsdale College with a generous tax-deductible gift today.

I hope you will stand with us as we engage the far Left, along with its media and Big Tech allies, on the battlefield of education.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

P.S. Liberty in America is under threat, and education is the only long-term solution. That's why we are greatly expanding our national educational outreach, such as _Imprimis_ , free online courses, K-12 curricula and support, and much more. And we need your help to do so! Please make a generous, tax-deductible gift in support of liberty and education at this secure link: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/defend-liberty](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6o0fk9qjdbrkkqsm8mu7fd8gdjdvs1ue0uns6to_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1clge0o35c5h2bs)**.

Thank you again for saving young people through education.
---
| |
---

GOP Presidential
---

name: Team Cotton
subject: Ballgame?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
These two races could decide the Senate

**[Team-- Every week, Fox News releases its "power rankings" of key races across the country.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z6cl0bji9t0hfov31e231i01d4fp5su9vbltqs6o_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1clge0o33clh2bs)**

_This week, one line from the rankings stood out to Tom and our team:_

_**[" To guarantee control, Republicans are looking for victories in Montana and Ohio."](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z7aqi7cdfrg9b73dfmjvtfpagv4sc9e6kofss7c0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1clge0o33clh2bs)**_

That's exactly right. Those two Senate races could decide the entire ballgame.

**[In Montana, Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zgipu3f2tj485rhaum2cr0e23dd74ci4betddov0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1clge0o33clh2bs)** is running against liberal Jon Tester.

**[In Ohio, business leader Bernie Moreno](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zch8rk7sv07hilhio37hh6vd03kaius60k43dpj0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1clge0o33clh2bs) **is running against another liberal, Sherrod Brown.

**[Will you split a donation between their campaigns and ours? A single donation will help multiple Republicans WIN.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z7n39u70rnad4on1uqnjnl35d3r5lljicpierbio_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1clge0o33clh2bs)**

******************************************************[FLIP THE SENATE: DONATE HERE](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zdh0i30as44i3b7hvn2pj3ib7e75h598bv9ps0k0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1clge0o33clh2bs)******************************************************

The Democrats also know that the Senate could come down to these two races, so of course their Marxist Left donors are sending _**[millions](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zm8d7ldbrangp5ec37q43678llddcgcurhjqgl9g_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1clge0o33clh2bs)**_ in reinforcements.

Tim and Bernie don't have to outraise them to win, but they MUST NOT have their messages drowned out by a bunch of Marxist Left lies and smears.

_**[To ensure that doesn't happen, they need small dollar reinforcements from Team Cotton.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zl1gdm2r89qd4ss241djpg8dbm23v5p4qqin0lt8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1clge0o33clh2bs)**_

_**[That's why Tom asked us to reach out to you, and that's why we're hoping you'll split a donation ASAP. Any amount will help both of these great candidates win.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zskdj5uubdodnrgccpqdlop7d1pblgsvtas52700_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1clge0o33clh2bs)**_

Thank you in advance for any support you can send.

-Team Cotton

******************************************************[FLIP MONTANA AND OHIO: DONATE NOW](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zuo6pdji8h42mdg4l900ursba7kgul3d71op10r0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1clge0o33clh2bs)******************************************************

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: Liberty Under Threat
body:
We have never seen anything like what we are seeing today in America!

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znbf1cdh4pb6mps0d4o39bqldjq0lj87bp4lvn5o_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1clge8o74clh2bs)
---
| | Fellow American,

Over the last year, the agenda of the far Left, along with its media and Big Tech allies, has become all too clear.

Together, these forces want to **circumvent the First Amendment, suppress conservative speech and political activity** , and push their own **false** and **dishonest** narrative about American history and about what's happening today.

More and more, stories that question the far-Left's narrative are dubiously "fact-checked" or censored outright, while conservative opponents of the Left are "de-platformed."

**We have never seen anything like what we are seeing today in America!**

The roots of our current crisis can be traced to the late 1960s when radicals who scorned America and its way of life began taking over our colleges and universities.

It took them several decades to cement their dominance over American higher education, but we are seeing the fruits of their labors today: we see it in the media, and we see it in Silicon Valley.

We are also seeing it in professional sports, in corporate America--much of which is now capitulating to far-Left demands--and increasingly in K-12 education.

**Liberty in America is under serious threat. As I travel around the country, worried citizens ask me if there is a way to meet this crisis. I never hesitate to say there is, despite how uphill the fight may seem.**

A vital part of the fight--and one in which Hillsdale College is uniquely able to lead--is to reach and teach additional millions of citizens with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty.

**You are making that fight possible by supporting our educational outreach efforts, such as _Imprimis_ , America's leading digest of liberty.**

Hillsdale launched _Imprimis_ over 50 years ago to promote limited government, free enterprise, individual rights, personal responsibility, and a strong national defense. Each issue covers a timely political, economic, or cultural issue from a constitutional perspective.

Today, with the far Left's dramatic escalation of its assault on free speech and informed patriotism, _Imprimis_ is more critical than ever.

Think of what we have seen in the last few years: unprecedented and unconstitutional lockdowns, lawless violence in our cities, and even the destruction of historical monuments.

On top of this, we are now seeing an escalation of the effort to shut off any debate about these issues--an effort to limit or curtail speech that is **simply** and **clearly un-American**.

There is a good reason that conservative radio and TV host Mark Levin says _Imprimis_ is the publication he most looks forward to reading each month.

You'll be pleased to know that its circulation has grown this year to more than 6.6 million. That's 6.6 million paper copies that are **mailed to homes and businesses** ten times per year.

Our research also shows that _Imprimis_ subscribers share their copy with two to three other people on average, giving _Imprimis_ even greater reach and influence.

And while a circulation of more than 6.6 million is undoubtedly impressive--_Imprimis_ has a greater circulation than the _Wall Street Journal_ and _The New York Times_ --we are determined to do more.

Since _Imprimis_ launched in 1972 with a circulation of about 1,000, **Hillsdale College has never charged for a subscription.**

**But the fact that we offer _Imprimis_ free of charge does not mean that producing and mailing _Imprimis_ is without cost. **

Even using non-profit postage rates, the price for printing and mailing each issue of _Imprimis_ to so many subscribers ten times a year is a significant financial undertaking.

**Our immediate goal is to increase the circulation of _Imprimis_ to over 7 million American households and businesses this year. To do so, we must address the question of production and mailing costs.**

Your generous support today will help us reach our _Imprimis_ goal and expand our other successful educational outreach efforts.

You know that education is liberty's surest defense--and that education is needed now more than ever!

That's why, in addition to _Imprimis_ , we are investing in our other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. We're doing this through our **[Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn2b6j5bupmsg650crc6t4ev8pt434vnktqn5fvo_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1clge8o74clh2bs).**

These efforts include:

* **Educating millions of Americans, especially younger Americans, through free online courses** —on topics including the Constitution, American history, and free-market economics.

* **Providing hundreds of thousands of young Americans with free copies of the Declaration of Independence and Constitution** —Hillsdale has already distributed over 600,000 free copies of these founding documents, and we receive more requests every week.

* **Educating thousands of K-12 students** in Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 public and private schools—there are already more than 90 such schools across the country, each having a strong curricular component in American civics.

I hope you'll agree that after everything we've seen in the last few years, the need for _Imprimis_ and Hillsdale's other educational outreach efforts is undeniable.

Hillsdale is the only college in America equipped to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans about our nation's great heritage of liberty and about the need to defend freedom and limited government.

Almost unique among American colleges and universities, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation.

**This independence from the government also means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.**

[ Will you give generously to our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions** --which includes expanding the reach and influence of _Imprimis_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjmajchjoi9ubscitvuph81c2q3jb1o78qon1638_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1clge8o74clh2bs)?

If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on American principles and the American way of life, please show your support for Hillsdale College with a generous tax-deductible gift today.

I hope you will stand with us as we engage the far Left, along with its media and Big Tech allies, on the battlefield of education.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

P.S. Liberty in America is under threat, and education is the only long-term solution. That's why we are greatly expanding our national educational outreach, such as _Imprimis_ , free online courses, K-12 curricula and support, and much more. And we need your help to do so! Please make a generous, tax-deductible gift in support of liberty and education at this secure link: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/defend-liberty](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zja8skc0vs6935bi2l2rco1di3cjn7c2cdvgscmg_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1clge8o74clh2bs)**.

Thank you again for saving young people through education.

If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on American principles and the American way of life, please show your support for Hillsdale College with a generous tax-deductible gift today. I hope you will stand with us as we engage the far Left, along with its media and Big Tech allies, on the battlefield of education. Warm regards, Larry P. That's why we are greatly expanding our national educational outreach, such as Imprimis , free online courses, K-12 curricula and support, and much more. And we need your help to do so! Please make a generous, tax-deductible gift in support of liberty and education at this secure link: **. Thank you again for saving young people through education. | | American Action News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Hillsdale College via American Briefing
subject: Unmasking the Far-Left Agenda
body:
We have never seen anything like what we are seeing today in America!

This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zrojuf88iufp5t2rt2vq99hvctaqj20l7fgoek78_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1clgecor2cph2bs)
---
| | Fellow American,

Over the last year, the agenda of the far Left, along with its media and Big Tech allies, has become all too clear.

Together, these forces want to **circumvent the First Amendment, suppress conservative speech and political activity** , and push their own **false** and **dishonest** narrative about American history and about what's happening today.

More and more, stories that question the far-Left's narrative are dubiously "fact-checked" or censored outright, while conservative opponents of the Left are "de-platformed."

**We have never seen anything like what we are seeing today in America!**

The roots of our current crisis can be traced to the late 1960s when radicals who scorned America and its way of life began taking over our colleges and universities.

It took them several decades to cement their dominance over American higher education, but we are seeing the fruits of their labors today: we see it in the media, and we see it in Silicon Valley.

We are also seeing it in professional sports, in corporate America--much of which is now capitulating to far-Left demands--and increasingly in K-12 education.

**Liberty in America is under serious threat. As I travel around the country, worried citizens ask me if there is a way to meet this crisis. I never hesitate to say there is, despite how uphill the fight may seem.**

A vital part of the fight--and one in which Hillsdale College is uniquely able to lead--is to reach and teach additional millions of citizens with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty.

**You are making that fight possible by supporting our educational outreach efforts, such as _Imprimis_ , America's leading digest of liberty.**

Hillsdale launched _Imprimis_ over 50 years ago to promote limited government, free enterprise, individual rights, personal responsibility, and a strong national defense. Each issue covers a timely political, economic, or cultural issue from a constitutional perspective.

Today, with the far Left's dramatic escalation of its assault on free speech and informed patriotism, _Imprimis_ is more critical than ever.

Think of what we have seen in the last few years: unprecedented and unconstitutional lockdowns, lawless violence in our cities, and even the destruction of historical monuments.

On top of this, we are now seeing an escalation of the effort to shut off any debate about these issues--an effort to limit or curtail speech that is **simply** and **clearly un-American**.

There is a good reason that conservative radio and TV host Mark Levin says _Imprimis_ is the publication he most looks forward to reading each month.

You'll be pleased to know that its circulation has grown this year to more than 6.6 million. That's 6.6 million paper copies that are **mailed to homes and businesses** ten times per year.

Our research also shows that _Imprimis_ subscribers share their copy with two to three other people on average, giving _Imprimis_ even greater reach and influence.

And while a circulation of more than 6.6 million is undoubtedly impressive--_Imprimis_ has a greater circulation than the _Wall Street Journal_ and _The New York Times_ --we are determined to do more.

Since _Imprimis_ launched in 1972 with a circulation of about 1,000, **Hillsdale College has never charged for a subscription.**

**But the fact that we offer _Imprimis_ free of charge does not mean that producing and mailing _Imprimis_ is without cost. **

Even using non-profit postage rates, the price for printing and mailing each issue of _Imprimis_ to so many subscribers ten times a year is a significant financial undertaking.

**Our immediate goal is to increase the circulation of _Imprimis_ to over 7 million American households and businesses this year. To do so, we must address the question of production and mailing costs.**

Your generous support today will help us reach our _Imprimis_ goal and expand our other successful educational outreach efforts.

You know that education is liberty's surest defense--and that education is needed now more than ever!

That's why, in addition to _Imprimis_ , we are investing in our other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. We're doing this through our **[Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2znau2gih75j5mh9k0f6q5ougcccq51abpnrpkjko_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1clgecor2cph2bs).**

These efforts include:

* **Educating millions of Americans, especially younger Americans, through free online courses** —on topics including the Constitution, American history, and free-market economics.

* **Providing hundreds of thousands of young Americans with free copies of the Declaration of Independence and Constitution** —Hillsdale has already distributed over 600,000 free copies of these founding documents, and we receive more requests every week.

* **Educating thousands of K-12 students** in Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 public and private schools—there are already more than 90 such schools across the country, each having a strong curricular component in American civics.

I hope you'll agree that after everything we've seen in the last few years, the need for _Imprimis_ and Hillsdale's other educational outreach efforts is undeniable.

Hillsdale is the only college in America equipped to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans about our nation's great heritage of liberty and about the need to defend freedom and limited government.

Almost unique among American colleges and universities, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation.

**This independence from the government also means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.**

[ Will you give generously to our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions** --which includes expanding the reach and influence of _Imprimis_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z1n2da5id17n6ai40662rh8vgkg0ai1pqcq1s3ho_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1clgecor2cph2bs)?

If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on American principles and the American way of life, please show your support for Hillsdale College with a generous tax-deductible gift today.

I hope you will stand with us as we engage the far Left, along with its media and Big Tech allies, on the battlefield of education.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

clean_body: We have never seen anything like what we are seeing today in America! This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Fellow American, Over the last year, the agenda of the far Left, along with its media and Big Tech allies, has become all too clear. Together, these forces want to circumvent the First Amendment, suppress conservative speech and political activity , and push their own false and dishonest narrative about American history and about what's happening today. More and more, stories that question the far-Left's narrative are dubiously "fact-checked" or censored outright, while conservative opponents of the Left are "de-platformed." We have never seen anything like what we are seeing today in America! The roots of our current crisis can be traced to the late 1960s when radicals who scorned America and its way of life began taking over our colleges and universities. It took them several decades to cement their dominance over American higher education, but we are seeing the fruits of their labors today: we see it in the media, and we see it in Silicon Valley. We are also seeing it in professional sports, in corporate America--much of which is now capitulating to far-Left demands--and increasingly in K-12 education. Liberty in America is under serious threat. As I travel around the country, worried citizens ask me if there is a way to meet this crisis. I never hesitate to say there is, despite how uphill the fight may seem. A vital part of the fight--and one in which Hillsdale College is uniquely able to lead--is to reach and teach additional millions of citizens with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. You are making that fight possible by supporting our educational outreach efforts, such as Imprimis , America's leading digest of liberty. Hillsdale launched Imprimis over 50 years ago to promote limited government, free enterprise, individual rights, personal responsibility, and a strong national defense. Each issue covers a timely political, economic, or cultural issue from a constitutional perspective. Today, with the far Left's dramatic escalation of its assault on free speech and informed patriotism, Imprimis is more critical than ever. Think of what we have seen in the last few years: unprecedented and unconstitutional lockdowns, lawless violence in our cities, and even the destruction of historical monuments. On top of this, we are now seeing an escalation of the effort to shut off any debate about these issues--an effort to limit or curtail speech that is simply and clearly un-American. There is a good reason that conservative radio and TV host Mark Levin says Imprimis is the publication he most looks forward to reading each month. You'll be pleased to know that its circulation has grown this year to more than 6.6 million. That's 6.6 million paper copies that are mailed to homes and businesses ten times per year. Our research also shows that Imprimis subscribers share their copy with two to three other people on average, giving Imprimis even greater reach and influence. And while a circulation of more than 6.6 million is undoubtedly impressive--Imprimis has a greater circulation than the Wall Street Journal and The New York Times --we are determined to do more. Since Imprimis launched in 1972 with a circulation of about 1,000, Hillsdale College has never charged for a subscription. But the fact that we offer Imprimis free of charge does not mean that producing and mailing Imprimis is without cost. Even using non-profit postage rates, the price for printing and mailing each issue of Imprimis to so many subscribers ten times a year is a significant financial undertaking. Our immediate goal is to increase the circulation of Imprimis to over 7 million American households and businesses this year. To do so, we must address the question of production and mailing costs. Your generous support today will help us reach our Imprimis goal and expand our other successful educational outreach efforts. You know that education is liberty's surest defense--and that education is needed now more than ever! That's why, in addition to Imprimis , we are investing in our other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. We're doing this through our . These efforts include: Educating millions of Americans, especially younger Americans, through free online courses —on topics including the Constitution, American history, and free-market economics. Providing hundreds of thousands of young Americans with free copies of the Declaration of Independence and Constitution —Hillsdale has already distributed over 600,000 free copies of these founding documents, and we receive more requests every week. Educating thousands of K-12 students in Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 public and private schools—there are already more than 90 such schools across the country, each having a strong curricular component in American civics. I hope you'll agree that after everything we've seen in the last few years, the need for Imprimis and Hillsdale's other educational outreach efforts is undeniable. Hillsdale is the only college in America equipped to reach and teach increasing millions of Americans about our nation's great heritage of liberty and about the need to defend freedom and limited government. Almost unique among American colleges and universities, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. This independence from the government also means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. ? If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on American principles and the American way of life, please show your support for Hillsdale College with a generous tax-deductible gift today. I hope you will stand with us as we engage the far Left, along with its media and Big Tech allies, on the battlefield of education. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 P.S. Liberty in America is under threat, and education is the only long-term solution. That's why we are greatly expanding our national educational outreach, such as Imprimis , free online courses, K-12 curricula and support, and much more. And we need your help to do so! name: Team Cotton
subject: These two races could decide the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
These two races could decide the Senate

**[Team-- Every week, Fox News releases its "power rankings" of key races across the country.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zna38lldhpb07lu6a320rnfgsludqobj9efd2dlg_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1clge6pj6cph2bs)**

_This week, one line from the rankings stood out to Tom and our team:_

_**[" To guarantee control, Republicans are looking for victories in Montana and Ohio."](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zjruq6q89ivc4g4dq9ic50lf0rbue13mo1gfp060_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1clge6pj6cph2bs)**_

That's exactly right. Those two Senate races could decide the entire ballgame.

**[In Montana, Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zbt6oa1nd6aq5nrf1cink6ke6loiq66fj5ocnh0o_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1clge6pj6cph2bs)** is running against liberal Jon Tester.

**[In Ohio, business leader Bernie Moreno](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zpkaf2gmmoch8dfk04ikjvci2jtmb4lhus1le65o_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1clge6pj6cph2bs) **is running against another liberal, Sherrod Brown.

**[Will you split a donation between their campaigns and ours? A single donation will help multiple Republicans WIN.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zalh4sdt6hh131gk36jri7avk1vs4dccshc51tdo_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1clge6pj6cph2bs)**

******************************************************[FLIP THE SENATE: DONATE HERE](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zb5k4dedan43vbv71f82o8uecvjbs3gio0bt07i0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1clge6pj6cph2bs)******************************************************

The Democrats also know that the Senate could come down to these two races, so of course their Marxist Left donors are sending _**[millions](http://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z6rqi0l5fl0smosl8ejfpklquk0dfpbr6e6plcco_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1clge6pj6cph2bs)**_ in reinforcements.

Tim and Bernie don't have to outraise them to win, but they MUST NOT have their messages drowned out by a bunch of Marxist Left lies and smears.

_**[To ensure that doesn't happen, they need small dollar reinforcements from Team Cotton.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zf0r1i2imh9msesbkonunv5fi1dr6850vpl8t3d0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1clge6pj6cph2bs)**_

_**[That's why Tom asked us to reach out to you, and that's why we're hoping you'll split a donation ASAP. Any amount will help both of these great candidates win.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z72nem8cr5nnecg0lfp9ebsa7ufvucn86r9j228g_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1clge6pj6cph2bs)**_

Thank you in advance for any support you can send.

-Team Cotton

******************************************************[FLIP MONTANA AND OHIO: DONATE NOW](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zb1t9m79it3dnlgkg2b1tgk5rop05bad4i8dlfn0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1clge6pj6cph2bs)******************************************************

name: Hillsdale College via Restore Our Nation
subject: Unmasking the Far-Left Agenda
body:
We have never seen anything like what we are seeing today in America!

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/NE3Odrn856yxhxuY53qgOw~~/AARclAA~/RgRorXxeP0SsaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL2RlZmVuZC1saWJlcnR5P3NjPTAxNDAyTjAyNDJMQ1pET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1pbXByaW1pcyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1MT05HX1BBLVJPTi0yMDI0MDgyNVcDc3BjQgpmu-vhymZ86H9-UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---
| | Fellow American,

Over the last year, the agenda of the far Left, along with its media and Big Tech allies, has become all too clear.

Together, these forces want to **circumvent the First Amendment, suppress conservative speech and political activity** , and push their own **false** and **dishonest** narrative about American history and about what's happening today.

More and more, stories that question the far-Left's narrative are dubiously "fact-checked" or censored outright, while conservative opponents of the Left are "de-platformed."

**We have never seen anything like what we are seeing today in America!**

The roots of our current crisis can be traced to the late 1960s when radicals who scorned America and its way of life began taking over our colleges and universities.

It took them several decades to cement their dominance over American higher education, but we are seeing the fruits of their labors today: we see it in the media, and we see it in Silicon Valley.

We are also seeing it in professional sports, in corporate America--much of which is now capitulating to far-Left demands--and increasingly in K-12 education.

**Liberty in America is under serious threat. As I travel around the country, worried citizens ask me if there is a way to meet this crisis. I never hesitate to say there is, despite how uphill the fight may seem.**

A vital part of the fight--and one in which Hillsdale College is uniquely able to lead--is to reach and teach additional millions of citizens with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty.

**You are making that fight possible by supporting our educational outreach efforts, such as _Imprimis_ , America's leading digest of liberty.**

Hillsdale launched _Imprimis_ over 50 years ago to promote limited government, free enterprise, individual rights, personal responsibility, and a strong national defense. Each issue covers a timely political, economic, or cultural issue from a constitutional perspective.

Today, with the far Left's dramatic escalation of its assault on free speech and informed patriotism, _Imprimis_ is more critical than ever.

Think of what we have seen in the last few years: unprecedented and unconstitutional lockdowns, lawless violence in our cities, and even the destruction of historical monuments.

On top of this, we are now seeing an escalation of the effort to shut off any debate about these issues--an effort to limit or curtail speech that is **simply** and **clearly un-American**.

There is a good reason that conservative radio and TV host Mark Levin says _Imprimis_ is the publication he most looks forward to reading each month.

You'll be pleased to know that its circulation has grown this year to more than 6.6 million. That's 6.6 million paper copies that are **mailed to homes and businesses** ten times per year.

Our research also shows that _Imprimis_ subscribers share their copy with two to three other people on average, giving _Imprimis_ even greater reach and influence.

And while a circulation of more than 6.6 million is undoubtedly impressive--_Imprimis_ has a greater circulation than the _Wall Street Journal_ and _The New York Times_ --we are determined to do more.

Since _Imprimis_ launched in 1972 with a circulation of about 1,000, **Hillsdale College has never charged for a subscription.**

**But the fact that we offer _Imprimis_ free of charge does not mean that producing and mailing _Imprimis_ is without cost. **

Even using non-profit postage rates, the price for printing and mailing each issue of _Imprimis_ to so many subscribers ten times a year is a significant financial undertaking.

**Our immediate goal is to increase the circulation of _Imprimis_ to over 7 million American households and businesses this year. To do so, we must address the question of production and mailing costs.**

Your generous support today will help us reach our _Imprimis_ goal and expand our other successful educational outreach efforts.

You know that education is liberty's surest defense--and that education is needed now more than ever!

That's why, in addition to _Imprimis_ , we are investing in our other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. We're doing this through our **[Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/NE3Odrn856yxhxuY53qgOw~~/AARclAA~/RgRorXxeP0SsaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL2RlZmVuZC1saWJlcnR5P3NjPTAxNDAyTjAyNDJMQ1pET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1pbXByaW1pcyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1MT05HX1BBLVJPTi0yMDI0MDgyNVcDc3BjQgpmu-vhymZ86H9-UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~).**

These efforts include:

* **Educating millions of Americans, especially younger Americans, through free online courses** —on topics including the Constitution, American history, and free-market economics.

* **Providing hundreds of thousands of young Americans with free copies of the Declaration of Independence and Constitution** —Hillsdale has already distributed over 600,000 free copies of these founding documents, and we receive more requests every week.

* **Educating thousands of K-12 students** in Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 public and private schools—there are already more than 90 such schools across the country, each having a strong curricular component in American civics.

I hope you'll agree that after everything we've seen in the last few years, the need for _Imprimis_ and Hillsdale's other educational outreach efforts is undeniable.

Hillsdale is the only college in America equipped to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans about our nation's great heritage of liberty and about the need to defend freedom and limited government.

Almost unique among American colleges and universities, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation.

**This independence from the government also means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.**

[ Will you give generously to our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions** --which includes expanding the reach and influence of _Imprimis_](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/NE3Odrn856yxhxuY53qgOw~~/AARclAA~/RgRorXxeP0SsaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL2RlZmVuZC1saWJlcnR5P3NjPTAxNDAyTjAyNDJMQ1pET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1pbXByaW1pcyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1MT05HX1BBLVJPTi0yMDI0MDgyNVcDc3BjQgpmu-vhymZ86H9-UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)?

If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on American principles and the American way of life, please show your support for Hillsdale College with a generous tax-deductible gift today.

I hope you will stand with us as we engage the far Left, along with its media and Big Tech allies, on the battlefield of education.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

P.S. Liberty in America is under threat, and education is the only long-term solution. That's why we are greatly expanding our national educational outreach, such as _Imprimis_ , free online courses, K-12 curricula and support, and much more. And we need your help to do so! Please make a generous, tax-deductible gift in support of liberty and education at this secure link: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/defend-liberty](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/NE3Odrn856yxhxuY53qgOw~~/AARclAA~/RgRorXxeP0SsaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL2RlZmVuZC1saWJlcnR5P3NjPTAxNDAyTjAyNDJMQ1pET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1pbXByaW1pcyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1MT05HX1BBLVJPTi0yMDI0MDgyNVcDc3BjQgpmu-vhymZ86H9-UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)**.

Thank you again for saving young people through education.
---
| |
---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/7vAOEEfBSge2Fve6rQ_-Jg~~/AARclAA~/RgRorXxeP0RpaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQucmVzdG9yZS1vdXItbmF0aW9uLmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1SZXN0b3JlLU91ci1OYXRpb24tT2ZmZXJzJmU9ZHB3aWxsaXM2NyUyNTQwZ21haWwuY29tVwNzcGNCCma76-HKZnzof35SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/uFQu-qvdgPEIpP7s595n0g~~/AARclAA~/RgRorXxeP0QraHR0cHM6Ly9yZXN0b3JlLW91ci1uYXRpb24uY29tL3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgpmu-vhymZ86H9-UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

You know that education is liberty's surest defense--and that education is needed now more than ever! That's why, in addition to Imprimis , we are investing in our other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. We're doing this through our ~~. These efforts include: Educating millions of Americans, especially younger Americans, through free online courses —on topics including the Constitution, American history, and free-market economics. Providing hundreds of thousands of young Americans with free copies of the Declaration of Independence and Constitution —Hillsdale has already distributed over 600,000 free copies of these founding documents, and we receive more requests every week. Educating thousands of K-12 students in Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 public and private schools—there are already more than 90 such schools across the country, each having a strong curricular component in American civics. I hope you'll agree that after everything we've seen in the last few years, the need for Imprimis and Hillsdale's other educational outreach efforts is undeniable. Hillsdale is the only college in America equipped to reach and teach increasing millions of Americans about our nation's great heritage of liberty and about the need to defend freedom and limited government. Almost unique among American colleges and universities, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. This independence from the government also means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. ~~? If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on American principles and the American way of life, please show your support for Hillsdale College with a generous tax-deductible gift today. I hope you will stand with us as we engage the far Left, along with its media and Big Tech allies, on the battlefield of education. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 P.S. Liberty in America is under threat, and education is the only long-term solution. That's why we are greatly expanding our national educational outreach, such as Imprimis , free online courses, K-12 curricula and support, and much more. And we need your help to do so! Please make a generous, tax-deductible gift in support of liberty and education at this secure link: ~~**. Thank you again for saving young people through education. | | Restore Our Nation PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | ~~

name: The Federalist Wire
subject: The Trump campaign is stunned after Trump rival announces their support behind the former president
body:
DAILY NEWS | August 25, 2024

The Trump campaign is
stunned after Trump rival announces their support behind the
former president
Politics
can bring about all sorts of shocking twists and turns. But no
one was ready for this.

As the Trump campaign was stunned
after a Trump rival announced their support support behind the
former president.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

News outlet reveals Biden
allies kept this one secret about the president from Americans

For years Democrats
have tried to protect Joe Biden. This has been the case even when
he's been involved in corrupt behavior.
➞ Continue Reading

Trump's newly announced
plans as commander-in-chief spark fear in the eyes of the Left

Donald Trump knows
how to get under the skin of Democrats. It's by simply creating
policy proposals that are the antithesis of what they believe in.

➞ Continue Reading

Bill Clinton faces grim
reality after alarming DNC appearance

The former Democrat
president is stumping hard for the Harris campaign. But that may
be backfiring on him in a major way.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

Your privacy is important to us.

comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

name: Team Cotton
subject: These two races could decide the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
These two races could decide the Senate

**[Team-- Every week, Fox News releases its "power rankings" of key races across the country.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvmcfiq9ngah57cj7u0uqtq1ql6fr538nkpnotqg_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1clge9o36cph2bs)**

_This week, one line from the rankings stood out to Tom and our team:_

_**[" To guarantee control, Republicans are looking for victories in Montana and Ohio."](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlb346and6abjeskg92g6bca4a9rgh1mqlil1j5o_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1clge9o36cph2bs)**_

That's exactly right. Those two Senate races could decide the entire ballgame.

**[In Montana, Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zea3v36ja9pv3fk7am98rcunehcj8nbdpkqd46c8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1clge9o36cph2bs)** is running against liberal Jon Tester.

**[In Ohio, business leader Bernie Moreno](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsk7ehc1e9tqourucci6u7g2bmpsf917ca0ntsdg_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1clge9o36cph2bs) **is running against another liberal, Sherrod Brown.

**[Will you split a donation between their campaigns and ours? A single donation will help multiple Republicans WIN.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5ia9m3m4t0ir95ha1eht1k4gtcsgqrmusgumas0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1clge9o36cph2bs)**

******************************************************[FLIP THE SENATE: DONATE HERE](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4a8pripahottqftkfpfblfc4l8p0i5c8fpm2048_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1clge9o36cph2bs)******************************************************

The Democrats also know that the Senate could come down to these two races, so of course their Marxist Left donors are sending _**[millions](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo2a3alv1a50etmhufo5300gqdt00qjc6r2qm9j0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1clge9o36cph2bs)**_ in reinforcements.

Tim and Bernie don't have to outraise them to win, but they MUST NOT have their messages drowned out by a bunch of Marxist Left lies and smears.

_**[To ensure that doesn't happen, they need small dollar reinforcements from Team Cotton.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zibr6h56bng55rkvbcqsid6u6dthk5rl8ii2i56g_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1clge9o36cph2bs)**_

_**[That's why Tom asked us to reach out to you, and that's why we're hoping you'll split a donation ASAP. Any amount will help both of these great candidates win.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ze2jltgddh1d4uarkjgr4m7jvk63h6vcuoea8cvg_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1clge9o36cph2bs)**_

Thank you in advance for any support you can send.

-Team Cotton

******************************************************[FLIP MONTANA AND OHIO: DONATE NOW](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2lnr13uqsf1igc53ha2hqg9uiagfboepncqq3q0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1clge9o36cph2bs)******************************************************
