name: Congressman Paul Broun
subject: Sign the petition to ban transgender child mutilation
body:
Ban Child Mutilation Nationwide

Dear Concerned American,

Should so-called doctors be allowed to
sexually mutilate or chemically sterilize children - even
children as young as 8 years for girls and 10 years for boys?

Should publicly-funded schools be permitted
to promote this radical trans-sexual abuse often behind the backs
of parents?

I hope you say ABSOLUTELY NOT!

Yet it is happening every day in America. In
fact, an insider report from a horrified worker at a Missouri
Children's Hospital revealed that the number of children sent for
"gender transition" has increased by more than 400% in the last
five years.

That's why I'm emailing you today asking you
to sign your petition to your U.S. Representative and Senators
demanding they take immediate action to ban the transgender child
sexual mutilation and chemical castration procedures.

I am former U.S. Congressman Paul Broun, and
I'm more determined than ever to stop the worldwide tide of
Leftism I see targeting our children and grandchildren.

CitizenGO represents millions of members and
supporters fighting back against the radical anti-family LGBT
ideology that has swept through our schools, media, and
entertainment, mercilessly attacking the relationships between
children and their parents and destroying family morality and
faith.

Will you join with millions of pro-family
Citizens to defend our children from transgender child sexual
mutilation?

Click here to sign the petition to Congress
demanding they ban all gender transition procedures for minors
immediately!

Puberty blockers, hormone supplements, and
drastic sexual organ surgery are all procedures with horrific
side effects that children cannot fully grasp. And in a sea of
lies and misinformation, few adults understand the true horror.

Make no mistake, the transgender lobby wants
them confused and isolated from any dissenting voices.

*** I've seen an entire generation of youth
come out of their schools confused and assaulted by the
transgender ideology attacking gender and their sense of self,
persuading them to seek poisonous and severely harmful procedures
to change their bodies to "fit in" with the transgender world.

*** I've seen families torn to pieces as the
newest generation of children, who are fed radical transgender
values with their cereal, clash with bewildered parents over a
child's so-called" gender identity."

*** In a growing number of States, children
are encouraged to hide their planned mutilations or chemical
castrations from their parents by teachers and counselors.

*** Meanwhile, the transgender lobby rabidly
shuts down or "cancels" any dissenting voices or studies on the
harmful effects of child sexual mutilation.

*** They even more rabidly suppress any study
of the massive number of children who abandon gender transition
after the fact...

... and are left with bitter regrets, twisted
bodies and awful consequences.
The best way to put a stop to it all is by
passing a flat-out Federal ban on administering these procedures
to minors.

Our children, the most vulnerable members of
our society, are being conned into irreversible procedures that
alter their bodies and lives forever.

This is not a matter of choice or identity -
it's a matter of safety and common sense. Minors are not equipped
with the life experience or emotional maturity to make such
grave, scarring, and often irreversible decisions about their
bodies and their futures.

Sign your petition today demanding Congress
step in and protect our children from transgender mutilation.

Over 20 states have already passed bans on
transgender child sexual mutilation, though many are being
challenged in court.

But states like California and New York will
not follow suit willingly, and the transgender lobby is howling
for blood at the restrictions being placed on them.

That's why, once you've signed, I ask you to
chip in with a modest contribution to help CitizenGO bring other
Americans into the fight against child sexual mutilation. Even a
gift of $10 or $25 will be a big boost.

The success of this campaign relies on the
power of Citizens standing together to make our voices heard, and
every extra dollar counts when we're fighting to counter the
transgender lobby's pervasive ideology.

So please, sign your petition, share, and
chip in with a quick $10 or $25 contribution to help CitizenGO
recruit more signers and win the fight.

In addition to recruiting more petition
signers to increase the impact of our campaign, your contribution
will help fund:

Hard-hitting advertisements to highlight
and draw attention to the horrible practices of transgender
centers.
Targeted petition deliveries to key
elected officials demanding they take action to defend children.
Phone calls to likely supporters to raise
awareness and recruit new members.
Radio and TV ads exposing everything the
transgender ideology is inflicting on our children, should funds
permit.

So once you have signed, I ask that you
make a contribution of $10 or $25 to CitizenGO, or perhaps an
even more generous gift of $50 or $100, to help expand their
recruitment and to fund all of these plans in CitizenGO's fight
to stop child sexual mutilation.

So please sign your petition, share, and chip
in with a generous contribution of $10 or $25, or perhaps an even
more generous gift of $50 or $100 today.

Thank you for standing with us in this
crucial fight for our children's future.

Sincerely,

Paul C. Broun (MD)
U.S. Congressman Georgia 10 Ret.

P.S. I'm more determined than ever to stop
the worldwide tide of Leftism I see targeting our children and
grandchildren.

CitizenGO represents millions of members and
supporters fighting back against the radical anti-family LGBT
ideology, and I want every pro-sanity American to band together
to put a stop to child sexual mutilation and chemical castration.

The best way to do that is with a Federal ban
on performing Transgender procedures on minors, and CitizenGO is
launching a campaign to do just that. But it will take people
power to succeed.

That's why I'm counting on you to sign your
petition, and then go on to add a modest $10 or $25
contribution, or perhaps an even more generous gift of $50 or
$100, to help CitizenGO fight to ban child sexual mutilation.

In addition to signing your petition and
donating, I need you to share it with your friends and family who
share our values so they can have the opportunity to sign as
well. CitizenGO's petition page makes it super easy to share in a
way you prefer.

CitizenGO is a community of
active citizens that works to ensure that human life, the family
and our freedoms are respected worldwide. CitizenGO members live
in every nation of the world. Our team is spread across 16
countries on 5 continents and operates in 12 languages. Learn
about CitizenGO here or follow us on Facebook or Twitter.

Not produced or emailed at
taxpayer expense.

name: No Dem Left Behind PAC
subject: Not Breaking News: JD Vance is Weird
body:
Trump's VP pick is tanking in the polls...
| | | | | | [ ](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2uk8v0-ep5bt8-kyd76rh7/ "No Dem Left Behind")
---
| | | | [MAX my impact →](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2uk8v0-ep5bt9-kyd76rh8/)
---
| | | |
# **JD Vance is Weird**
---
| | | | | [ ](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2uk8v0-ep5bta-kyd76rh8/)
---
| | | | folks, Let's face it: JD Vance is weird. Saying that political leaders without biological children "don't really have a direct stake" in the country is outlandish, to say the least. His odd viewpoints alienate a significant portion of the population and raise questions about Vance's grasp on reality. The Democrats' new strategy of labeling Trump and Vance as weird seems to be working brilliantly. We have seen in the media that it frustrates opponents, leading them to amplify it further with their off-balance responses. So far, Trump and Vance have been incapable of finding an effective comeback, leaving them scrambling. Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz, a potential vice-presidential candidate for Harris, called Trump and Vance "just weird" in a recent interview. The Democratic Governors Association amplified this sentiment, spreading it across social media. Walz even referenced Trump's bizarre habit of mentioning the fictional serial killer Hannibal Lecter from "Silence of the Lambs" in his stump speeches, adding to the weirdness factor. Harris's campaign hasn't missed a beat in highlighting Vance's oddities. In a recent news release, they described Vance's out-of-touch ideas, particularly his stance on abortion and his comments about childless leaders. Harris allies, including Sens. Brian Schatz of Hawaii and Chris Murphy of Connecticut, have also chimed in, calling Vance's past comments "super weird." At her first fundraiser as the likely Democratic nominee, Harris herself called out Trump's "wild lies" and Vance's peculiar statements, reiterating that the only box to put them in is "weird." This new narrative has given Democrats a powerful advantage, one they rarely had when President Biden was still in the race. JD Vance's weirdness isn't a new revelation, either. While the majority of the public is learning who Vance is for the first time through these strange headlines, he has a history of making controversial remarks. In a 2021 interview, Vance slammed prominent childless Democrats, including Harris, as "childless cat ladies" with no stake in America. This comment alone is enough to raise eyebrows and question his judgment. Harris's quip in 2018, when preparing for a potential debate with Trump, sums it up perfectly: "Why are you being so weird? What's wrong with you?" Despite their attempts to flip the script, Trump and Vance have struggled. Trump spokesman Steven Cheung's attempts to redirect the weird label back at Harris and her allies have fallen flat. Donald Trump Jr.'s online rants about "soft on crime" politicians and Vance's reposting of videos criticizing Harris only highlight their desperation. In contrast, Democrats have masterfully co-opted Republican attack lines, using the "weird" label to their advantage. The Republicans' previous tactics of sharing clips of Harris's laugh or her stories have backfired, with Democrats now embracing these moments as in-jokes. The "coconut tree" anecdote has even become a symbol of unity among Harris's supporters. [**_JD Vance's weirdness is not just a political talking point—_**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2uk8v0-ep5btb-kyd76rh9/)[** _Vance and MAGA are clearly out of touch with what Americans want, but that does not mean they are backing down this Novemb_**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2uk8v0-ep5btc-kyd76rh0/) [**_er. We need to fight MAG_**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2uk8v0-ep5btd-kyd76rh1/)[** _https://secure.actblue.com/donate/no-dem-left-behind-pac-1?refcode=cm_**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2uk8v0-ep5bte-kyd76rh2/) [**_A in all 50 states and send them home for good in 2024!_**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2uk8v0-ep5btf-kyd76rh3/)
---
| [Fight MAGA with No Dem Left Behind today!](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2uk8v0-ep5btg-kyd76rh4/)
---
Thank you for your help on this pressing matter, -No Dem Left Behind Team

Soon, you won't be able to turn on your TV without seeing radical Liberals like Adam Schiff, Kamala Harris, and Gavin Newsom laughing about abolishing the Electoral College, ending the filibuster, and turning the country into the Tenderloin district in San Francisco. This isn't just about campaign strategy--it's about pushing their radical agenda in 2024 and beyond. But here's the good news: we don't have to roll over and let them win. Before today, they had already committed over $27 million to crush our momentum, flip the House, and elect radical liberals like Adam Schiff. Soon, you won't be able to turn on your TV without seeing radical Liberals like Adam Schiff, Kamala Harris, and Gavin Newsom laughing about abolishing the Electoral College, ending the filibuster, and turning the country into the Tenderloin district in San Francisco. subject: Thomas Sowell: Trickle Down Theory and Tax Cuts for the Rich
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.secureandprosper._4PNzlKjfYCRckrJENyw)
---
| | Dear Friend,I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes. For those people--and you may be among them--I'm thrilled to share a digital copy of one of his commentaries with you, absolutely free: _[**_"_****_Trickle Down " Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_"_**](http://trk.secureandprosper._beJcMkw)_
---
| [](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---
| | "Tax cuts for the rich" is a favorite argument of those who oppose lower tax rates. But does imposing higher tax rates on wealthy Americans actually increase the amount of revenue coming into the federal government? Hoover Institution Senior Fellow **Thomas Sowell takes an empirical approach** in his commentary, [**_"_****_Trickle Down " Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_"_**](http://trk.secureandprosper._49EQ) Sowell separates fact from fiction when it comes to tax rates and uses real life data and examples to prove that lower tax rates for all actually lead to greater revenue for the government. As a friend and supporter of the Hoover Institution, we are proud to offer you this valuable, thought-provoking resource free of charge.[**Click here to get your free copy of**** _ "Trickle Down" Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich" _****now.**](http://trk.secureandprosper.-w) Thanks,Greg Greg Stamps | _Online Development_ Hoover Institution | Stanford University

_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

Soon, you won't be able to turn on your TV without seeing radical Liberals like Adam Schiff, Kamala Harris, and Gavin Newsom laughing about abolishing the Electoral College, ending the filibuster, and turning the country into the Tenderloin district in San Francisco. name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Unprecedented Assault on Freedom
body:
We have never seen anything like what we are seeing today in America!

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1556dba3c1294a4982575577d7984762&_e=fRmQkD4wVBhfQopgq4dJb0Ju2YMqU5OmCdoPKGewUeDvPfG0mJsIDLw6LaXssRJoPLFqOLRwB0y8xRuhcpd58Vy1VQlxM6mnms2g5zr9B_g2Gz9rmWHwpSJwpiekNPHjCjn_oZdNd1ubGPjeFSrLdfmS4ltKhW0tKe5TpS46dR67by5VECHLIStKxuaCttHgKQj1wlsKUmrIdANaaUGcRXegpiYDbQGkiSonCsHGcREHVknijIQjZeB_RxL6PJg-NJzJQLPUS0hQY_BouSV43hm4PxA8w86fFR3Ps5fA2juqS0h1O54TDvFsVwur0e0-U4kOhuhMZeVI0tUM50KmtZf6wTa_FzIgSto3oIwV93dXu1cQZrzrJHzSeDEy-8KHtx8gZELbZlRV_N06GdIDdA%3D%3D)
---
| | Fellow American,

Over the last year, the agenda of the far Left, along with its media and Big Tech allies, has become all too clear.

Together, these forces want to **circumvent the First Amendment, suppress conservative speech and political activity** , and push their own **false** and **dishonest** narrative about American history and about what's happening today.

More and more, stories that question the far-Left's narrative are dubiously "fact-checked" or censored outright, while conservative opponents of the Left are "de-platformed."

**We have never seen anything like what we are seeing today in America!**

The roots of our current crisis can be traced to the late 1960s when radicals who scorned America and its way of life began taking over our colleges and universities.

It took them several decades to cement their dominance over American higher education, but we are seeing the fruits of their labors today: we see it in the media, and we see it in Silicon Valley.

We are also seeing it in professional sports, in corporate America--much of which is now capitulating to far-Left demands--and increasingly in K-12 education.

**Liberty in America is under serious threat. As I travel around the country, worried citizens ask me if there is a way to meet this crisis. I never hesitate to say there is, despite how uphill the fight may seem.**

A vital part of the fight--and one in which Hillsdale College is uniquely able to lead--is to reach and teach additional millions of citizens with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty.

**You are making that fight possible by supporting our educational outreach efforts, such as _Imprimis_ , America's leading digest of liberty.**

Hillsdale launched _Imprimis_ over 50 years ago to promote limited government, free enterprise, individual rights, personal responsibility, and a strong national defense. Each issue covers a timely political, economic, or cultural issue from a constitutional perspective.

Today, with the far Left's dramatic escalation of its assault on free speech and informed patriotism, _Imprimis_ is more critical than ever.

Think of what we have seen in the last few years: unprecedented and unconstitutional lockdowns, lawless violence in our cities, and even the destruction of historical monuments.

On top of this, we are now seeing an escalation of the effort to shut off any debate about these issues--an effort to limit or curtail speech that is **simply** and **clearly un-American**.

There is a good reason that conservative radio and TV host Mark Levin says _Imprimis_ is the publication he most looks forward to reading each month.

You'll be pleased to know that its circulation has grown this year to more than 6.6 million. That's 6.6 million paper copies that are **mailed to homes and businesses** ten times per year.

Our research also shows that _Imprimis_ subscribers share their copy with two to three other people on average, giving _Imprimis_ even greater reach and influence.

And while a circulation of more than 6.6 million is undoubtedly impressive--_Imprimis_ has a greater circulation than the _Wall Street Journal_ and _The New York Times_ --we are determined to do more.

Since _Imprimis_ launched in 1972 with a circulation of about 1,000, **Hillsdale College has never charged for a subscription.**

**But the fact that we offer _Imprimis_ free of charge does not mean that producing and mailing _Imprimis_ is without cost. **

Even using non-profit postage rates, the price for printing and mailing each issue of _Imprimis_ to so many subscribers ten times a year is a significant financial undertaking.

**Our immediate goal is to increase the circulation of _Imprimis_ to over 7 million American households and businesses this year. To do so, we must address the question of production and mailing costs.**

Your generous support today will help us reach our _Imprimis_ goal and expand our other successful educational outreach efforts.

You know that education is liberty's surest defense--and that education is needed now more than ever!

That's why, in addition to _Imprimis_ , we are investing in our other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. We're doing this through our **[Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1556dba3c1294a4982575577d7984762&_e=fRmQkD4wVBhfQopgq4dJb0Ju2YMqU5OmCdoPKGewUeDvPfG0mJsIDLw6LaXssRJoPLFqOLRwB0y8xRuhcpd58Vy1VQlxM6mnms2g5zr9B_g2Gz9rmWHwpSJwpiekNPHjCjn_oZdNd1ubGPjeFSrLdfmS4ltKhW0tKe5TpS46dR67by5VECHLIStKxuaCttHgKQj1wlsKUmrIdANaaUGcRXegpiYDbQGkiSonCsHGcREHVknijIQjZeB_RxL6PJg-wkJH4hpLE6QZ7YNrYGj4GatNDQn-wPmloc9rpyr2mziaqZ1fExjvFDlmVQC17QZFVxfBCdI0FB0Xl8a1vsUyzaUc3c_oeg_JZiXUczLYo8cB9TL4eQIp16YYNgV2GwUs9lEgNFDeR-vKhX2CR3SBRw%3D%3D).**

These efforts include:

* **Educating millions of Americans, especially younger Americans, through free online courses** --on topics including the Constitution, American history, and free-market economics.

* **Providing hundreds of thousands of young Americans with free copies of the Declaration of Independence and Constitution** --Hillsdale has already distributed over 600,000 free copies of these founding documents, and we receive more requests every week.

* **Educating thousands of K-12 students** in Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 public and private schools--there are already more than 90 such schools across the country, each having a strong curricular component in American civics.

I hope you'll agree that after everything we've seen in the last few years, the need for _Imprimis_ and Hillsdale's other educational outreach efforts is undeniable.

Hillsdale is the only college in America equipped to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans about our nation's great heritage of liberty and about the need to defend freedom and limited government.

Almost unique among American colleges and universities, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation.

**This independence from the government also means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.**

[ Will you give generously to our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions** --which includes expanding the reach and influence of _Imprimis_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1556dba3c1294a4982575577d7984762&_e=fRmQkD4wVBhfQopgq4dJb0Ju2YMqU5OmCdoPKGewUeDvPfG0mJsIDLw6LaXssRJoPLFqOLRwB0y8xRuhcpd58Vy1VQlxM6mnms2g5zr9B_g2Gz9rmWHwpSJwpiekNPHjCjn_oZdNd1ubGPjeFSrLdfmS4ltKhW0tKe5TpS46dR67by5VECHLIStKxuaCttHgKQj1wlsKUmrIdANaaUGcRXegpiYDbQGkiSonCsHGcREHVknijIQjZeB_RxL6PJg-bnuFFuN5EY-lqG0mwZrl8qg-wl4qSOE9wihKQ-LcKmu-IQnDvSascQs6JQWg1PrKfxj4lP3qo1WM85IoIHqn-kys2lo0SumrUrbyzTYaU_TAppXNAI8DTJMn4QQPNtkfqgbiyjX1EZWcTBlZodrBgw%3D%3D)?

If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on American principles and the American way of life, please show your support for Hillsdale College with a generous tax-deductible gift today.

I hope you will stand with us as we engage the far Left, along with its media and Big Tech allies, on the battlefield of education.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

P.S. Liberty in America is under threat, and education is the only long-term solution. That's why we are greatly expanding our national educational outreach, such as _Imprimis_ , free online courses, K-12 curricula and support, and much more. And we need your help to do so! Please make a generous, tax-deductible gift in support of liberty and education at this secure link: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/defend-liberty](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1556dba3c1294a4982575577d7984762&_e=fRmQkD4wVBhfQopgq4dJb0Ju2YMqU5OmCdoPKGewUeDvPfG0mJsIDLw6LaXssRJoPLFqOLRwB0y8xRuhcpd58Vy1VQlxM6mnms2g5zr9B_g2Gz9rmWHwpSJwpiekNPHjCjn_oZdNd1ubGPjeFSrLdfmS4ltKhW0tKe5TpS46dR67by5VECHLIStKxuaCttHgKQj1wlsKUmrIdANaaUGcRXegpiYDbQGkiSonCsHGcREHVknijIQjZeB_RxL6PJg-au3CdMxz46glUIz2jwHTgSu7uzYqxPcZPk3KJrsfEkF5MWoEVWXQc1Y9axFhSppnkb5L3UqYAlVYyctLKcM8pl2IgZvFwtYB5rkZdVZn_lZ8y-rcAvXeXgkR0veY9n5kJ0ITFLnthMA4EI6CqMZf0A%3D%3D)**.

Thank you again for saving young people through education.

clean_body: We have never seen anything like what we are seeing today in America! This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Fellow American, Over the last year, the agenda of the far Left, along with its media and Big Tech allies, has become all too clear. Together, these forces want to circumvent the First Amendment, suppress conservative speech and political activity , and push their own false and dishonest narrative about American history and about what's happening today. More and more, stories that question the far-Left's narrative are dubiously "fact-checked" or censored outright, while conservative opponents of the Left are "de-platformed." We have never seen anything like what we are seeing today in America! The roots of our current crisis can be traced to the late 1960s when radicals who scorned America and its way of life began taking over our colleges and universities. It took them several decades to cement their dominance over American higher education, but we are seeing the fruits of their labors today: we see it in the media, and we see it in Silicon Valley. We are also seeing it in professional sports, in corporate America--much of which is now capitulating to far-Left demands--and increasingly in K-12 education. Liberty in America is under serious threat. As I travel around the country, worried citizens ask me if there is a way to meet this crisis. I never hesitate to say there is, despite how uphill the fight may seem. A vital part of the fight--and one in which Hillsdale College is uniquely able to lead--is to reach and teach additional millions of citizens with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. You are making that fight possible by supporting our educational outreach efforts, such as Imprimis , America's leading digest of liberty. Hillsdale launched Imprimis over 50 years ago to promote limited government, free enterprise, individual rights, personal responsibility, and a strong national defense. Each issue covers a timely political, economic, or cultural issue from a constitutional perspective. Today, with the far Left's dramatic escalation of its assault on free speech and informed patriotism, Imprimis is more critical than ever. Think of what we have seen in the last few years: unprecedented and unconstitutional lockdowns, lawless violence in our cities, and even the destruction of historical monuments. On top of this, we are now seeing an escalation of the effort to shut off any debate about these issues--an effort to limit or curtail speech that is simply and clearly un-American. There is a good reason that conservative radio and TV host Mark Levin says Imprimis is the publication he most looks forward to reading each month. You'll be pleased to know that its circulation has grown this year to more than 6.6 million. That's 6.6 million paper copies that are mailed to homes and businesses ten times per year. Our research also shows that Imprimis subscribers share their copy with two to three other people on average, giving Imprimis even greater reach and influence. And while a circulation of more than 6.6 million is undoubtedly impressive--Imprimis has a greater circulation than the Wall Street Journal and The New York Times --we are determined to do more. Since Imprimis launched in 1972 with a circulation of about 1,000, Hillsdale College has never charged for a subscription. But the fact that we offer Imprimis free of charge does not mean that producing and mailing Imprimis is without cost. Even using non-profit postage rates, the price for printing and mailing each issue of Imprimis to so many subscribers ten times a year is a significant financial undertaking. Our immediate goal is to increase the circulation of Imprimis to over 7 million American households and businesses this year. To do so, we must address the question of production and mailing costs. Your generous support today will help us reach our Imprimis goal and expand our other successful educational outreach efforts. You know that education is liberty's surest defense--and that education is needed now more than ever! That's why, in addition to Imprimis , we are investing in our other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. We're doing this through our . These efforts include: Educating millions of Americans, especially younger Americans, through free online courses --on topics including the Constitution, American history, and free-market economics. Providing hundreds of thousands of young Americans with free copies of the Declaration of Independence and Constitution --Hillsdale has already distributed over 600,000 free copies of these founding documents, and we receive more requests every week. Educating thousands of K-12 students in Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 public and private schools--there are already more than 90 such schools across the country, each having a strong curricular component in American civics. I hope you'll agree that after everything we've seen in the last few years, the need for Imprimis and Hillsdale's other educational outreach efforts is undeniable. Hillsdale is the only college in America equipped to reach and teach increasing millions of Americans about our nation's great heritage of liberty and about the need to defend freedom and limited government. Almost unique among American colleges and universities, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. This independence from the government also means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. ? If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on American principles and the American way of life, please show your support for Hillsdale College with a generous tax-deductible gift today. I hope you will stand with us as we engage the far Left, along with its media and Big Tech allies, on the battlefield of education. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 P.S. Liberty in America is under threat, and education is the only long-term solution. That's why we are greatly expanding our national educational outreach, such as Imprimis , free online courses, K-12 curricula and support, and much more. And we need your help to do so! Please make a generous, tax-deductible gift in support of liberty and education at this secure link: **. Thank you again for saving young people through education. | | Conservative Liberty Wire PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

# SUNDAY, AUGUST 25, 2024
---|---
**Good Morning**! On this date in 1944, Paris was liberated from Nazi occupation by the Free French Second Armored Division and the American Fourth Infantry, who were greeted by miles of "cheering, deliriously happy" Parisians. ([See Photos](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGOpiAURp8GO_7ABUcsKLaxm223NFe56N2gGGA08_ab_eupv-8kJ-fP5_yJnPjcfuNBvsU849r4ptlJ6CXY2XbBRyIg05HXA9h-NM6YbvdjXJZFBXToTFgiahqUxgERldPauo49KLDKQa8VKNCvgZYFqR_1hwl6cCCsosAtl9ffzGfbKabvfFN5rfnokt9bu6owvwRMAqbneV714LbXfDKeB27_bwKmnWvL5VvAFL4Kn5t8cklBPlgks2w7ycQLFWycT5mjvLBwlRVvCu81FjrXXa54ccMkY8mHDFRb-VrfiHZqdHa0RsDUFR-uh1Pi-jEIq7YDOb1128_xbg__AgAA__9KLXSx)) We hope this date in 2024 leaves you cheering and deliriously happy, too. Thanks for letting us be part of that endeavor! Thanks for reading today's edition of _The_ _Flyover._ If you have any thoughts about it, hit reply and give us a shout. ## Boeing Starliner to Return Without Astronauts
Boeing's Starliner will be [returning unmanned](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DGPhCAUBOBfgx0GHrpoQXGN3V57pUF8rO-CYIBdb__9xauv-5JJJpP5us93S4Hi49PuaKpPs3WVXjgPHHoO3dw1q_GIgKpBIzV0_agGpZrNjBZW0UsJo_SwSI1egQS86bF3XnvbkAEBnRiglwIEyFbjsljsR3lTq9QDsE7gSjXl9jtRrBv68E4vzK1LexPMVutRmPpgMDGYzvNsXVzcFTKYrmoGkxguX4q2WL4kpPjgpdocKGLmKzoqlCLPWJ85ctyP-ublsA5_uC01p2iftXAqpd3qHpps1uOkEKjcNOvEY7cU_vbU_995GfgNAAD__1AwZ5Y) from the International Space Station, leaving the two astronauts it delivered into orbit at ISS until February. NASA announced it would turn to Boeing-rival SpaceX to bring Butch Wilmore and Suni Williams home, extending their [planned 8-day mission](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsjz1vwyAUAH8NbFjw-LIHhi7Z0rWj9YyfY1psIkNi5d9X6dzphhtO93Udr5hy2m-fuFFoSxkxtvSksRdgBZjR8DksRECaU1AejB10rzVfg5US4uSMXZyiCaKzRg_zIhGicw6BpwASjOzBKgkSVOdpmpDsoJyele-BGUlzauXovkva20pLfpUnHV0sG89hbe1emf5gcGFwOc-ze-FaytsyuOx01jewoqj4qgJrO8qOj1ZFbY_4I-odIwnllTXSDL5b25b5Eeb7mXJO1Xlm5G3DlP967f_7Z4DfAAAA__9oDVwP) to about 8 months. The decision to return Wilmore and Williams on a different craft was made out of concern for their safety, due to issues with [Starliner's propulsion system](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj72OhCAYAJ8GujXwAYIFxTV2e-2Vhp_PlQuKUSLx7S979XaTTDLJ_Dynp0s5ba9vt6Ktc5lcqOnCyTxAPUBOkkY7IwIKipZrkGoQRgi6WC97EWIU3jNUwUQdhI7MO661n8EZmiwwkMyA4gwY8E6j9w7VwHsRuTZAJMOYajm635K2uuCc73Lh0YWy0myXWveTiC8CI4GxtdZ5H96OwLhhOwmM7qgpZHxjaLfUbbi3uBd62Li3lHM6e00ke60u5f9q_fx4WfgLAAD__wIbVA4).
## Kennedy Withdrawing from Swing State Ballots
After suspending his bid for president and endorsing former President Trump, Robert Kennedy Jr. said he would seek to remove his name from ballots in [ten battleground states](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj71uwyAYAJ8GtljwAbYZGLp4S9eOFj8fNi02kY1M06ev0rnbSSeddB_3-W5TTvvybjc0NZbZ-pounMcbqBvIWdJgIiKgoGj4AFJpMQpBV6M0Uy5o7iML0gEbIwrWC20jWoHoaTLAQLIRFGfAgHcDOmdRad6LwIcRiGQYUi1H91nSXleM-VkuPDpfNprNWuvjJOKNwERgaq11zvmXIzDt2E4Ckz1q8hlf6NtT4dd3bj9LoYcJj5ZyTmc_EMmWzab8V63_P14GfgMAAP__8SJUTw) where he might play the "spoiler" for Trump. Kennedy has successfully removed himself from the Arizona and Pennsylvania ballots, but he'll face challenges in Michigan, Nevada, and Wisconsin, at least. As the nominee for the Natural Law Party, Kennedy can't be removed from the Michigan ballot, according to state policies. Kennedy has also missed the deadline for withdrawing from Nevada's ballot, and the [Wisconsin Election Commission](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FuwyAUQNGvgQ0LHhDjgaGLt3TtaIH9SEixQZiE9u-rdu58pSudj-tydTHF4_budrQt5MWtLb5wMQw0A7UoutmACCgpWjGC0pM0UtK79ei9x9UjGh-84TJM2psNxaRAa3Q0WuCguAEtOHAQw4jeO9STuMhNjAaI4rjFluvwyPFodwzpO7-wDmveabL31spJ5BuBmcDcex9C_rocuf92AvOB_SQw1_DJHpWtbi8u3g7W6nMv7HyWkmuj1W6lx5TieRmJ4rfdxfT3b_9rXxZ-AgAA__85rFk4) will vote this week on whether to accept Kennedy's access filing.
## List: Oldest Building in Every U.S. State
A [fascinating new list ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2OpDAQBp_GZEZ2t81P4OCkEdHNhXchMrgZ-mRghHtZ7duvZuINv6-SUv27j_fImffHn7hRkOUY4yx80dhp8Brc6KoUFiIgrCjYFpzvsUOs1pD6PkUPhN76KTY2deS6xnZuiYDNPFccwIAzHXhrwICtW5qmSL63DSbbdqCcocRynPX_g3dZaclfx0VnPR9blcMq8iwKfykYFAxyxotyHfMhL_56VtqoKBjQ6ImK6LLFnPXMwlQ071pW0h87CyVdJAoVra3H3iocisKbtwoaLr-P_aHwZt7jL53Cc8wKb7Y6Q3p-cs5cmlY589gi57eb_FzqCvAdAAD__yzZaQ0)of the oldest building in every state follows the westward expansion of the nation, from 17-century stone buildings in the original colonies to 19th century log cabins west of the Mississippi. The oldest inhabited structures actually date back to native Americans villages in the 12th century, including New Mexico's Acoma Pueblo and the Cliff Palace in Colorado. The oldest building from colonial times is believed to be Virginia's Jamestown Church, built in 1639, along with Pennsylvania's 1640 Swedish Cabin and Delaware's Block House from 1654. In the West, an assortment of log cabins, forts, ranches, and missions are among the oldest structures, dating from roughly 1810 through the 1850s. [You can see the state-by-state list here.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2OpDAQBp_GZEZ2t81P4OCkEdHNhXchMrgZ-mRghHtZ7duvZuINv6-SUv27j_fImffHn7hRkOUY4yx80dhp8Brc6KoUFiIgrCjYFpzvsUOs1pD6PkUPhN76KTY2deS6xnZuiYDNPFccwIAzHXhrwICtW5qmSL63DSbbdqCcocRynPX_g3dZaclfx0VnPR9blcMq8iwKfykYFAxyxotyHfMhL_56VtqoKBjQ6ImK6LLFnPXMwlQ071pW0h87CyVdJAoVra3H3iocisKbtwoaLr-P_aHwZt7jL53Cc8wKb7Y6Q3p-cs5cmlY589gi57eb_FzqCvAdAAD__yzZaQ0)

On this date in 1944, Paris was liberated from Nazi occupation by the Free French Second Armored Division and the American Fourth Infantry, who were greeted by miles of "cheering, deliriously happy" Parisians. () We hope this date in 2024 leaves you cheering and deliriously happy, too. Thanks for letting us be part of that endeavor! Thanks for reading today's edition of The Flyover. If you have any thoughts about it, hit reply and give us a shout. We love hearing from our readers. We're sponsored today by Advanced Bionutritionals. Can your collagen pass this simple 10-second kitchen test? | Boeing Starliner to Return Without Astronauts Boeing's Starliner will be from the International Space Station, leaving the two astronauts it delivered into orbit at ISS until February. NASA announced it would turn to Boeing-rival SpaceX to bring Butch Wilmore and Suni Williams home, extending their to about 8 months. The decision to return Wilmore and Williams on a different craft was made out of concern for their safety, due to issues with . Kennedy Withdrawing from Swing State Ballots After suspending his bid for president and endorsing former President Trump, Robert Kennedy Jr. said he would seek to remove his name from ballots in where he might play the "spoiler" for Trump. Kennedy has successfully removed himself from the Arizona and Pennsylvania ballots, but he'll face challenges in Michigan, Nevada, and Wisconsin, at least. As the nominee for the Natural Law Party, Kennedy can't be removed from the Michigan ballot, according to state policies. Kennedy has also missed the deadline for withdrawing from Nevada's ballot, and the will vote this week on whether to accept Kennedy's access filing. List: Oldest Building in Every U.S. State A the oldest building in every state follows the westward expansion of the nation, from 17-century stone buildings in the original colonies to 19th century log cabins west of the Mississippi. The oldest inhabited structures actually date back to native Americans villages in the 12th century, including New Mexico's Acoma Pueblo and the Cliff Palace in Colorado. The oldest building from colonial times is believed to be Virginia's Jamestown Church, built in 1639, along with Pennsylvania's 1640 Swedish Cabin and Delaware's Block House from 1654. In the West, an assortment of log cabins, forts, ranches, and missions are among the oldest structures, dating from roughly 1810 through the 1850s. name: Hillsdale College via Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Liberty Under Threat
body:
We have never seen anything like what we are seeing today in America!

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3f246a8e8692470bba41dfcbd17b961b&_e=AjVz20Juguz_GSZ4pw-huBOF9alI54z0dJ9OcEYjqdMODMX6QuNBKa75exLiNe-q74SvhqYt7YX04l1glbo54gWTJBORIFc-yS1VZ5TqdAWgrEO3NNNxPzX7cC0_NEPhXVsH8KPNJmnpFrfEqcri6sgP--ohwMexckZoTQRgvmkyjEy2ZAQjcZ4Ml-8zejxsv0KXhbwV_GWg-wauEZz4OKQZrY88xBXu8Aqztt4Qbm0ihexeNdI06uJ17MWKuhz1sOV3BaYcTOcK4T9y5rNY4Dzqft5TnGBbltCG45NXo-oPIpuh7JpBuJRm18UPWSfKmXaxLIeK-WMgqCKS-qhDtRBXSFvSLiAvAjNqC99EdkXcvvYYl5JMHckliuCUSWBz_HNuytkyGLyx2lP6YN-DsA%3D%3D)
---
| | Fellow American,

Over the last year, the agenda of the far Left, along with its media and Big Tech allies, has become all too clear.

Together, these forces want to **circumvent the First Amendment, suppress conservative speech and political activity** , and push their own **false** and **dishonest** narrative about American history and about what's happening today.

More and more, stories that question the far-Left's narrative are dubiously "fact-checked" or censored outright, while conservative opponents of the Left are "de-platformed."

**We have never seen anything like what we are seeing today in America!**

The roots of our current crisis can be traced to the late 1960s when radicals who scorned America and its way of life began taking over our colleges and universities.

It took them several decades to cement their dominance over American higher education, but we are seeing the fruits of their labors today: we see it in the media, and we see it in Silicon Valley.

We are also seeing it in professional sports, in corporate America--much of which is now capitulating to far-Left demands--and increasingly in K-12 education.

**Liberty in America is under serious threat. As I travel around the country, worried citizens ask me if there is a way to meet this crisis. I never hesitate to say there is, despite how uphill the fight may seem.**

A vital part of the fight--and one in which Hillsdale College is uniquely able to lead--is to reach and teach additional millions of citizens with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty.

**You are making that fight possible by supporting our educational outreach efforts, such as _Imprimis_ , America's leading digest of liberty.**

Hillsdale launched _Imprimis_ over 50 years ago to promote limited government, free enterprise, individual rights, personal responsibility, and a strong national defense. Each issue covers a timely political, economic, or cultural issue from a constitutional perspective.

Today, with the far Left's dramatic escalation of its assault on free speech and informed patriotism, _Imprimis_ is more critical than ever.

Think of what we have seen in the last few years: unprecedented and unconstitutional lockdowns, lawless violence in our cities, and even the destruction of historical monuments.

On top of this, we are now seeing an escalation of the effort to shut off any debate about these issues--an effort to limit or curtail speech that is **simply** and **clearly un-American**.

There is a good reason that conservative radio and TV host Mark Levin says _Imprimis_ is the publication he most looks forward to reading each month.

You'll be pleased to know that its circulation has grown this year to more than 6.6 million. That's 6.6 million paper copies that are **mailed to homes and businesses** ten times per year.

Our research also shows that _Imprimis_ subscribers share their copy with two to three other people on average, giving _Imprimis_ even greater reach and influence.

And while a circulation of more than 6.6 million is undoubtedly impressive--_Imprimis_ has a greater circulation than the _Wall Street Journal_ and _The New York Times_ --we are determined to do more.

Since _Imprimis_ launched in 1972 with a circulation of about 1,000, **Hillsdale College has never charged for a subscription.**

**But the fact that we offer _Imprimis_ free of charge does not mean that producing and mailing _Imprimis_ is without cost. **

Even using non-profit postage rates, the price for printing and mailing each issue of _Imprimis_ to so many subscribers ten times a year is a significant financial undertaking.

**Our immediate goal is to increase the circulation of _Imprimis_ to over 7 million American households and businesses this year. To do so, we must address the question of production and mailing costs.**

Your generous support today will help us reach our _Imprimis_ goal and expand our other successful educational outreach efforts.

You know that education is liberty's surest defense--and that education is needed now more than ever!

That's why, in addition to _Imprimis_ , we are investing in our other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. We're doing this through our **[Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3f246a8e8692470bba41dfcbd17b961b&_e=AjVz20Juguz_GSZ4pw-huBOF9alI54z0dJ9OcEYjqdMODMX6QuNBKa75exLiNe-q74SvhqYt7YX04l1glbo54gWTJBORIFc-yS1VZ5TqdAWgrEO3NNNxPzX7cC0_NEPhXVsH8KPNJmnpFrfEqcri6sgP--ohwMexckZoTQRgvmkyjEy2ZAQjcZ4Ml-8zejxsv0KXhbwV_GWg-wauEZz4OKQZrY88xBXu8Aqztt4Qbm0ihexeNdI06uJ17MWKuhz1JLQnUGxvVagDJ5MF3kQauuq_jSLQhF92w7oS7A5aRIBPF1pKsMDgQ9wRHzZrQOeGMsfWu0NRE3SAkJxz2cegDvh372spi8p0NDjAYb8WT_Y60gG1L5eWN_YqWmL1wb_IxJEA8InSfpCwcuuJQyo_0w%3D%3D).**

These efforts include:

* **Educating millions of Americans, especially younger Americans, through free online courses** --on topics including the Constitution, American history, and free-market economics.

* **Providing hundreds of thousands of young Americans with free copies of the Declaration of Independence and Constitution** --Hillsdale has already distributed over 600,000 free copies of these founding documents, and we receive more requests every week.

* **Educating thousands of K-12 students** in Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 public and private schools--there are already more than 90 such schools across the country, each having a strong curricular component in American civics.

I hope you'll agree that after everything we've seen in the last few years, the need for _Imprimis_ and Hillsdale's other educational outreach efforts is undeniable.

Hillsdale is the only college in America equipped to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans about our nation's great heritage of liberty and about the need to defend freedom and limited government.

Almost unique among American colleges and universities, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation.

**This independence from the government also means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.**

[ Will you give generously to our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions** --which includes expanding the reach and influence of _Imprimis_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3f246a8e8692470bba41dfcbd17b961b&_e=AjVz20Juguz_GSZ4pw-huBOF9alI54z0dJ9OcEYjqdMODMX6QuNBKa75exLiNe-q74SvhqYt7YX04l1glbo54gWTJBORIFc-yS1VZ5TqdAWgrEO3NNNxPzX7cC0_NEPhXVsH8KPNJmnpFrfEqcri6sgP--ohwMexckZoTQRgvmkyjEy2ZAQjcZ4Ml-8zejxsv0KXhbwV_GWg-wauEZz4OKQZrY88xBXu8Aqztt4Qbm0ihexeNdI06uJ17MWKuhz1xal5JDOWVMh8woPyG0ceZup-6ZsFq3JP_p_QJ--4EiokQaJexPEvbwjRl3jfj6HldUGjNZo7oXEtyHJvreA01yt4yHNOZ-o-vDVp0rKLcfTLahns0lw_4rxT9qKvqiEl9dGP9aeQ0cP_o3aKmti71w%3D%3D)?

If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on American principles and the American way of life, please show your support for Hillsdale College with a generous tax-deductible gift today.

I hope you will stand with us as we engage the far Left, along with its media and Big Tech allies, on the battlefield of education.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

P.S. Liberty in America is under threat, and education is the only long-term solution. That's why we are greatly expanding our national educational outreach, such as _Imprimis_ , free online courses, K-12 curricula and support, and much more. And we need your help to do so! clean_body: We have never seen anything like what we are seeing today in America! This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Fellow American, Over the last year, the agenda of the far Left, along with its media and Big Tech allies, has become all too clear. Together, these forces want to circumvent the First Amendment, suppress conservative speech and political activity , and push their own false and dishonest narrative about American history and about what's happening today. More and more, stories that question the far-Left's narrative are dubiously "fact-checked" or censored outright, while conservative opponents of the Left are "de-platformed." We have never seen anything like what we are seeing today in America! The roots of our current crisis can be traced to the late 1960s when radicals who scorned America and its way of life began taking over our colleges and universities. It took them several decades to cement their dominance over American higher education, but we are seeing the fruits of their labors today: we see it in the media, and we see it in Silicon Valley. We are also seeing it in professional sports, in corporate America--much of which is now capitulating to far-Left demands--and increasingly in K-12 education. Liberty in America is under serious threat. As I travel around the country, worried citizens ask me if there is a way to meet this crisis. I never hesitate to say there is, despite how uphill the fight may seem. A vital part of the fight--and one in which Hillsdale College is uniquely able to lead--is to reach and teach additional millions of citizens with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. You are making that fight possible by supporting our educational outreach efforts, such as Imprimis , America's leading digest of liberty. Hillsdale launched Imprimis over 50 years ago to promote limited government, free enterprise, individual rights, personal responsibility, and a strong national defense. Each issue covers a timely political, economic, or cultural issue from a constitutional perspective. Today, with the far Left's dramatic escalation of its assault on free speech and informed patriotism, Imprimis is more critical than ever. Think of what we have seen in the last few years: unprecedented and unconstitutional lockdowns, lawless violence in our cities, and even the destruction of historical monuments. On top of this, we are now seeing an escalation of the effort to shut off any debate about these issues--an effort to limit or curtail speech that is simply and clearly un-American. There is a good reason that conservative radio and TV host Mark Levin says Imprimis is the publication he most looks forward to reading each month. You'll be pleased to know that its circulation has grown this year to more than 6.6 million. That's 6.6 million paper copies that are mailed to homes and businesses ten times per year. Our research also shows that Imprimis subscribers share their copy with two to three other people on average, giving Imprimis even greater reach and influence. And while a circulation of more than 6.6 million is undoubtedly impressive--Imprimis has a greater circulation than the Wall Street Journal and The New York Times --we are determined to do more. Since Imprimis launched in 1972 with a circulation of about 1,000, Hillsdale College has never charged for a subscription. But the fact that we offer Imprimis free of charge does not mean that producing and mailing Imprimis is without cost. Even using non-profit postage rates, the price for printing and mailing each issue of Imprimis to so many subscribers ten times a year is a significant financial undertaking. Our immediate goal is to increase the circulation of Imprimis to over 7 million American households and businesses this year. To do so, we must address the question of production and mailing costs. Your generous support today will help us reach our Imprimis goal and expand our other successful educational outreach efforts. You know that education is liberty's surest defense--and that education is needed now more than ever! That's why, in addition to Imprimis , we are investing in our other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. We're doing this through our . These efforts include: Educating millions of Americans, especially younger Americans, through free online courses --on topics including the Constitution, American history, and free-market economics. Providing hundreds of thousands of young Americans with free copies of the Declaration of Independence and Constitution --Hillsdale has already distributed over 600,000 free copies of these founding documents, and we receive more requests every week. Educating thousands of K-12 students in Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 public and private schools--there are already more than 90 such schools across the country, each having a strong curricular component in American civics. I hope you'll agree that after everything we've seen in the last few years, the need for Imprimis and Hillsdale's other educational outreach efforts is undeniable. name: House Republicans
subject: Do you think Harris is TOO LIBERAL to be president?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Now that Kamala Harris is officially the Democrat Nominee, we have some serious questions to ask:

| |

---
| | | THE HILL:
**Harris is the second-most liberal Democratic senator to serve in the Senate in the 21st century.**
* * *

Hello,

This story just confirmed what we already knew - Kamala Harris is an ultra-Liberal candidate that will DESTROY our country if given the chance. We know the Democrat Machine is scrambling to cover up her Liberal record and fool undecided voters.

But we also know that well-informed folks like you see right through it.

**_[So now that Kamala Harris is officially the Democrat Nominee, we have some serious questions to ask:](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2za1itrv4kh8tm5ajvsddi7mg4reqg8mfd3suma7g_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1clie1o36c3h2bs "Now that Kamala Harris is officially the Democrat Nominee, we have some serious questions to ask:")_**

---
_1\. Do you agree that Kamala Harris is TOO LIBERAL to be President?_ **[**YES >>**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zs8c7hie77in2m0r7bhgjeegkid3urtn3353cnqo_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1clie1o36c3h2bs) [**NO >>**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z2ld35tfvki6gas2n4k63a6dsse8vcce14to2vvg_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1clie1o36c3h2bs)** _2\. Do you support her proposal of Soviet-era price fixes?_ **[**YES >>**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zoqdh0qncr5q12k5sdlj7ocvdn2bi73t1l7t8bu8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1clie1o36c3h2bs) [**NO >>**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zqh01q1fot89jd0tkugis14uoo1tfu0jcrngmtlg_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1clie1o36c3h2bs)**_3\. Do you support her goal to grant mass amnesty to millions of illegals?_ **[**YES >>**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z8a2iu0ejdeq7if1pn5pbhg45q9k9a38r3251ko8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1clie1o36c3h2bs) [**NO >>**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z3vvms85vfol41qaghsd427kns1stccd7lbaf7vg_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1clie1o36c3h2bs)**_4\. Do you support her efforts to gut the Second Amendment?_ **[**YES >>**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z5p1rsefa7rhfjguoska9n23ioa53gjpkevcdbpo_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1clie1o36c3h2bs) [**NO >>**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zf22o06thohtp5frq2vafl53b2df3dfpvlc37qe0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1clie1o36c3h2bs)**_5\. Will you chip in just $5 or $10 to help Republicans SAVE the House Majority, RETAKE the Senate, and FIRE Kamala Harris once and for all?_ **[**YES >>**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zmtqhq55m3flgml47ach2sndvindo71hodhjlo3o_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1clie1o36c3h2bs) [**NO >>**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4u4snccjlth6ui04e2k1535luoiifn67rdsjvag_rp22sh2s8i6eoj1clie1o36c3h2bs)**
---

Our country is in NO position to leave a Harris presidency to chance, so we're asking you to respond as soon as possible.

Thanks for all you do,
House GOP

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8d3c35ba-58bf-4e2d-8a37-ae800ffcd05d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: The Federalist Wire
subject: Donald Trump was just handed terrible news out of this swing state that could cost him the election
body:
DAILY NEWS | August 25, 2024

Donald Trump was just
handed terrible news out of this swing state that could cost him
the election
Trump's
reelection chances have taken a major hit. He's going to have to
fight tooth and nail to win back the White House.

And Donald Trump was just handed
terrible news out of this swing state that could cost him the
election.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

The Trump campaign is
stunned after Trump rival announces their support behind the
former president

Politics can bring
about all sorts of shocking twists and turns. But no one was
ready for this.
➞ Continue Reading

News outlet reveals Biden
allies kept this one secret about the president from Americans

For years Democrats
have tried to protect Joe Biden. This has been the case even when
he's been involved in corrupt behavior.
➞ Continue Reading

Trump's newly announced
plans as commander-in-chief spark fear in the eyes of the Left

Donald Trump knows
how to get under the skin of Democrats. It's by simply creating
policy proposals that are the antithesis of what they believe in.

➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

City: Leesburg
State: Virginia
Zip Code: 20176
Contact Email:
today@thefederalistwire.com

body:
| **_“[Sherrod Brown is] one of two Democratic senators defending a state former President Donald Trump carried in 2020.”_** [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/76117?t=6&akid=16377%2E878179%2ET8mkrJ)
* * *
Folks, Ohio’s Senate race is a MUST WIN.

**_If_** we don’t shore up enough support for Brown to win reelection, we can consider our _at-risk_ Democratic Senate Majority **GONE for GOOD**.

**_But IF_** 150 more strong Democrats (like you) donate $7, we’ll have the BEST chance to crush the GOP and their fascist plans leaving ZERO chance for MAGA control!! [**Will you stand with us and pitch in $7 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to protect our Democratic Senate Majority from crumbling? The LAST thing we can afford is a MAGA takeover – Sherrod Brown is the key piece to our Democratic Majority, team! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/76118?t=7&akid=16377%2E878179%2ET8mkrJ) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/76119?t=8&akid=16377%2E878179%2ET8mkrJ)

Team Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=16377%2E878179%2ET8mkrJ). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=16377%2E878179%2ET8mkrJ).**

name: Dan Osborn
subject: why I was fired
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Adam for Colorado
body:
As president of our local union, I led the strike.
_[Click here to stop receiving emails about Dan Osborn's campaign in Nebraska from us.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91470369/493977370/1647001491?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjQwOTI4ZC1kOTYyLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4OfVw0iLrSaDaePunXy4xNlilTM3WNi7ipj5xyGNc2M=&emci=17175aae-4062-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&emdi=9640928d-d962-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&ceid=19445147)_
Hey there,
In October 2021, I had been an employee of Kellogg’s for almost 18 years.
I had dropped out of college and gone to work for the company after my wife got pregnant. Life’s easy when all you gotta do is take care of yourself – but we had diapers to buy and needed health insurance for our growing family.
When I applied in 2004, there were 6 positions and 600 applications. Working at Kellogg’s promised to be a lifelong career. A good-paying job that afforded me the opportunity to become a homeowner, let my wife stay home with the kids, live decently, retire some day, and hopefully live happily ever after.
But over the years, wages became a two-tier system. New workers were being paid less than workers had made decades earlier. Cost of living adjustments weren’t keeping up anywhere near inflation. Retirement and health insurance plans had been gutted. It just wasn’t right. They were making record profits – and doing it off the backs of workers.
**So in October 2021, we walked out. And as president of our local union, I led the strike.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91470370/493977371/92586991?refcode=em20240825am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=9640928d-d962-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjQwOTI4ZC1kOTYyLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4OfVw0iLrSaDaePunXy4xNlilTM3WNi7ipj5xyGNc2M=)
It was the first time many of us had ever walked a picket line. It was cold, but we were determined to hold our lines even through the dead of the winter if we had to. Every worker knew we were a part of something bigger than ourselves. We were in a fight for the future of the American middle class.
After 11 weeks, and the company threatening to permanently replace every union worker, we reached an agreement. More importantly, we saved 500 good-paying jobs here in Nebraska alone.
It was one of the proudest moments of my life.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91470371/493977372/92586991?refcode=em20240825am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=9640928d-d962-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjQwOTI4ZC1kOTYyLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4OfVw0iLrSaDaePunXy4xNlilTM3WNi7ipj5xyGNc2M=)
Following the strike, I was fired. The company has its version of events for why, but I believe it was because I was union president. Someone had to pay – and my head was on the chopping block.
It’s easy to let yourself get beaten down by life. To let big corporations and the politicians they own in Washington make all the decisions – and just accept that that’s how things will always be. But that’s not me.
**Instead, I’ve decided to run against one of the most corporate politicians – U.S. Senator Republican Deb Fischer – and with your help, we are going to defeat her.**
FOUR polls now show me neck-and-neck with Republican Deb Fischer, and in one poll, I am even LEADING her by 2 points.
**I am ready to take on Republican Senator Deb Fischer just like I took on Kellogg’s. But I sure as hell am not going to take money from corporate PACs, so I need grassroots donors like you to give now if we’re going to win this Senate seat.**
**[Please, will you make a donation to my campaign for U.S. Senate right now – whatever you can afford – to help me defeat Republican Deb Fischer and win this Senate seat in November?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91470372/493977373/92586991?refcode=em20240825am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=9640928d-d962-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjQwOTI4ZC1kOTYyLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4OfVw0iLrSaDaePunXy4xNlilTM3WNi7ipj5xyGNc2M=)**

clean_body: As president of our local union, I led the strike. Hey there, In October 2021, I had been an employee of Kellogg’s for almost 18 years. I had dropped out of college and gone to work for the company after my wife got pregnant. Life’s easy when all you gotta do is take care of yourself – but we had diapers to buy and needed health insurance for our growing family. When I applied in 2004, there were 6 positions and 600 applications. Working at Kellogg’s promised to be a lifelong career. A good-paying job that afforded me the opportunity to become a homeowner, let my wife stay home with the kids, live decently, retire some day, and hopefully live happily ever after. But over the years, wages became a two-tier system. New workers were being paid less than workers had made decades earlier. Cost of living adjustments weren’t keeping up anywhere near inflation. Retirement and health insurance plans had been gutted. It just wasn’t right. They were making record profits – and doing it off the backs of workers. So in October 2021, we walked out. And as president of our local union, I led the strike. = It was the first time many of us had ever walked a picket line. It was cold, but we were determined to hold our lines even through the dead of the winter if we had to. Every worker knew we were a part of something bigger than ourselves. We were in a fight for the future of the American middle class. After 11 weeks, and the company threatening to permanently replace every union worker, we reached an agreement. More importantly, we saved 500 good-paying jobs here in Nebraska alone. It was one of the proudest moments of my life. = Following the strike, I was fired. The company has its version of events for why, but I believe it was because I was union president. Someone had to pay – and my head was on the chopping block. It’s easy to let yourself get beaten down by life. To let big corporations and the politicians they own in Washington make all the decisions – and just accept that that’s how things will always be. But that’s not me. Instead, I’ve decided to run against one of the most corporate politicians – U.S. Senator Republican Deb Fischer – and with your help, we are going to defeat her. FOUR polls now show me neck-and-neck with Republican Deb Fischer, and in one poll, I am even LEADING her by 2 points. I am ready to take on Republican Senator Deb Fischer just like I took on Kellogg’s. But I sure as hell am not going to take money from corporate PACs, so I need grassroots donors like you to give now if we’re going to win this Senate seat. = Please use the links in this email to start a weekly donation through ActBlue: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I believe we can win this race and keep up the fight for the American middle class. I’m counting on your support to win. Thank you, Dan Osborn ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. Adam for Colorado PO Box 1240 Glenwood Springs, CO 81602 United States Contributions or gifts to Adam for Colorado are not tax deductible.

Friend, I’ve been around the block a few times, so it takes a lot to catch me off guard. But lemme tell ya – I just got off the phone, and **I almost fell out of my chair when I heard the bad news about Jacky Rosen’s Senate race in Nevada. **Here’s where we started:** Political experts from _The Washington Post_ to _CNN_ ranked Jacky Rosen’s seat in Nevada among the most vulnerable in the entire country. MAGA Republicans are only one battleground seat away from taking back control of the Senate, **so they made unseating Jacky a TOP priority.**
**Here’s what happened:** Donald Trump and national Republicans unleashed wave after wave of attacks against Jacky. Trump even singled out Nevada’s Senate race during his RNC speech to ridicule her – and ever since, right-wing billionaires have poured millions of dollars more into Nevada to flip it red.
**Here’s where we are now:** Their attacks are ramping up, and the GOP’s ads are now drowning out Jacky on the airwaves – **just when Democrats need to surge in this MUST-WIN battleground state that the polls say is in a statistical tie.**
**There’s no pretty way to put it: We need to turn this around STAT ... or we’re TOTALLY COOKED.** Nevada’s last Senate race was decided by just 7,928 votes – so if Jacky’s opponent gets away with misleading persuadable swing voters at this rate, Democrats don’t stand a chance in hell of keeping our Senate majority.
**Jacky desperately needs to combat the GOP’s lies and spread her message to every corner of Nevada, so her team set an ambitious goal to raise another $75,000 TODAY to help scale up her advertising program ASAP. But with hours to go until her next invoice is due, she’s falling dangerously behind.[I’m counting on you to step up and help us at this critical moment. PLEASE will you chip in $5 so Jacky Rosen can win in Nevada and protect our fragile Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91470905/493978081/1398942472?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=5&refcode=jtk4640-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzU2MTQ0MC1kYTYyLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7AMKqxPSDKBG8s9HAYcrFy5GwF-OqQY3ih0mYx-zkzA=)**

name: Newt Gingrich
subject: Eric Hovde > Tammy Baldwin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hovde for Wisconsin
body:
We’re in the final months of the 2024 cycle. We cannot afford to fall short here. | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ee4d78c706464f508a8f23300e113926&_e=rG4R2jtzTd4grnFFaq2748qqQkuLHXYdiacxN78gSmYm_SVSBilGNDmLJBEkQh3UR_kaTOwQj7yPwdQj8lx_KGIX8bTl4lmFikWf2AcMa7Ldtiu63xN47199KpGmztmyrzpgpjLYKMsakNAYMkTsHyX6W8KyBKQMT7hvsbQ5aj048sdeqb-ovmWMEam_P9IEyIDqq_6h98J_tvw-fNioAinP8dlWxH70WuAe-J4Yh6Oz5LD1b4zb0UWoJ998Y9nlK_SQX_S1XLT3qYMxGlbI2D8jU05oMElLCQrelhrbSVbXGGoO24p8Tp2Y9zWWSAW0fgcphh4gXEPaeaUulpzFk0WDZQ9ianQ7OYYNjS1ElRqcFHygdTokrqNoz1-XGC3vgplvJeLF7Yn4pi-v3ZZbYV_ViGRkw-ENSA03X4v0VZo%3D)

---
Peter,

30 years ago, I helped usher in a Republican takeover of the House of Representatives.

Today, I am asking you to help us bring about the same change in the United States Senate. One place that we can pick up a seat is via Eric Hovde in Wisconsin.

**Republicans have the BEST map they’ve had in a decade in the Senate. There are 7 opportunities for us to FLIP Democrat held seats.**

In a moment I am going to ask you to join me in sending your personal endorsement to Eric Hovde but let me tell you why Eric Hovde and Wisconsin should be on your radar in the final months of this cycle.

Eric Hovde is a born entrepreneur. Unlike his far-Left opponent, Tammy Baldwin, who has spent over three decades in Washington, he’s built a business.

But that’s not all – Eric has also dedicated his time to help troubled community banks. He’s helped vulnerable children by providing shelter and care in Wisconsin and around the world.

He represents the type of compassion that Callista and I have worked hard to promote through faith and hard work. I know he’d make an amazing United States Senator – but right now, he’s been outraised and outspent by Senate Democrats and liberal dark money Super PACs determined to send Tammy Baldwin back for a third term.

So here’s my ask, Peter. _**Will you support someone who wants to RESTORE THE AMERICAN DREAM, or let one of Kamala’s closest and most reliable supporters return to the Senate?**_

| [**SEND YOUR ENDORSEMENT
FOR ERIC HOVDE >>**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ee4d78c706464f508a8f23300e113926&_e=rG4R2jtzTd4grnFFaq2748qqQkuLHXYdiacxN78gSmYm_SVSBilGNDmLJBEkQh3UR_kaTOwQj7yPwdQj8lx_KGIX8bTl4lmFikWf2AcMa7Ldtiu63xN47199KpGmztmyrzpgpjLYKMsakNAYMkTsHyX6W8KyBKQMT7hvsbQ5aj048sdeqb-ovmWMEam_P9IEyIDqq_6h98J_tvw-fNioAinP8dlWxH70WuAe-J4Yh6Oz5LD1b4zb0UWoJ998Y9nlHhaRCaiPyxoIIEtnvobi3HU41TC1RL2GvJw7hv4iPOFX37GmBrxHpfhr9OJj_zoYUhG83sqQWr-dFG0wfJ6PMtER3FAtXtencr_WGhN-RXH9Ih30v3M3SYnZ3h_lzT7zQI5zfuPL5GfWJQeEp5WeerSfe8BLYQEjP7DmM_wr06uWHA9q8wlh7sdp1VmVjArE)
---

Eric is putting the same tenacity to running for Senate as he has when he was building his businesses, **but he cannot do this alone**. If he has any chance overcoming the millions flooding into one of the most important states for the road to the White House, he’ll need the support of every conservative like you – [**even if it’s just a couple of bucks.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ee4d78c706464f508a8f23300e113926&_e=rG4R2jtzTd4grnFFaq2748qqQkuLHXYdiacxN78gSmYm_SVSBilGNDmLJBEkQh3UR_kaTOwQj7yPwdQj8lx_KGIX8bTl4lmFikWf2AcMa7Ldtiu63xN47199KpGmztmyrzpgpjLYKMsakNAYMkTsHyX6W8KyBKQMT7hvsbQ5aj048sdeqb-ovmWMEam_P9IEyIDqq_6h98J_tvw-fNioAinP8dlWxH70WuAe-J4Yh6Oz5LD1b4zb0UWoJ998Y9nlK_SQX_S1XLT3qYMxGlbI2G2BFJtri6WhQ-OATjyKSJodtED09PPj55lG4KBUr30WTNly1dbDfx4kdNs6Pr9ccYMJabtH-moLXtZlgSpiP4jy8oVLzk-fnM9ZdQ6sL4Heah0Hib3IOF7YQpXXYQKjMRuV-bJP-qJTEQW155uEMUw%3D)

[**So, Peter, are you with me? Will you join me in supporting Eric Hovde to retire a career politician in the bag for the Harris-Walz agenda?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ee4d78c706464f508a8f23300e113926&_e=rG4R2jtzTd4grnFFaq2748qqQkuLHXYdiacxN78gSmYm_SVSBilGNDmLJBEkQh3UR_kaTOwQj7yPwdQj8lx_KGIX8bTl4lmFikWf2AcMa7Ldtiu63xN47199KpGmztmyrzpgpjLYKMsakNAYMkTsHyX6W8KyBKQMT7hvsbQ5aj048sdeqb-ovmWMEam_P9IEyIDqq_6h98J_tvw-fNioAinP8dlWxH70WuAe-J4Yh6Oz5LD1b4zb0UWoJ998Y9nlK_SQX_S1XLT3qYMxGlbI2B7i6cOTpd6hRnwhNFqeM2-LRY53ThS_l_qIPbmTUpvNWU-_MP2s-UXdmeCx6_nQid5FRtZVW3hAMHIOsNIICTtEughRdOZFmulOHLNjXD-pLM1k0caTZAc12D1cozwUR63pvt4AVBcqbbtplW-25SA%3D)

_I hope you are._

Until next time,

Newt Gingrich

[**SEND YOUR ENDORSEMENT
FOR ERIC HOVDE >>**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ee4d78c706464f508a8f23300e113926&_e=rG4R2jtzTd4grnFFaq2748qqQkuLHXYdiacxN78gSmYm_SVSBilGNDmLJBEkQh3UR_kaTOwQj7yPwdQj8lx_KGIX8bTl4lmFikWf2AcMa7Ldtiu63xN47199KpGmztmyrzpgpjLYKMsakNAYMkTsHyX6W8KyBKQMT7hvsbQ5aj048sdeqb-ovmWMEam_P9IEyIDqq_6h98J_tvw-fNioAinP8dlWxH70WuAe-J4Yh6Oz5LD1b4zb0UWoJ998Y9nlgy632wohYceYPErfog4jfJ8KPDkFH8oOenEWH8hGCNswjXm8znyk0ZKXx3Q5ZOMnb7L4rw5bUql9fXGGq0edl-Oo3T9SRFwuKQwzFizrfzBgp_8n-Ecs_3s12U1CMgjC-qp_T6EqEqwJXWlmJ0pOzdluqP4g9PwDHrFEFFy50vlUnjHMJtnc1tJ-_0Fq8dFi)
