name: Hillsdale College via Old Glory Today
subject: Unmasking the Far-Left Agenda
body:
We have never seen anything like what we are seeing today in America!

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/8qLauDngD_TdEK4F1qzKCw~~/AARclAA~~~)
---
| | Fellow American,

Over the last year, the agenda of the far Left, along with its media and Big Tech allies, has become all too clear.

Together, these forces want to **circumvent the First Amendment, suppress conservative speech and political activity** , and push their own **false** and **dishonest** narrative about American history and about what's happening today.

More and more, stories that question the far-Left's narrative are dubiously "fact-checked" or censored outright, while conservative opponents of the Left are "de-platformed."

**We have never seen anything like what we are seeing today in America!**

The roots of our current crisis can be traced to the late 1960s when radicals who scorned America and its way of life began taking over our colleges and universities.

It took them several decades to cement their dominance over American higher education, but we are seeing the fruits of their labors today: we see it in the media, and we see it in Silicon Valley.

We are also seeing it in professional sports, in corporate America--much of which is now capitulating to far-Left demands--and increasingly in K-12 education.

**Liberty in America is under serious threat. As I travel around the country, worried citizens ask me if there is a way to meet this crisis. I never hesitate to say there is, despite how uphill the fight may seem.**

A vital part of the fight--and one in which Hillsdale College is uniquely able to lead--is to reach and teach additional millions of citizens with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty.

**You are making that fight possible by supporting our educational outreach efforts, such as _Imprimis_ , America's leading digest of liberty.**

Hillsdale launched _Imprimis_ over 50 years ago to promote limited government, free enterprise, individual rights, personal responsibility, and a strong national defense. Each issue covers a timely political, economic, or cultural issue from a constitutional perspective.

Today, with the far Left's dramatic escalation of its assault on free speech and informed patriotism, _Imprimis_ is more critical than ever.

Think of what we have seen in the last few years: unprecedented and unconstitutional lockdowns, lawless violence in our cities, and even the destruction of historical monuments.

On top of this, we are now seeing an escalation of the effort to shut off any debate about these issues--an effort to limit or curtail speech that is **simply** and **clearly un-American**.

There is a good reason that conservative radio and TV host Mark Levin says _Imprimis_ is the publication he most looks forward to reading each month.

You'll be pleased to know that its circulation has grown this year to more than 6.6 million. That's 6.6 million paper copies that are **mailed to homes and businesses** ten times per year.

Our research also shows that _Imprimis_ subscribers share their copy with two to three other people on average, giving _Imprimis_ even greater reach and influence.

And while a circulation of more than 6.6 million is undoubtedly impressive--_Imprimis_ has a greater circulation than the _Wall Street Journal_ and _The New York Times_ --we are determined to do more.

Since _Imprimis_ launched in 1972 with a circulation of about 1,000, **Hillsdale College has never charged for a subscription.**

**But the fact that we offer _Imprimis_ free of charge does not mean that producing and mailing _Imprimis_ is without cost. **

Even using non-profit postage rates, the price for printing and mailing each issue of _Imprimis_ to so many subscribers ten times a year is a significant financial undertaking.

**Our immediate goal is to increase the circulation of _Imprimis_ to over 7 million American households and businesses this year. To do so, we must address the question of production and mailing costs.**

Your generous support today will help us reach our _Imprimis_ goal and expand our other successful educational outreach efforts.

You know that education is liberty's surest defense--and that education is needed now more than ever!

That's why, in addition to _Imprimis_ , we are investing in our other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. We're doing this through our **[Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/8qLauDngD_TdEK4F1qzKCw~~/AARclAA~~~).**

These efforts include:

* **Educating millions of Americans, especially younger Americans, through free online courses** —on topics including the Constitution, American history, and free-market economics.

* **Providing hundreds of thousands of young Americans with free copies of the Declaration of Independence and Constitution** —Hillsdale has already distributed over 600,000 free copies of these founding documents, and we receive more requests every week.

* **Educating thousands of K-12 students** in Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 public and private schools—there are already more than 90 such schools across the country, each having a strong curricular component in American civics.

I hope you'll agree that after everything we've seen in the last few years, the need for _Imprimis_ and Hillsdale's other educational outreach efforts is undeniable.

Hillsdale is the only college in America equipped to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans about our nation's great heritage of liberty and about the need to defend freedom and limited government.

Almost unique among American colleges and universities, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation.

**This independence from the government also means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.**

[ Will you give generously to our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions** --which includes expanding the reach and influence of _Imprimis_](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/8qLauDngD_TdEK4F1qzKCw~~/AARclAA~~~)?

If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on American principles and the American way of life, please show your support for Hillsdale College with a generous tax-deductible gift today.

I hope you will stand with us as we engage the far Left, along with its media and Big Tech allies, on the battlefield of education.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

P.S. Liberty in America is under threat, and education is the only long-term solution. That's why we are greatly expanding our national educational outreach, such as _Imprimis_ , free online courses, K-12 curricula and support, and much more. And we need your help to do so! Please make a generous, tax-deductible gift in support of liberty and education at this secure link: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/defend-liberty](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/8qLauDngD_TdEK4F1qzKCw~~/AARclAA~~~)**.

Thank you again for saving young people through education.
---
| |
---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/6Dz9M16_xKfnI4k2yTyZhQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRorcYUP0RpaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQucmVzdG9yZS1vdXItbmF0aW9uLmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1SZXN0b3JlLU91ci1OYXRpb24tT2ZmZXJzJmU9ZHB3aWxsaXM2NyUyNTQwZ21haWwuY29tVwNzcGNCCma7tifLZodUQZtSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/cGYwjPvPyM3QF0ftheorKQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRorcYUP0QraHR0cHM6Ly9yZXN0b3JlLW91ci1uYXRpb24uY29tL3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgpmu7Yny2aHVEGbUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: Delco Prison Accidentally Releases Inmate
body:
News + editorial to start your week | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | |
---
| | | Good morning and welcome to _Broad + Liberty_ 's Weekly Reads.

[Subscribe to our daily email list](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ec0a7e515b&e=b7b3eddce2) and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
|
---
|
### **1.[Delaware County accidentally releases prisoner but doesn’t discover mistake for six days](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=2ec9b5c61a&e=b7b3eddce2)**
_By Todd Shepherd_
Staff at the Delaware County prison accidentally released a prisoner who should have been kept behind bars earlier this month, but the county says it didn’t realize the mistake until almost six days later. Even after the mistake was discovered, the county did not issue a press release or other communication notifying the public of the error until this outlet inquired.

It’s the second accidental release in an eighteen-month period, both of which come relatively soon after the government deprivatized the facility.

Two [court](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=885bb45406&e=b7b3eddce2) [dockets](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=137c2b3573&e=b7b3eddce2) show Daniel Francis Rogers, 41, was sentenced on Monday, Aug. 5 for two different cases. Rogers received a short sentence for a plea deal that originated with a DUI charge stemming from an arrest in May of 2023.

The DUI-related arrest appears to have triggered a resentencing in a separate case from 2021 in which Rogers was on probation for possession of drugs with intent to distribute.

After he was booked into the George W. Hill Correctional Facility on Tuesday, Aug. 6, he was released three days later.
**Why It Matters. **The county continues to travel a tumultuous road since it took over day-to-day management of the prison in early 2022 after the facility had been run for nearly three decades by private companies. It was the last privately run prison in Pennsylvania. Since then, twelve inmates have died, according to _Broad + Liberty_ ’s research and reporting. Those deaths include one suspected murder, at least four suicides, and a “delayed homicide.” Assaults within the prison [went up](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=0889c7aa9b&e=b7b3eddce2) in the second year of government management, and [newly obtained documents](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=bacfc38a8c&e=b7b3eddce2) show the prison reported its largest number of assaults for a single month, 32, in May, the last month for which data is currently available. **[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=68ef713b20&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
### **2.[The Media’s Mary Poppins – Kamala Harris](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=aec6e2688d&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Guy Ciarrocchi_
Similar to Mary Poppins, Kamala Harris apparently just blew into town to make all our problems go away. Problems she apparently inherited, presumably created by others. She has no history, no references. But, no worries, she promises to make everything better — in 2025. She’s just magic! And, “joyful”— we’ll come back to that. The media is welcoming this “brand new candidate” to the stage. They can’t wait to “learn” about her ideas — and to share them with us. _Time_ magazine’s cover story: “Her moment.” Harris didn’t agree to be interviewed for that gushing, love-story dedicated to her which is both ironic and tragic.
**Why It Matters.** Television ads talk about her “tough” plans to close the border — in 2025. No media questions about the millions — a population the size of Pennsylvania — that have already come over the border under her watch. As Senator Fetterman said, “they’re letting in a new Pittsburgh every month.” No “fact checks” on her ads. Other ads talk about her pledge to “fight inflation” and increase home ownership “when elected.” It’s as if inflation was a meteor that accidentally hit the United States. Inflation, higher utility and grocery bills, and the highest mortgage rates in five decades couldn’t possibly be caused by trillions and trillions in new spending from Harris’s tie-breaking vote in the Senate for the (fake) Inflation Reduction Act. No criticisms. No context. No shame. One wonders if in Chicago for the Democrats’ convention, Joe and Mika will break out in song. “Oh it’s a jolly holiday with Kamala, Kamala makes your heart so light. When the day is gray and ordinary, Kamala makes the sun shine bright!” **[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=39e03f35a8&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
# **3\. Lightning Round**
* **[Sen. Casey blasts streaming services, but goes light on major donor Amazon Prime](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=f8aa6f6bf0&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Beth Ann Rosica: Title IX rules reminiscent of Wolf’s masking mandate](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7b8ab79fec&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Delco weekend prisoners say facility wrongly puts them in general population](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=2456af228d&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Rep. Tim O’Neal: Will Josh Shapiro bend left to rise?](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=41951817fd&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[G. David Sload: Helping keep Pennsylvanians employed with bi-partisan support](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=6914a3f196&e=b7b3eddce2)**

---
|
---
|
# **4\. What we're reading**
RFK Jr.’s endorsement of Trump has stirred up a whirlwind of reactions from both sides of the aisle. Right-wing media is celebrating the move as a boost for Trump, while left-leaning outlets criticize Kennedy for his unpredictable and self-serving campaign tactics. Dive into [this article from Santul Nerkar](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=49f5add08b&e=b7b3eddce2) at _The New York Times_ to learn how the press reacted to this latest twist in the most turbulent presidential election in recent memory.
---
|
---
| **_Broad + Liberty_ is funded exclusively by readers like you.**

Your generous support ensures that _Broad + Liberty_ can bring you stories and opinions that Pennsylvania’s mainstream media would rather leave unheard. Please consider making a contribution today. If you would like your gift to be used to help us cover a specific story or subject, please let us know in the contribution form or at [editors@broadandliberty.com](mailto:editirs@broadandliberty.com).

As always, gifts made to _Broad + Liberty_ are 100% tax deductible!

Thank you, dear reader, for your steadfast support of our independent, broad-minded brand of local journalism. We could not do this without you.

With gratitude,

— The Editors at _Broad + Liberty_

body:
Control of the House hangs in the balance. Can you chip in to help us defeat Miller-Meeks?

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91475217/493980160/175592731?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTY3NjFlYi1lMTYyLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tTwSSl2FEvfwF75Lc2vN_50HnDjGVF9_Vx6UYM9oBnY=)

Peter,

I’m reaching out because we are at a critical moment in our campaign.

Next month is our final FEC end-of-quarter deadline before Election Day. That’s why we set an ambitious goal of raising $75,000 by the end of August to ensure we stay on track ahead of this important milestone.

Here’s why reaching every fundraising goal we set matters so much:

Our district is one of the most competitive in the country. The outcome here could determine control of the House. That means the direction of our nation truly hangs in the balance.

The race is so important to regaining House control that the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee just reserved a nearly million-dollar ad buy signaling just how weak Marianette Miller-Meeks is.

**But the truth is, that’s a drop in the bucket compared to the millions outside groups will pour into our district to prop up Miller-Meeks. National Republicans will spend whatever it takes to defeat me and keep this seat red. And American Action Network (AAN), an extreme GOP ‘action tank,’ is officially on the airwaves misleading voters and trying to buy this district.**

With the future of reproductive rights, the economy, our communities, and even our democracy on the line — we can’t afford to miss a single fundraising goal if we’re going to have the resources to fight back.

[**Will you stand with me by donating $10, $25, or whatever you can afford to help us reach our $75,000 end-of-month goal? Your contribution today ensures we can compete against Miller-Meek and her allies until the very last vote is counted.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91475218/493980163/175592731?refcode=em24_240825_eom1cb_fnd_gq_act___cb_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240825_eom1cb_fnd_gq_act___cb_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=e96761eb-e162-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTY3NjFlYi1lMTYyLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tTwSSl2FEvfwF75Lc2vN_50HnDjGVF9_Vx6UYM9oBnY=)

body:
Rick Scott will get the message loud and clear once he loses this November.
| | |
---
** Governor Tim Walz has issued a word of advice to creepy, anti-family Republican extremists who insist on forcing their way into Americans' exam rooms:**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91478042/493984348/1820369458?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1726-fr-nd-v2&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjg2MWM4OWUtZTI2Mi1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gjw_ukaqCIxdM2RlFzJz5BlZNLi8l7l3tnlfZjHYWXQ=)
We're thrilled to see not only Vice President Kamala Harris, but also her running mate, Governor Walz, take up the mantle in defense of reproductive freedoms and the right to choose. **_We just wish Rick Scott would get the message._**
**_[Chip in toward our $125,000 daily goal now to ensure he hears us loud and clear at the ballot box when Debbie Mucarsel-Powell defeats him!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91478051/493984363/1820369458?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1726-fr-nd-v2&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjg2MWM4OWUtZTI2Mi1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gjw_ukaqCIxdM2RlFzJz5BlZNLi8l7l3tnlfZjHYWXQ=)_**

Rick Scott is fully behind Florida's strict abortion ban —**and he's pushing for a national version in the Senate.**
He voted**AGAINST** simple bills to safeguard nationwide access to contraception and fertility treatments like IVF.
And worst of all: His _"nay"_ vote came right after he blanketed the Florida airwaves with TV and digital ads**vowing to protect IVF.**
**It's clear that Rick Scott isn't just _dead-set_ on controlling what we do with our bodies — he's happy to lie about it to our faces, too.**
But when Floridians vote on the future of reproductive rights this fall, we'll also have a golden opportunity to hold extremist weirdos like Scott accountable for ever leaving them on the chopping block in the first place.
_The best way to do it?_
**Electing Debbie Mucarsel-Powell instead.**
She knows that the decision to have an abortion must be between a woman and her doctor — _no politicians necessary.__ _**And she's 100% committed to protecting every person's right to decide what's best for them, their bodies, and their futures.**
**_[But up against his massive wealth and self-funded ads, Debbie needs your help to retire Rick Scott, keep the Senate blue, and save the right to choose nationwide. name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: The next generation needs this
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsM8ZX-WbN
We're in a moment of national reflection. And for many Americans,
it's a question of how we reset
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osM8ZX-WbN

Friend,

We're in
a moment of national reflection.

And for
many Americans, it's a question of how we reset and reshape our
culture, institutions, and daily lives-for the better.

Friend,
over the past year, I wrote my new book, Right Wing Revolution,
as a guide for a return to an America where…

We
are united with a national spirit of love of country and belief
in American Greatness.

We
have a free society, secure borders, and respect for our
Constitution.

We
have rapidly increasing church attendance and a nationwide
spiritual renewal.

We
trust our neighbors, feel safe in our communities, and don't have
to lock our doors at night.

We
bring up the next generation to love our country, to live with
integrity and strong morals, and to champion a bright future for
all Americans.

Can I
send you a FREE copy of Right Wing Revolution to read today? All
I ask for in return is a gift of ANY amount to support Turning
Point USA-and our critically important work to make kids LOVE
AMERICA again.

Make
your gift & get your FREE book

Friend,
I'm proud to say that Right Wing Revolution is like NO OTHER book
you've read from the Right before:

It's
NOT a history of political tactics and the back-and-forth between
Left and Right.

It's
NOT a list of only political goals or policy to-dos, although I
do discuss key issue areas that are important to every American.

It's
NOT a call for our leaders or lawmakers to make a difference -
instead, its focus is on how all Americans can improve our
country and our culture, starting with a focus on improving
ourselves.

I want to
get my new book in the hands of as many Americans as
possible-which is why I'm offering to send you a hardcover
edition for FREE.

All I ask
for in return is your gift of ANY amount to help support Turning
Point USA's work to make kids LOVE AMERICA again!

Make
your gift & get your FREE book

In this
defining moment for America's future, let's come together in a
spirit of FREEDOM and with a firm belief in AMERICAN GREATNESS to
find all that's possible in the days ahead.

Thank YOU
for your patriotism, moral courage, and continued support of
Turning Point USA.

For
America,

Charlie
Kirk
Founder &
CEO
Turning
Point USA

Support
Turning Point USA

4940 East
Beverly Road
Phoenix,
Arizona 85044

name: Lucas
subject: Some kind of tough guy.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
#
Josh Hawley thinks he’s some kind of tough guy, Peter.
He’s made a whole career out of trying to control other people. And he has the most extreme anti-freedom record on reproductive rights of any member of the U.S. Senate — on abortion, birth control, and even IVF.
He’s become obsessed with convincing all of us that he’s the authority on what it means to be a man. Last year, he published a whole book about it: _Manhood: The Masculine Virtues America Needs_ , all about how we should be made in his own creepy image. You just can’t make this stuff up.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/68919?refcode=em20240825-7442&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=7442%2E614464%2ELIOOds)

name: The Democrats
subject: We’re legally required to report what we've raised after this FEC deadline.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
This is one of those moments in American history that we’ll never forget.
---
Derek, In less than one week, we’ll close the books on our most important FEC fundraising deadline yet. When it’s over, we are legally required to report how much we've raised. Here is the truth: _Everyone_ will be looking to see our total. Our convention just wrapped up, and thousands of Democrats just like you chipped in to help us make it a great week. But the unfortunate truth is that Trump and the RNC probably got a big fundraising boost, too. This month, the DNC _must_ report a big number. There is no organization better positioned to help elect Democrats up and down the ballot, from local office to the Oval Office. If everyone getting this email pitched in $3 today to help, we'd crush our fundraising goals in no time. But not everyone gives, which is why we are hoping all Democrats who understand the stakes of this deadline and this moment give today. Please: [**Can Democrats running for everywhere count on you to contribute $3 directly to the Democratic National Committee? name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Before Trump takes the stage in MI tomorrow...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1820%2E135344%2E-cjre_)

Friend --
Trump will be Michigan tomorrow for one of his first visit since Democrats wrapped up their convention earlier this week. It would mean A LOT to me if you would chip in today.
**I am asking for a contribution -- $3 or whatever you can afford -- before Donald Trump takes the stage tomorrow. If that's all you need to hear, please use this link to donate today:**
**[https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/-Trump-Visit](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-aug24._YMjeK&refcode=em240825-1-900&t=2&akid=1820%2E135344%2E-cjre_)**
Here's how former President Trump's visit plays in our race:
We know that both the presidential race and the Senate majority will be decided by Michigan – and recent polls show that our race is a dead heat. Cook Political Report recently downgraded our race from “lean Democratic” to “toss up.”
Given that the Senate race is the top of the ticket in the state, we know that whatever happens in our race will impact the presidential, too. That’s why Trump has given Mike Rogers his full-throated endorsement -- and why he’s attacked me directly, by name, calling me a “far-left liberal lunatic.” We expect to hear that and more tomorrow, unfortunately.
He knows that in order to win Michigan, the Republican nominee needs to win the Senate race – and he’s going to do whatever he can to make that happen.
That means we can likely expect to see Trump in Michigan a lot more in the stretch. National Republicans will be doing everything they can to flip our state red and boost our ultimate GOP opponent in the Senate race. In fact, there are already attack ads against me on TV -- and we know more are on the way.
If we are going to keep this seat blue in November, we need to hold the line by keeping our own positive TV ads on the air, doubling down on our field outreach, and continuing to meet voters in every corner of the state.
[**Trump will be here tomorrow. It would be a huge boon to our campaign if you would chip in and show your support before he gets here. Our goal is to send a message that we are NOT letting them win back Michigan! clean_body: Friend -- Trump will be Michigan tomorrow for one of his first visit since Democrats wrapped up their convention earlier this week. It would mean A LOT to me if you would chip in today. I am asking for a contribution -- $3 or whatever you can afford -- before Donald Trump takes the stage tomorrow. If that's all you need to hear, please use this link to donate today: Here's how former President Trump's visit plays in our race: We know that both the presidential race and the Senate majority will be decided by Michigan – and recent polls show that our race is a dead heat. Cook Political Report recently downgraded our race from “lean Democratic” to “toss up.” Given that the Senate race is the top of the ticket in the state, we know that whatever happens in our race will impact the presidential, too. That’s why Trump has given Mike Rogers his full-throated endorsement -- and why he’s attacked me directly, by name, calling me a “far-left liberal lunatic.” We expect to hear that and more tomorrow, unfortunately. He knows that in order to win Michigan, the Republican nominee needs to win the Senate race – and he’s going to do whatever he can to make that happen. That means we can likely expect to see Trump in Michigan a lot more in the stretch. National Republicans will be doing everything they can to flip our state red and boost our ultimate GOP opponent in the Senate race. In fact, there are already attack ads against me on TV -- and we know more are on the way. If we are going to keep this seat blue in November, we need to hold the line by keeping our own positive TV ads on the air, doubling down on our field outreach, and continuing to meet voters in every corner of the state. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you again. Your donation today -- especially today -- really means a lot. Elissa PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN P.O. Box 4145 East Lansing, MI 48826

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: This is concerning me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| I appreciate you opening this email.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=3428%2E35263%2E9tLAS3)
Good morning, Peter! ☕ I’m sorry to reach out so early on a Sunday, but this update couldn’t wait. The recent polling trends in our Senate race are concerning me. Poll after poll has revealed my right-wing opponent closing the gap in this race to the point where we’re statistically tied. **Eric Hovde’s campaign is even promoting internal polling that shows him taking the lead.** Wisconsin’s Senate seat could determine which party controls the Senate majority, so we cannot afford to let Hovde flip this seat red. But Republicans have already flooded our state with $30 million worth of ads (and counting) to defeat me, and this week, Hovde and his allies outspent us on the airwaves. I’m running out of time to fight back, and I can’t loan myself $13 million like my opponent can. Instead, I’m counting on your support to help us keep Wisconsin’s Senate seat blue. **[Can I count on you to chip in any amount today to defend this Senate seat and our Democratic Senate majority before our August fundraising deadline expires?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3587?c0=tbe-em-aug24.wYc4IX&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240825_AM1_V2_S1&t=13&akid=3428%2E35263%2E9tLAS3)** _Please use the links in this email to start a weekly donation through ActBlue._ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3604?c0=tbe-em-aug24.Bb-4UC&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240825_AM1_V2_S1&t=14&akid=3428%2E35263%2E9tLAS3)

name: Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: a quick note before my midnight deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
thank you for trusting me
| | |
---
Friend, it's Kirsten. I'm about to ask you to **[make a $5 donation ahead of my weekly deadline tonight at midnight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91482824/493996442/-862660935?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk5319-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjJiNDZkMi1lNjYyLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mZxddn63SkAax3Omyw5q48oX6kg4x3oAB8rLksy-Cjc=) **This is an incredibly important deadline, and I'm counting on your help to hit my goal. **But first, I want to thank you — so much — for supporting my campaign.**
I'm fighting every single day to earn your support and deliver on the promises I've made to you. From certifying the Equal Rights Amendment so that we can restore reproductive rights nationwide to fighting gun violence and keeping our communities safe, I'm working tirelessly to win change for your family.
As my grandmother taught me when I was a young girl, politics isn't about parties or polling numbers._ It's about the people._ It's my job to serve your family and do everything that I can to make life better for __you__. And it's an honor that I'm grateful for every day. So thank you for trusting me with your support and giving me this incredible opportunity to serve.
I wish that I could end this email here. But unfortunately, elections are an unavoidable part of politics. And to continue to serve your family in the Senate and win progress on all the issues you care about — reproductive rights, affordable health care, protecting our seniors and so much more — **I need your help.**
Democrats are heading into a historically difficult election cycle. And here in New York, right-wing extremists had their best election in decades in 2022. I'm confident that we can reverse that trend this year. **But because I refuse to accept money from corporate PACs, I'm counting on grassroots donations to compete with far-right megadonors. **
**[Please, if I've earned your support and trust fighting for you in the Senate, will you make a donation to help me continue this work and defend my seat? I'm up against a critical deadline, and I need a surge in grassroots support now to hit my goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91482825/493996443/-862660935?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk5319-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjJiNDZkMi1lNjYyLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mZxddn63SkAax3Omyw5q48oX6kg4x3oAB8rLksy-Cjc=) **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91482826/493996444/-862660935?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jtk5319-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjJiNDZkMi1lNjYyLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mZxddn63SkAax3Omyw5q48oX6kg4x3oAB8rLksy-Cjc=)

Thank you for trusting me to fight for your family. It is the highest honor.

With gratitude and love,

Kirsten
|

* * *
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91482830/493996448/1575385346?refcode=jtk5319-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjJiNDZkMi1lNjYyLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mZxddn63SkAax3Omyw5q48oX6kg4x3oAB8rLksy-Cjc=) A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. [**So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91482831/493996449/1575385346?refcode=jtk5319-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjJiNDZkMi1lNjYyLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mZxddn63SkAax3Omyw5q48oX6kg4x3oAB8rLksy-Cjc=) And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, [**text JOIN to 60708.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91482832/493996450/1575385346?refcode=jtk5319-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjJiNDZkMi1lNjYyLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mZxddn63SkAax3Omyw5q48oX6kg4x3oAB8rLksy-Cjc=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

But because I refuse to accept money from corporate PACs, I'm counting on grassroots donations to compete with far-right megadonors. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for trusting me to fight for your family. It is the highest honor. With gratitude and love, Kirsten | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

VIKRAM MOVES INTO THE LEAD

The UNH poll was just released and it shows that Vikram has moved into first place! Last week the Saint Anselm poll had the race tied, so it is clear that Vikram has the momentum.
This campaign keeps growing stronger, new supporters are joining every day, and we are building a strong grassroots campaign across NH's Second Congressional District.
But it is crucial that we don't let up now. The survey also shows that half of voters are still undecided. It is now more important than ever that we get our message out to these undecided voters.

clean_body: | | | | VIKRAM MOVES INTO THE LEAD The UNH poll was just released and it shows that Vikram has moved into first place! Last week the Saint Anselm poll had the race tied, so it is clear that Vikram has the momentum. This campaign keeps growing stronger, new supporters are joining every day, and we are building a strong grassroots campaign across NH's Second Congressional District. But it is crucial that we don't let up now. The survey also shows that half of voters are still undecided. It is now more important than ever that we get our message out to these undecided voters. Please consider donating to our campaign so we can keep this momentum going! If you could donate even just $5 or $10, it would help us get our message out to those undecided voters! Please click == or on the buttons below to donate to our campaign. We also need to continue to build our organization. We need help making phone calls, putting up signs, and volunteering in other ways. Please click == or on the buttons below to help out! Thank you for all of your support! | | Vikram, sign me up! Friend,
---
According to media reports, a D.C. federal judge is ordering a **“crunch hearing”** on Tuesday for a _**multibillion-dollar**_ sham lawsuit against some of President Trump’s top defenders...
---
...including _**_yours_ _truly_**_ and Mike Lindell.
---
This report comes just around the _one-year anniversary_ of one of the darkest moments for our Republic... **_When President Trump and I were wrongfully _ARRESTED_ in one of the most violent jails in America and used as political pawns by the Biden-Harris White House_**.
---
[](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kM2OnDAQhJ-muYHstj2Ggw_ZICLlX7lEOa2Mf2YcYWCNvWjePgKhXL8qdVeVjusU_FOBfAHER7AbIAL7AIhvf_aYyt_45VP9-X0l9dvtexSHih8BMT9X9996XWlc1GE6qOwrq5i3hFdOUYlcdBxZVz2UNVS3iJ4LSb0ZvWzlaBkRjjDGkYsqKCTISYuCMiFJ18iu5SiIpNx7om8MODn_NDq6FIymW951SssSG7PEalKPnNftDDYADpszJblmD3Ny9nAADqnYZ30PZQp6DrVPztkl1r7MtpadZtp6DTgYiVbQcex823JpDwRsKDm-Gh1XHe4zsP4KywBvhxKdDSUC668pTphdOtCe6AW2pSTjgPW_fr--XMwsc3ZzBtb_-PrtZ5WUXfcwTWG7SeDkfjY--r0r_BcAAP__5W-Gpg)
__
---
One year later, and the attacks will not let up! They want me homeless, imprisoned, disbarred, and bankrupt.
---
It would be easy to throw up my hands and surrender to the Left’s frivolous demands, but nothing great in life ever comes easily – _and what could be greater than the fight for freedom and justice?_
---
When my mugshot was taken in the same jail as President Trump’s, it was filed in the system under **booking #[2313757](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kM2OnDAQhJ-muYHstj2Ggw_ZICLlX7lEOa2Mf2YcYWCNvWjePgKhXL8qdVeVjusU_FOBfAHER7AbIAL7AIhvf_aYyt_45VP9-X0l9dvtexSHih8BMT9X9996XWlc1GE6qOwrq5i3hFdOUYlcdBxZVz2UNVS3iJ4LSb0ZvWzlaBkRjjDGkYsqKCTISYuCMiFJ18iu5SiIpNx7om8MODn_NDq6FIymW951SssSG7PEalKPnNftDDYADpszJblmD3Ny9nAADqnYZ30PZQp6DrVPztkl1r7MtpadZtp6DTgYiVbQcex823JpDwRsKDm-Gh1XHe4zsP4KywBvhxKdDSUC668pTphdOtCe6AW2pSTjgPW_fr--XMwsc3ZzBtb_-PrtZ5WUXfcwTWG7SeDkfjY--r0r_BcAAP__5W-Gpg).** I thought it would send a powerful message to set my Legal Defense Trust’s fundraising goal as my Booking Number – _**$231,375.70.**_
---
_And now, at the anniversary of my infamous mugshot, I am pleased to report that thanks to kind souls like _you_ , we have never been closer to hitting our goal!_
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to help me carry on fighting for my freedom and justice as the Biden-Harris Deep State tries to JAIL me for the rest of my life.**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kM2OnDAQhJ-muYHstj2Ggw_ZICLlX7lEOa2Mf2YcYWCNvWjePgKhXL8qdVeVjusU_FOBfAHER7AbIAL7AIhvf_aYyt_45VP9-X0l9dvtexSHih8BMT9X9996XWlc1GE6qOwrq5i3hFdOUYlcdBxZVz2UNVS3iJ4LSb0ZvWzlaBkRjjDGkYsqKCTISYuCMiFJ18iu5SiIpNx7om8MODn_NDq6FIymW951SssSG7PEalKPnNftDDYADpszJblmD3Ny9nAADqnYZ30PZQp6DrVPztkl1r7MtpadZtp6DTgYiVbQcex823JpDwRsKDm-Gh1XHe4zsP4KywBvhxKdDSUC668pTphdOtCe6AW2pSTjgPW_fr--XMwsc3ZzBtb_-PrtZ5WUXfcwTWG7SeDkfjY--r0r_BcAAP__5W-Gpg)

clean_body: \- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - \- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - | Friend, According to media reports, a D.C. federal judge is ordering a “crunch hearing” on Tuesday for a multibillion-dollar sham lawsuit against some of President Trump’s top defenders... ...including yours truly and Mike Lindell. This report comes just around the one-year anniversary of one of the darkest moments for our Republic... When President Trump and I were wrongfully ARRESTED in one of the most violent jails in America and used as political pawns by the Biden-Harris White House. One year later, and the attacks will not let up! They want me homeless, imprisoned, disbarred, and bankrupt. It would be easy to throw up my hands and surrender to the Left’s frivolous demands, but nothing great in life ever comes easily – and what could be greater than the fight for freedom and justice? When my mugshot was taken in the same jail as President Trump’s, it was filed in the system under booking #. I thought it would send a powerful message to set my Legal Defense Trust’s fundraising goal as my Booking Number – $231,375.70. And now, at the anniversary of my infamous mugshot, I am pleased to report that thanks to kind souls like you , we have never been closer to hitting our goal! - Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

name: Senator Josh Hawley
subject: Our Lord has his arms around President Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
By the Grace of God!| | | Peter, on July 13th, God was watching over President Trump.

He is meant for this moment in history, and I thank President Trump for fighting for us every time I see him.

He has been put through impeachments, sham trials, a raid of his home, and an attempt on his life.

While he continues to get attacked and scrutinized by the far Left, I’m proud to stand with him and be a Trump supporter.

It’s Josh Hawley, and I'm praying for President Trump.

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: not the update I wanted to give
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
The next 48 hours are key
| | |
---
Friend, I just stepped out of an important campaign meeting, and, well, I won't sugarcoat it: **Right as the election year heats up, a recent poll shows me _statistically tied_ with my Trump-backed opponent.**
The good news is that we still have time to turn things around – but only with the grassroots support of folks like you, friend. **My team crunched the numbers, and we need to raise $500,000 in the next 48 hours to help us get back on track.** [**That's why I'm personally asking, friend, will you make your first gift now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91485590/494004433/-1893289703?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk2590-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODdhZDFlNi1lODYyLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hAHE5sQsG3hGPIR3BR6Ck84QcjZ9HhlhMcFQtp8x__0=)
I wouldn't ask if it weren’t urgent. The fate of the Senate hangs in the balance as the MAGA establishment attacks us from all sides. Mitch McConnell _personally_ named me a top target for defeat, my Trump-backed, self-funding opponent dumped $4.5 million of his own money into this race, and GOP super PACs are flooding Ohio with dark money. **They're doing everything they can to defeat me because they know this race could decide Senate control.**
All our progress, including our fight for the Dignity of Work, is in serious jeopardy if we let them get away with buying this seat. _NBC News_ reports this could be one of the most expensive races of the cycle, and it's going to take resources to fight back against the GOP's attacks. **I'm counting on your grassroots support to help me reach my $500,000 48-hour goal. Falling short simply is not an option.**
[**So, friend, we've got less than 48 hours to make magic happen. Please, will you rush $5 right now to help us win in Ohio and keep the Senate blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91485591/494004434/-1893289703?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=5&refcode=jtk2590-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODdhZDFlNi1lODYyLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hAHE5sQsG3hGPIR3BR6Ck84QcjZ9HhlhMcFQtp8x__0=)

clean_body: The next 48 hours are key | | | Friend, I just stepped out of an important campaign meeting, and, well, I won't sugarcoat it: Right as the election year heats up, a recent poll shows me statistically tied with my Trump-backed opponent. The good news is that we still have time to turn things around – but only with the grassroots support of folks like you, friend. My team crunched the numbers, and we need to raise $500,000 in the next 48 hours to help us get back on track. = I wouldn't ask if it weren’t urgent. The fate of the Senate hangs in the balance as the MAGA establishment attacks us from all sides. Mitch McConnell personally named me a top target for defeat, my Trump-backed, self-funding opponent dumped $4.5 million of his own money into this race, and GOP super PACs are flooding Ohio with dark money. They're doing everything they can to defeat me because they know this race could decide Senate control. All our progress, including our fight for the Dignity of Work, is in serious jeopardy if we let them get away with buying this seat. NBC News reports this could be one of the most expensive races of the cycle, and it's going to take resources to fight back against the GOP's attacks. I'm counting on your grassroots support to help me reach my $500,000 48-hour goal. Falling short simply is not an option. = | Please use the links in this email to start a weekly donation through ActBlue. | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you so much, = Please read on for a personal message from Sen. Sherrod Brown: Friend – thank you for being a part of our grassroots movement and for sharing our commitment to the Dignity of Work. Fighting for workers means building an economy that prioritizes the needs of workers over tax breaks for billionaires and corporations. No matter who you are or what kind of work you do, I promise to fight for you. But I need your help: Experts say I'm one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection and Senate control could come down to Ohio. The only way we can defend this critical seat is with grassroots contributions from supporters like you. = If you’d like to become one of my TOP supporters and receive exclusive updates from our campaign team, text “OH” to 44105. body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=3972%2E552475%2EmJdNFj)
We need to keep our eyes on the ball this election, Peter. **[We’re going to explain why, but first can you make a donation to Bob Casey’s campaign to keep this key battleground blue?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240825-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240825-1&refcode2=3972_552475_mJdNFj&akid=3972%2E552475%2EmJdNFj)**
**[Chip In ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240825-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240825-1&refcode2=3972_552475_mJdNFj&akid=3972%2E552475%2EmJdNFj)**
In 2020, Democrats held a polling advantage headed into the fall. Democratic Senate candidates in states like Iowa, North Carolina, and Maine were all favored to win, putting us on the path to a huge Senate majority.
But instead, Republicans in Iowa, North Carolina, and Maine defeated their Democratic challengers, and instead of a strong majority, the Senate was tied.
This year is starting to feel eerily similar, Peter. Polls are once again trending in our direction, and Democrats are feeling inspired and more confident, but we can’t afford to be complacent.
While the polls may show Democrats in the lead, we know this election will come down to only a handful of votes. With workers’ rights, women’s rights, and voting rights all on the line, we can’t afford to take our foot off the gas now.
We have the chance to win back the House, defend our Senate majority, and elect Kamala Harris as the first woman president. And folks, that’s the only way we’ll be able to codify abortion rights into law, pass the PRO Act, raise the minimum wage, and so much more.
**[So please, chip in to Bob Casey’s campaign today to keep PA’s Senate seat blue and deliver PA to Kamala Harris and Tim Walz. Your support could make the difference between winning and losing Pennsylvania — between holding the White House and the Senate, or losing them both.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240825-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240825-1&refcode2=3972_552475_mJdNFj&akid=3972%2E552475%2EmJdNFj)**

* We trust our neighbors, feel safe in our communities, and don't have to lock our doors at night.

* We strengthen our families and have more, not fewer, kids.

* We bring up the next generation to love our country, to live with integrity and strong morals, and to believe in American Greatness.

**_Right Wing Revolution_ was JUST RELEASED, and I'm honored that conservative heroes like MARK LEVIN called it "fantastic."** _**[_**To get your FREE copy, all I ask for in return is your gift of ANY amount, even just $5, to help support the work of Turning Point USA to make kids LOVE AMERICA again.**_](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)**_

name: Sen. Rosen (D-NV)
subject: This story is special to me, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
This one means a lot to me, so I hope you’ll take a moment to read it.
| | |
---
| | Hi, friend, it’s Jacky Rosen. The story below is a special one about my faith and how I first got involved in politics. **This one means a lot to me, so I hope you’ll take a moment to read it.** But if you don’t have the time to take a look right now, [**could you still chip in $5 to help me keep Nevada and the Senate blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91487197/494007445/1398942472?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=5&refcode=jtk4596-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZGE1YjIwMy1lYjYyLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vKP-UdMAZfsPJTulRNFhOHmOLRIpIPKIV1PsKcRfRHA=)
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91487198/494007446/1398942472?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk4596-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZGE1YjIwMy1lYjYyLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vKP-UdMAZfsPJTulRNFhOHmOLRIpIPKIV1PsKcRfRHA=)
Friend,
My career in public service began in 2016, when I was recruited to flip a competitive House seat blue. I was serving as the president of Nevada’s largest synagogue, and looking back now, that was incredibly fitting – **because my Jewish faith and values have always been at the very core of my work in Congress.**
In fact, my decision to run for public office was guided by the Jewish principle of Tikkun Olam _–_ _to leave the world a better place than how we found it._
I’m so proud of the progress we've made in the years since. And in the face of growing antisemitism, attacks on reproductive freedom, and threats to tear down our democracy, I'm as committed as ever to making positive change happen. **But** **I****need _your_ help.**
**Right now,****polling shows me locked in a statistical tie with Trump-endorsed candidate Sam Brown – who set a major GOP fundraising record in this race that will likely decide Senate control. So please, I'm humbly asking:**

This week especially, I’d be remiss to not highlight Tulsi’s email. | | | | | Hey, I'd be remiss if I didn't bump up Tulsi Gabbard's message - especially on the week of the Democrat National Convention. Tulsi practically ended Kamala Harris ' presidential campaign last time. Her message for the American People is more important than ever. You should read it if you haven't already. "I’m attaching her original message below. Please take a moment to read it." It's worth it. Trust me. - Steve Scalise *** Original Message From Tulsi Gabbard * | "Tulsi Gabbard" I took on the Clinton Machine. And I paid the price for it. Aloha - this is FORMER Democrat Tulsi Gabbard. My former party came after me for the high crime of standing up to Hillary Clinton at the height of her power in 2016. A lot has changed since then - for starters, I'm no longer a Democrat. Like so many, the Democrat Party left me behind and became the Party of corporate elitists, warmongers, and anti-freedom propagandists. (In fact, I literally wrote the book about doing what 's RIGHT for our country and LEAVING the Democrat Party!) The rot is too deep - it can't be fixed, it must be driven out entirely. That's why I'm sending you this email. I have a plan to bring down the ENTIRE cabal of Elites running the Democrat Party. We need to raise 100K dollars by tonight so we can begin to put our plan into action. We're short of that goal by about 7%. "So – with a humble heart and spine of steel – I respectfully ask you for a small contribution of 10 or 25 bucks. Do you think you could do that for me?" We set this ambitious goal because this is a no-fail mission - we must defeat the Democrat elite at the ballot box and send a powerful message that we, the people will not allow those who are destroying our freedom to remain in power. "Your contribution to our cause of freedom would make a tremendous difference. So I’m asking you: Can you please help us? " God bless you. God bless America. - Tulsi | | | "Please take my Election Year Check-In!" It's House Majority Leader Steve Scalise. name: Fred Gifford
subject: Me, Tim Walz, and maps
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
We’re relying on your support to keep our programs going strong.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/91489042/494010960/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM4MDgyNDY0LWVjNjItZWYxMS05OTFhLTYwNDViZGRiZmM0YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=z2t0IxdvGv02QXoop7KjyesvEPfazUg455aynj--078=&emci=3a539653-9b61-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&emdi=38082464-ec62-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, as a geographer, and the Director of Geospatial Analytics at NDRC, here are two things I really love: democracy and maps. But I know I’m not alone. Vice presidential candidate Tim Walz is also a big map buff. When I saw him speak in July, the former geography teacher — and 2018 and 2022 Democracy Defender! — made it clear that he sees maps as a vehicle for policy reform: | _“The end product of these maps is a more sustainable economy, a more sustainable environment, and lifting up of people’s lives in a way that they can thrive.” _ _“I know I’m preaching to the choir, but the choir needs to sing... This stuff works. This stuff makes a difference. The map is wonderful to look at. It’s exciting.”_ _— _Minnesota Governor Tim Walz
---
I know the end product of fair maps is a more representative democracy with leaders who follow the will of the people. It’s refreshing to see national Democratic leaders like Governor Walz who believe as I do that good maps bring about social change. Period.
**We’re working day in and day out to ensure fair maps across the country — and truth be told, we’d be lost without this team’s support. **

clean_body: We’re relying on your support to keep our programs going strong. | Peter, as a geographer, and the Director of Geospatial Analytics at NDRC, here are two things I really love: democracy and maps. But I know I’m not alone. Vice presidential candidate Tim Walz is also a big map buff. When I saw him speak in July, the former geography teacher — and 2018 and 2022 Democracy Defender! — made it clear that he sees maps as a vehicle for policy reform: | “The end product of these maps is a more sustainable economy, a more sustainable environment, and lifting up of people’s lives in a way that they can thrive.” “I know I’m preaching to the choir, but the choir needs to sing... This stuff works. This stuff makes a difference. The map is wonderful to look at. It’s exciting.” — Minnesota Governor Tim Walz I know the end product of fair maps is a more representative democracy with leaders who follow the will of the people. **Meet Bernie Moreno:** | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=22b272e554aa442f8c3a76337ca1b60d&_e=MIq8W8xnLtd3yR38VWMwaAb4WSu-8_N3kcBUdStmtIXwYJKE4dedURj9J8nhZnjZJOBnrZp7MnLv9-0qftRummu_KaHXL5C5S9FCjVsGIKH1eHUyjCUnQURWy5RQy0qFUH2LWZRjnT43mp0krdgBUWJF1Q4092Qp-nL34qFvijxZ-_nm2yz4iWq8kZs9RxbIlnUO0S1y_t5A-AY3LRLOYKPHlCt8o-3tosIGphOJodSXBkU1v-w0kHdYFDJVeuaAaTz21PXUoROWjSrZ7bBgsyCDxM79UfP9LaOLq2wrViluxJVkuXvBTfYwrIm6VlHkdQ-GML3MHsV_edi1vDp8vkcKHccMQXb4d7D2aIWgF8o8sxO1a3b8fxa01bylpPROISpk_VDKYW0AKxWMR13DHA%3D%3D) Bernie Moreno fights for the American Dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American Dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

clean_body: We’re fighting the toughest uphill battle of any race in the country right now, but I don’t need billionaires and dark money funding this campaign – I need you. | Peter, We’re getting CRUSHED by Sherrod Brown’s fundraising, and I don’t say that lightly. The situation is dire – this can’t be overstated. Hot off the press – Sherrod Brown is the TOP Senate Democrat fundraiser in the entire country. He raised over $5 MILLION online in July alone. This is absolutely insane and over $1 million more than his closest Senate colleague. No one can comprehend the depths Sherrod Brown will go to squeeze every last dollar out of his swampy coastal elite liberal donors. His July haul alone represents an 80% INCREASE over his June total. It’s clear he’s going to continue having massive month-over-month increases from now until Election Day. Sherrod Brown has the entrenched liberal D.C. establishment and the fringe Left-of-Lenin radicals working overtime to ensure he has six more years in office. If they win, we’re looking at continual open borders, higher taxes, socialist economic takeovers, crushing inflation, and out-of-control crime, the likes of which this country has never seen. We’re fighting the toughest uphill battle of any race in the country right now, but I don’t need billionaires and dark money funding this campaign –I need you. Please, Peter, I’m begging you – don’t let Sherrod Brown buy this seat. Thank you, and God bless. Bernie Moreno GOP Nominee for Senate, Ohio Meet Bernie Moreno: | Bernie Moreno fights for the American Dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American Dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18. Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America. In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board. After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation. Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First. Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has. FOLLOW BERNIE ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Bernie Moreno for Senate Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go: .

## Join Tad at the State Fair!

****
Come and support Tad at the Minnesota State Fair! Wear your Orange t-shirt for Tad! We need you to come to the MN GOP Booth and be a friendly face for Tad. Encourage fairgoers to come and visit with Tad and let them know how they can help the campaign. (If Tad isn't at the booth, you can be an advocate and encourage volunteers to get involved.) Don't have a Tad Jude t-shirt? You can get one at the booth. Bring your kids! Invite your teens and young people! Let's be an Orange presence for Tad at the fair! ****

We need you to come to the MN GOP Booth and be a friendly face for Tad. Encourage fairgoers to come and visit with Tad and let them know how they can help the campaign. (If Tad isn't at the booth, you can be an advocate and encourage volunteers to get involved.) Don't have a Tad Jude t-shirt? You can get one at the booth. Bring your kids! Invite your teens and young people! Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. body:
Angela’s speech at the DNC inspired the nation to rally behind Democrats
in November:

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/30330?t=1008&amount=25&akid=2308%2E52803%2E2xN2Bo ][IMG]

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/30330?t=1009&amount=25&akid=2308%2E52803%2E2xN2Bo ]Donate

Now with less than 75 days until Election Day, we need to capitalize on
our momentum and get Democrats to mobilize ASAP!

Since Angela stepped off the DNC stage, folks across the country are
stepping up to join Team Alsobrooks and go ALL-IN on our efforts to defeat
Larry Hogan.

So we must strike while the iron’s hot,
Peter. We’re taking to the
streets, knocking on doors, phonebanking, and talking to folks in their
communities to get the word out about Angela and Democrats everywhere.

But running a large-scale outreach campaign, while also producing and
running digital and TV ads, is expensive.

And without cash on hand, we won’t be able to counter Larry Hogan’s
misinformation campaign!

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/30330?t=1010&amount=25&akid=2308%2E52803%2E2xN2Bo ]So can Angela count on your support to help her win her battleground
Senate race in Maryland? DON’T FORGET: What we do between now and Election
Day will determine Senate control,
Peter!

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately.

name: Sharice Davids
subject: This is not a typical congressional resume
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC**
body:
|
#
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91494576/494019183/1699591741?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20240825_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDZiNzRhZTYtZjI2Mi1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fe91KUOf8mg8yBXOoaeqZ1cF6UMnxxsMf5Z6bf6AdOY=) Listen, when I flipped a Republican-held congressional seat, it’s fair to say I broke the mold in a few ways. Not just because I became Kansas’s only federally elected Democratic representative. But also because I’m an LGBTQ+ Native American woman and former MMA fighter who was raised by a single Army mom and worked multiple jobs to pay my own way through school. So, no, it’s fair to say I didn’t come to Washington with your typical congressional resume. **[If you think a voice like mine belongs in Congress, I’d love to have your support in this campaign, because we’re facing one tough fight in my race for re-election — and, candidly, the House majority hangs in the balance. Will you split a $10 contribution between me and Fight Like Hell PAC today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91494577/494019184/1699591741?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&amount=10&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20240825_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDZiNzRhZTYtZjI2Mi1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fe91KUOf8mg8yBXOoaeqZ1cF6UMnxxsMf5Z6bf6AdOY=)** | [DONATE →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91494578/494019185/1699591741?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20240825_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDZiNzRhZTYtZjI2Mi1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fe91KUOf8mg8yBXOoaeqZ1cF6UMnxxsMf5Z6bf6AdOY=)
---
But I also want to be clear about this: I’m not asking for your support — or anyone else’s — just because of who I am or the road I took to get to Congress.
I’m asking for your support because of my record: what I’ve used my voice to fight for in Washington, and what I’ll keep fighting for if I have the privilege of continuing to serve. My philosophy has always been that we need leaders who are grown-up enough to put partisanship aside and get things done.
That’s why I’m proud to have helped create over 20,000 clean-energy jobs right here in KS-03. It’s why I’m proud to have saved seniors money on insulin and passed a bipartisan infrastructure law that’s kick-started construction on over 300 vital projects across Kansas.
And it’s why I’m so determined to restore abortion rights, defend our democracy, and make our economy work better for Americans who are struggling today — because together, we’ve tackled tough problems and weathered tough times before. And I know that we can keep making real progress if we stay in the fight.
**[If you’re with me, I’d be so grateful for anything you can pitch in to help us win this critical election →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91494579/494019186/1699591741?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20240825_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDZiNzRhZTYtZjI2Mi1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fe91KUOf8mg8yBXOoaeqZ1cF6UMnxxsMf5Z6bf6AdOY=)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Sharice Davids and Fight Like Hell PAC will go through immediately:_
| [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91494580/494019187/1699591741?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20240825_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDZiNzRhZTYtZjI2Mi1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fe91KUOf8mg8yBXOoaeqZ1cF6UMnxxsMf5Z6bf6AdOY=)

clean_body: | = Listen, when I flipped a Republican-held congressional seat, it’s fair to say I broke the mold in a few ways. Not just because I became Kansas’s only federally elected Democratic representative. But also because I’m an LGBTQ+ Native American woman and former MMA fighter who was raised by a single Army mom and worked multiple jobs to pay my own way through school. So, no, it’s fair to say I didn’t come to Washington with your typical congressional resume. = | = But I also want to be clear about this: I’m not asking for your support — or anyone else’s — just because of who I am or the road I took to get to Congress. I’m asking for your support because of my record: what I’ve used my voice to fight for in Washington, and what I’ll keep fighting for if I have the privilege of continuing to serve. My philosophy has always been that we need leaders who are grown-up enough to put partisanship aside and get things done. That’s why I’m proud to have helped create over 20,000 clean-energy jobs right here in KS-03. It’s why I’m proud to have saved seniors money on insulin and passed a bipartisan infrastructure law that’s kick-started construction on over 300 vital projects across Kansas. And it’s why I’m so determined to restore abortion rights, defend our democracy, and make our economy work better for Americans who are struggling today — because together, we’ve tackled tough problems and weathered tough times before. And I know that we can keep making real progress if we stay in the fight. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Sharice Davids and Fight Like Hell PAC will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Sharice Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Let’s walk together along the path of Jesus Christ
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsYoux-WNU

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osYoux-WNU

Hello
Friend,
Many of
us are familiar with the life and teachings of Jesus Christ. But
have you ever wondered where these amazing stories took place?
In our
fast-paced society, the average American travels about 30 miles a
day. As a result, it can be hard to picture the ministry of
Christ as he walked from town to town and village to village
healing the sick, raising the dead, and giving sight to the
blind.
Jesus
didn't zoom around on the expressway, he walked an average of
about three miles-per-hour, slow enough to minister to everyone
His father put in His path.
To help
you better understand Jesus' area of ministry and the
world-altering impact it had, I created The Jesus Map. It traces
the life and ministry of Jesus Christ, including 52 key events
from His birth in Bethlehem to His ascension on the Mount of
Olives
This
unique reference tool will let you see where he fed the 5,000,
walked on water, and was tempted by Satan. As you walk with
Christ and the Apostles down those dusty Israeli roads, you will
better understand the questions people asked Him and the needs he
confronted.

I pray it
will also inspire you with ways God wants to use you in your area
of influence. Many times, we only need to slow down enough to see
what God has in mind.
Here's
your link to get the map and begin your journey of discovery:
https://ptv.org/nna/the-jesus-map
Let's
walk together along the path of Jesus Christ.

Dr.
Robert Jeffress
Senior
Pastor, First Baptist Dallas

clean_body: Hello Friend, Many of us are familiar with the life and teachings of Jesus Christ. But have you ever wondered where these amazing stories took place? In our fast-paced society, the average American travels about 30 miles a day. As a result, it can be hard to picture the ministry of Christ as he walked from town to town and village to village healing the sick, raising the dead, and giving sight to the blind. Jesus didn't zoom around on the expressway, he walked an average of about three miles-per-hour, slow enough to minister to everyone His father put in His path. To help you better understand Jesus' area of ministry and the world-altering impact it had, I created The Jesus Map. It traces the life and ministry of Jesus Christ, including 52 key events from His birth in Bethlehem to His ascension on the Mount of Olives This unique reference tool will let you see where he fed the 5,000, walked on water, and was tempted by Satan. As you walk with Christ and the Apostles down those dusty Israeli roads, you will better understand the questions people asked Him and the needs he confronted. I pray it will also inspire you with ways God wants to use you in your area of influence. Many times, we only need to slow down enough to see what God has in mind. Here's your link to get the map and begin your journey of discovery: Let's walk together along the path of Jesus Christ. Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system January 18, 2022. clean_body: State Democrats have no time off when it comes to elections – which is why Obama is sounding the alarm on the importance of our level of the ballot: | | | | | ---|--- The fight for our statehouses is ramping up. President Obama is sounding the alarm on the importance of state legislative elections: Your state legislators have a major impact on policies that affect day-to-day life. And, with a divided Congress, state legislatures are where progress can happen on protecting abortion access, our climate, and voting rights. subject: Please don't dismiss this request, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Harris for President
body:
What do you say? Kamala and Tim would love to meet you. | | |
---
Peter, the Democratic National Convention just ended. _You know what's going to happen next?_ Trump will try to suck up all of the oxygen, reset the narrative, and crush our momentum. He will spin wild conspiracy theories, and his billionaire backers will embolden him. _That's why we can't slow down._ As Kamala says, we're a people-powered campaign. And when we fight, we win. **It's critical that we have enough resources on hand at this very moment to keep our message front and center.** [Please don't dismiss this request, Peter: Will you pitch in $25 or even more to support the Harris-Walz campaign by midnight? **$1.**
That’s the donation we’re asking you to make today. Yes, just $1.
$1 because our work to pass gun safety legislation at every level is fueled by people like you chipping in to messages like these.
$1 because we need to help our endorsed gun safety candidates win their elections in November so we can flip the House, hold the Senate, and defend the White House.
$1 because now that the Democratic National Convention is over, we truly are coming down to the wire in this election, and we must do everything we can to elect Kamala Harris and Tim Walz to the White House.
We know it may not seem like $1 has the power to do all of these things. But when everyone contributes their $1, it all adds up and makes a HUGE impact on our work to save lives.
So please:

According to Google, sharing the stories of a former Palestinian refugee, an Arab Muslim born in Israel, and brave U.S. Navy SEALs who witnessed the horrors of Muslim extremism constitutes “hate speech.” **Dear Infidels** went viral on social media, reaching millions of people! Like clockwork, Big Tech reared its ugly head to shut us down and suppress our reach. **[**Fight Big Tech while your tax-deductible gift to PragerU is TRIPLED and has 3X the impact.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ef797e7b633b40e7a2b185bde65705ef&_e=3b6Djfcbx1R8lbwxrLBCce4YILQyPuigVDXevhpJPsoIvxnyrHqO-Snm5m9kvNMJl6Yn0rlofsynzOpSOowDttNZaNdpbxMfFZ1bXl0crYgWD-DeLVolMRJyOiHXSG6s5G8WMREAx8qqgqnK5Apx2J7LnMx85A9-Y1KV5NOZYDTsej6YzKZvbAN2sISiV4zUqK4nBvTY3VPV29dvx5tvIPJqU15Xg7FLXYqLIo-qXNJ_wz1-iy8_i8Uh50fRsHvXxEuuXsBkC06WKqe6aXTj4A%3D%3D)** We immediately jumped into action and began sounding the alarm. Thanks to our dedicated followers and supporters, Big Tech did NOT win, and their Soviet-style censorship tactics were thwarted. After major outcry from our supporters and several media outlets, Google put the PragerU app back on the Google Play Store...for now. Unfortunately, we know this won’t be the last time we are targeted by Big Tech giants. It is imperative that we keep fighting for our freedoms. **[**At PragerU, we always fight back, but we need your help.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ef797e7b633b40e7a2b185bde65705ef&_e=3b6Djfcbx1R8lbwxrLBCce4YILQyPuigVDXevhpJPsoIvxnyrHqO-Snm5m9kvNMJl6Yn0rlofsynzOpSOowDttNZaNdpbxMfFZ1bXl0crYgWD-DeLVolMRJyOiHXSG6suCN75LiI8NH8Fvd0EByRiaNvP72EObc15XYLIfUpWWdEQbTpYCohACQBGg_Fg_A0AATMeLQWvqOojB-YLXUs9Fnz_ludeYznblq1XDdi-_28uJABz-V1X2phZC5cjWjAPFVPQt_2yOuz9QqZGCxHxA%3D%3D)** This is a David vs. Goliath battle.
