clean_body: This is a David vs. Goliath battle.| | | | | In case you missed it, Google recently removed the PragerU app from the Play Store without warning. Only after our app disappeared from Google’s platform did they bother to notify us that it had been suspended and removed indefinitely for “Violation of Hate Speech.” In the email from Google, they said our app contained “content or speech asserting that a protected group is inhuman, inferior, or worthy of being hated,” referring to our recently released short documentary, Dear Infidels: A Warning to America , which features first-hand accounts from individuals who escaped the oppressive grip of radical Islamic rule. According to Google, sharing the stories of a former Palestinian refugee, an Arab Muslim born in Israel, and brave U.S. Navy SEALs who witnessed the horrors of Muslim extremism constitutes “hate speech.” Dear Infidels went viral on social media, reaching millions of people! Like clockwork, Big Tech reared its ugly head to shut us down and suppress our reach. We immediately jumped into action and began sounding the alarm. Thanks to our dedicated followers and supporters, Big Tech did NOT win, and their Soviet-style censorship tactics were thwarted. After major outcry from our supporters and several media outlets, Google put the PragerU app back on the Google Play Store...for now. Unfortunately, we know this won’t be the last time we are targeted by Big Tech giants. It is imperative that we keep fighting for our freedoms. This is a David vs. Goliath battle. They may expect us to give up and throw in the towel, but as long as there is breath in our lungs, and courageous supporters like you standing beside us, we refuse to be silenced. Your generous tax-deductible donation will help us to keep fighting Big Tech, expand our reach, and continue our mission to educate and inspire Americans with the truth. Every TRIPLE-MATCHED dollar counts in this battle for free speech and the future of our nation. Donate now to 3X your gift and ensure PragerU’s voice remains loud and clear! Sincerely, Your PragerU team | | 15021 Ventura Blvd. #552 Sherman Oaks, CA 91403

name: Debbie
subject: I can't do this without you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T07111696-bc05-4849-8f42-4fdcdbcc14fc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| We did it, Peter — I am now the official Democratic nominee in a race that could determine which party will control the Senate. I couldn't have gotten this far without supporters like you, and as we enter the final lap of the race, your continued support is the only way I'll win: Especially when recent polls show this race statistically tied. Even though CNN calls Rick Scott one of the most vulnerable senators on the map, his campaign still has hundreds of millions of dollars of his personal fortune at its disposal to fuel the most bizarre and dishonest attack ads possible about me. I need my message to beat his to the chase, and I can't do that without you. [So with the primary behind us, the real battle begins now — and I'm counting on 20,000 supporters getting on board by midnight to show the GOP that our grassroots movement is unstoppable. Please, will you donate $5 to split between me and Blue Amp Action and become an official General Election Founding Donor, help me retire Rick Scott, and flip Florida blue?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7c6499f2-4b66-4f25-adbd-3cf32513433d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T21f05e69-6998-48e3-8856-2adde692d3e2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [Donate Now >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcad0c74a-85c2-4cb1-8a68-7a235382ef99/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Thing is, Peter, this race was always bigger than just me defeating Rick Scott. There's so much more at stake, like stopping a Scott-run Senate from green-lighting all Trump's worst authoritarian whims, or holding the Supreme Court accountable, and saving abortion here in Florida. And with not just Scott but shady outside entities spending millions to keep Florida red, our reproductive freedoms under their thumb, and our voices silenced, we can't have anyone sitting on the sidelines from here on out. [Our movement is now closer than ever to flipping Florida blue, so if you're with me in this from now until November, then please Peter: Will you be one of the first people to become a General Election Founding Donor with your donation of $5 or more to split between me and Blue Amp Action today?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T63d363a3-15f9-453a-8ff0-9c7f80b20cc6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
|
---
| | | | | Truly, thank you so much for believing in me and this movement — I hope to see your name on that list. Debbie Mucarsel-Powell

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf72061c6-e898-48c4-99cd-94c84d0e6919/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Cory Booker
subject: What we're facing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | [](https://go.dscc.org/go/19618?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20240825-CoryBooker-BookerShortFR-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20240825-CoryBooker-BookerShortFR-ETG-sl1&akid=16833%2E9716520%2E_Ig9sD)
**Friend -- We're just 72 days away from Election Day, and we have the momentum. But it’s up to us to keep it going.**

Americans are rallying behind Kamala Harris and Democrats in droves -- with a level of energy that is nothing short of inspiring. But Trump is back on the campaign trail, his megadonors are rushing millions into races across the country, and we’re still only a couple of seats away from losing our Senate majority.

It’s not just a question of what we’re up against _right now_ \-- it’s a question of what our nation will face if we let Trump and his allies win in November. We can’t afford to lose the amazing strides we’ve made -- so we need to work together to continue our progress.

**[We MUST unite to win in November -- and that starts with what we do _today._ Will you join the movement to defend our progress and Senate majority by chipping in $5 to the DSCC now? For the next few hours, your gift will be tripled to have even more of an impact >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/19618?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20240825-CoryBooker-BookerShortFR-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20240825-CoryBooker-BookerShortFR-ETG-sl1&akid=16833%2E9716520%2E_Ig9sD)**

body:

# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=7313%2E5257348%2EZGaRmL)
Derek —
We’re heading toward some very important dates, and we wanted to make sure you were up to speed on what’s coming up:
**August 31, 2024**
Our end-of-month fundraising deadline is just 6 days away. It’s crucial that we meet our fundraising goals now so that we can have enough resources for ads and other voter outreach methods, especially this close to the election.
**October 7, 2024**
Mail-in ballots in California will be sent out by October 7. Over these next 43 days, our team will work tirelessly on the ground to reach undecided voters and demonstrate that Adam is the best candidate to represent the people of California in the U.S. Senate.
**November 5, 2024**
Election Day will be here before we know it! We only have 10 weeks left to energize and motivate voters to support VP Kamala Harris and keep Trump away from the White House.
**[With a full calendar of crucial campaign dates, we need your help. Derek, will you contribute $3 to help us meet these crucial fundraising goals, elect Adam to the U.S. Senate, and secure major victories for Democrats?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=aug2024_abs_em.nPj3QZ&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240825_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=4&akid=7313%2E5257348%2EZGaRmL)**

In the wake of Joe Biden's [long](https://substack.com/redirect/88e2aafc-c833-4617-abdc-a949bac9a19d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) overdue [withdrawal](https://substack.com/redirect/2585741d-9813-4f24-aa38-f497ab9661e4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) from the 2024 presidential election race and his replacement by Vice President Kamala Harris, Democrats celebrated themes at their national convention including unity, joy, and defending democracy. Buried under the enthusiasm, however, are some uncomfortable realities that most Democrats--and the journalists who enable them--have preferred to ignore.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6461a5ed-6a67-4263-8024-02db4f3ebffc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
### **Democrats support imperialism**
[No Palestinians were allowed](https://substack.com/redirect/2b6fbb43-e7d8-4897-814f-fd8070af4a03?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to speak at the DNC, even though an Uncommitted movement responding to the continuing U.S.-enabled Israeli genocide in Gaza registered nearly a million votes in Democratic primaries across the country. Meanwhile, human rights activists at the DNC were [brutalized and arrested by the dozens](https://substack.com/redirect/4cf545d6-aa8d-43be-8f77-e15872c0db5a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
[Not for the first time](https://substack.com/redirect/fc6189cb-201d-43c9-aea3-f0efc3a1f7f0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the job of expressing outrage over the disturbing failures of party elites fell to comedians unfettered by co-opted editors. For instance, [Jon Stewart ](https://substack.com/redirect/b5f861ed-e4f1-4ca7-9501-5047bae9c7ac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)noted that on the stage at the DNC, "Black Americans, Hispanic Americans, Asian Americans, gay Americans, [and] Jewish Americans," all had a chance to speak, while Americans of Palestinian descent were entirely excluded while facing police brutality outside the convention site.
While Kamala has [rhetorically](https://substack.com/redirect/ebca043e-4c2a-4062-a5c7-75b5f3786ebe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) indicated some independence from Biden's foreign policy, nothing suggests that she would reign in Israel, or consider suspending weapons shipments. In fact, she appears [poised to continue](https://substack.com/redirect/ffca3a73-e92c-4204-ad1c-e2d9efdf0dec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Biden's strategy of deferring to Netanyahu while bleating about human rights abuses enabled by weapons exports approved in Washington.

[ Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=148088904&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQ4MDg4OTA0LCJpYXQiOjE3MjQ2MDA0MzEsImV4cCI6MTcyNzE5MjQzMSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.tRGreLiUx8ioGzVXRuIRvQxVGO3-UL6AMzt0PWZ3XBo)
Similarly, Democrats brag about their [commitment to proxy war](https://substack.com/redirect/1dcaf030-86de-4cc7-b681-8b09fbaf393a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in Eastern Europe, relying on their supporters to forget [the 2014 coup](https://substack.com/redirect/4c114fdb-4efe-434d-b3f3-00bb8384797d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that instigated Russian aggression toward Ukraine. Wrapping their militarism in the flag of "defending democracy," they also enjoy the support of journalists who conveniently ignore long-standing U.S. support for autocrats and dictators, pretending that the US has not been a consistent threat to peace around the world for the last 3/4 of a century.
Some writers and Democratic Party activists do pay attention, and have reacted accordingly. For instance, Mehdi Hasan--who has already [faced retaliation](https://substack.com/redirect/d91f53a1-d8ed-47cb-aa50-f44171f5d096?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) from a national network based on his choice to report the truth despite the insistence of editors favoring propaganda--[wrote powerfully](https://substack.com/redirect/d91f53a1-d8ed-47cb-aa50-f44171f5d096?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that:
> If they have time and space for a former Republican congressman, and for Israeli family members of a hostage, they have time and space for an elected Palestinian Democratic lawmaker. Anything else is straight up racism and erasure.
Accordingly, on Wednesday, Muslim Women for Harris, a grassroots group previously supporting Kamala's campaign, officially [disbanded](https://substack.com/redirect/49dffa8f-2324-4309-8226-79e8efaf77f5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The group posted a [poignant statement](https://substack.com/redirect/f9e2412c-13b8-4f3e-97f9-aa0bb51e0e00?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) observing that:
> The family of [Israeli hostage Hersh Goldberg-Polin] was on the stage tonight and has shown more empathy towards Palestinian Americans and Palestinians than our candidate or the DNC has. This is a terrible message to send to Democrats.
To be fair, the bipartisan commitment to militarism has unified Washington long before Kamala Harris became the Democratic nominee for president. Biden was an active agent of it during his many years in the Senate, and continued to defend American imperialism even as he was removed as the party's nominee.
In [his speech on Monday night](https://substack.com/redirect/377beaa1-dec2-45ac-b489-fb1e9e15a5a5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), Biden managed to lie almost as much as Trump typically does, enabled by professional journalists unwilling to fact check his comments. For instance, the _New York Times_ uncritically [repeated](https://substack.com/redirect/76d66c89-3370-4d55-bcba-6805c5504a29?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) his words, reporting that "Biden has defined the United States as the leading player in an alliance to combat autocracy. 'Who can lead the world other than the United States of America?' he asked last night."
While the _New York Times_ had better things to do than observe Biden's consistent support for autocrats from Israel's Benjamin Netanyahu to India's Narendra Modi, other writers have been willing to call it out. For instance, writer Kwame Osei correctly described Biden's comments as "a nationalistic speech replete with American exceptionalism," and cited his rhetorical question above as a case in point. Similarly, Debasish Roy Chowdhury [observed](https://substack.com/redirect/7ef4ae4f-f71a-4af4-bc0f-bc094eb7747e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in _Time_ magazine--three years ago--that Biden's claim to support democracy abroad is so preposterous that it could form the butt of a joke.
Similarly, Malaika Jabali [insightfully observed](https://substack.com/redirect/b83ba348-6544-456e-82fa-cb80a04043a4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that:
> After the largest demonstration against police violence in the U.S., we gained a pro-police administration in 2020. After possibly the biggest movement for Palestinian liberation we have witnessed while seeing the depths of America's imperialist violence, patriotism is being whipped into a frenzy....America is indeed an empire. Its leaders will always serve that function, whatever the party, whatever the race.
Sadly, that commitment to militarism is an institutional one shared widely by today's Democrats, regardless of which particular figure stands at the top of the ticket.
### **Imperialism infects both foreign and domestic policy**
Kamala's support for the Pentagon and America's military industrial complex doesn't stop at the border. The domestic face of militarism includes policing, to which she has been not only thoroughly committed, but on which she built a career preying on the public. Border security is another domestic component of militarism to which Harris appears publicly committed, despite the party's rhetoric supporting human rights.

Kamala's background in criminal justice is dangerously conservative. For instance, as California's Attorney General, she [breathed life into the death penalty](https://substack.com/redirect/5e284bea-19cf-480a-93b3-f9b96472ec4c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in a state that had prolifically repudiated it.
The _Los Angeles Times_ editorial board [wrote](https://substack.com/redirect/48d62ccf-462f-44cc-aa92-0394b332270c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) at the time to praise her decision, describing it as "putting professional responsibility over personal politics," while also noticing inconsistency in Harris choosing not to support a ballot proposition that aimed to halt same-sex marriages. They concluded that "Harris' response to the two cases suggests a willingness to pick and choose the limits of professional obligation."
Harris also pioneered a disturbing statewide reform effort enabling the criminal prosecution of parents based on their children's truancy. HuffPost's Molly Redden [wrote about the human costs](https://substack.com/redirect/6cb3fa32-3493-4cb9-8d10-a58d8819afb5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of Kamala's truancy program in 2019. Her [appearance](https://substack.com/redirect/bdb0be86-b63b-424b-9b8c-24d10f0b21d9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on NPR's Code Switch program in 2020 helped explain why it disproportionately affected families of color.
Kamala's support for predatory policing is a big reason why she struggled during the presidential primaries in 2020. She did not win a single state--not even the one that she represented in the U.S. Senate.
Ultimately, the support Kamala received before being anointed as the party's presidential candidate came mostly from moderates. She is a creature of the Pelosi wing of the party--and having built her career in the very same city, with the same set of wealthy supporters, herself a Pelosi protege.
### **A memoir missing some details **
On the eve of the convention, Pelosi [published](https://substack.com/redirect/cb1fd1b3-1ebe-48be-86a0-b70fab1e9b6c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) a memoir titled "The Art of Power," acclaimed by professional journalists dedicated to supporting power rather than critiquing it. The timing of the publication exemplifies Pelosi's unfortunate and longstanding commitment to leveraging her office to [fill her family's pockets](https://substack.com/redirect/ba8084bb-3a21-474b-a7d7-2ebcf2be4d88?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). It also conveniently reified her [cult of personality](https://substack.com/redirect/499a5822-e3e2-4122-85ef-6ff7933a1033?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), predictably overlooking the parts of Pelosi's history that she would rather not publicize.
For instance, Pelosi's role as an [enabler](https://substack.com/redirect/5b86b3b3-ba3f-49d2-9025-2c25daa41df8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of the domestic surveillance state and recurring wars for profit did not make the narrative. Nor did her [infamous decisions](https://substack.com/redirect/8dc570b1-3464-43c1-b0af-4604041f8e93?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to fund Trump's border concentration camps, [delay](https://substack.com/redirect/d80eee99-b42c-42da-b4d3-ba768abead64?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) his impeachment proceedings, or [limit](https://substack.com/redirect/2939dcbe-35bd-4901-bfa5-99d3d7ad2cdc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) his impeachment charges to avoid exposing the unfortunately bipartisan pattern of self-enrichment at the taxpayers' expense.
Also missing from Pelosi's narrative was a reflection on how she went to Congress, and how she has held her seat for the past 37 years. Her supporters pretend that she is a political genius, but the facts suggest that privilege has played as much a role in her career as acumen.
Pelosi was born to a powerful family enabled by connections to organized crime, and hand-picked for her congressional seat by its former occupant based on her fundraising prowess. Once in office, she never debated an opponent during the nearly four decades she has represented San Francisco in Washington. [Ducking debates](https://substack.com/redirect/dd3abd51-4a87-45d9-9282-4954970a8b84?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), however, is only part of Pelosi's strategy.
Pelosi has also played the press like a fiddle, relying on [sycophants among journalists](https://substack.com/redirect/b7237114-a765-4340-8b61-bc27600c5650?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to perform several functions. Writers covering her work have consistently mislead the public about her bizarrely conservative policy record, while also covering up her longstanding and continuing corruption. Others have chosen to [smear her challengers](https://substack.com/redirect/74808569-d339-4956-952b-c71df769fa13?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) leveraging [racist](https://substack.com/redirect/b3a0c231-dc4d-46c0-a4c8-ddf321d9b10d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) tropes (while others chose instead to [ignore and obscure](https://substack.com/redirect/93293b03-8052-468b-a164-0d8408c8f30f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) us) on the rare occasion that we have managed to draw political blood.
### **Light without heat**
Democrats have been eager to promote a narrative about spreading joy, optimism, and unity.
But the unity they promote is a fiction enabled only by the deference of some among them to the continuing corruption of American politics in the service of capital and state violence.
Earlier this year, two members of the SquadTM [lost their primaries](https://substack.com/redirect/08d21039-86aa-43f3-a1da-f36f253890c6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in contested elections heavily influenced by AIPAC money. Two of the remaining members, Ilhan Omar and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, found themselves [at odds](https://substack.com/redirect/bd2ffc96-9c72-44a2-baac-db6c207b1dd6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) this week over whether to enable the party's imperialism. Papering over concerns about human rights violations enabled by U.S. weapons shipments represents not unity, but conciliation.
It is especially remarkable that so many Democrats lack the spine to challenge Israel, when even the head of the Israeli Shin Bet security service has taken the courageous step of [recognizing](https://substack.com/redirect/98718fd3-87d9-4def-81ab-e3ddfa6d8d46?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) right wing Israeli settlers in the west bank as "terrorists." It seems that Democrats are less concerned about human rights abuses than the officials of states who leaders are [wanted by international jurists](https://substack.com/redirect/618012fe-98bb-4991-bf6d-7838019c7332?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
It makes sense why Democrats are enthused, if only because their previous nominee was moribund and appeared to be [sleepwalking](https://substack.com/redirect/d23d44e4-f7c8-4a69-8f67-b26ab9f191fe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) into an election defeat that he described as presaging the end of democracy in America.
But the self-congratulation of Democrats who have grown increasingly confident about their prospects in November ignores the hole in the bucket of democracy: an impregnable bipartisan consensus favoring human rights abuses from Gaza to our nation's borders, and [every hospital](https://substack.com/redirect/72d61a6f-7b8d-42e7-985e-4bc73c13c691?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) across the United States.
Democracy Now! co-host Juan Gonzalez summed up the moment when [reporting](https://substack.com/redirect/7e5766f0-3267-4a85-9b8d-0136d406b846?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on the convention:
> One of the things that struck me most was the level...of choreographed mass spectacle, that would be worthy of...Hitler's filmmaker and propagandist in terms of controlling the narrative that the American people receive of what the Democratic party is about....
> [B]oth the Republican Convention and the Democratic Convention show the two faces of American capitalism. On the one hand, with the Republicans, you have a party of white supremacist capitalism, of anti-immigrant xenophobia, of patriarchy, and of war on the working class.
> Now, this past week, we've seen the party of multiracial, neoliberal capitalism, a party that seeks a kindler, gentler form of mass deportation and border militarization, and one that is even more aggressive in the imperial policies of the United States than even the Republican party...and both parties having a disconnect with the rest of the world.
### **Live to fight another day?**
Retired Fourth Circuit judge Michael Luttig made waves this week by [endorsing](https://substack.com/redirect/df71e3bf-9e3f-4a7d-9e69-90d93d4d3b88?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Kamala Harris, despite his preferences for conservative policies. He described his endorsement as setting aside those preferences for the sake of democracy, leaving in place a mechanism for the country to resolve its many disagreements in the future.
On the one hand, Luttig is an admirable figure. Despite his lifelong conservatism, he has frequently stood up to the corruption of leaders in Washington, including those from his own party. His [historic decision in the ](https://substack.com/redirect/d090c88b-981c-4805-b4ba-13e62d8cdd31?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[Padilla](https://substack.com/redirect/d090c88b-981c-4805-b4ba-13e62d8cdd31?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[military detention case](https://substack.com/redirect/d090c88b-981c-4805-b4ba-13e62d8cdd31?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) reflected a continuing commitment to human rights and due process, and demonstrated a laudable judicial independence. Luttig's decision challenged the bipartisan consensus in Congress to abandon due process, and also undermined his own ambitions to one day serve on the Supreme Court, for which he was previously poised as a rumored figure on the short list for George W. Bush's appointees. Luttig's later decision to walk away from his lifetime appointment as a federal appellate judge resembled falling on a principled sword.
In any case, Luttig's endorsement of Kamala Harris itself reflects how meaningless is her supposed commitment to progressive principles. Harris is a cipher created by party elites, on whom observers have projected various political fantasies. Luttig may be willing to switch parties and sides for the sake of defending democracy, and that understandably seems like a good thing to Democrats terrified about Trump.
But putting in office yet another [centrist](https://substack.com/redirect/92702b9e-9c69-4b8d-b860-c84822f1011f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Democrat willing to silence the voices most concerned about human rights abuses does not bode well for the future. Democrats, however, delighted in their celebration, cheering on the military industrial complex with their hands in the air while chanting Beyonce lyrics.
_Paid subscribers can access a further discussion about self-inflicted wounds. It discusses how former President Donald Trump embodies the concept for both Democrats and Republicans. It also explores two sets of self-inflicted wounds committed & endured by Democrats that may still threaten the party's prospects in the November election..._

The Democratic Party is riding a wave of enthusiasm, despite remaining committed to right wing goals | | | Aug 25| | | ∙| | Preview ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | In the wake of Joe Biden's overdue from the 2024 presidential election race and his replacement by Vice President Kamala Harris, Democrats celebrated themes at their national convention including unity, joy, and defending democracy. Buried under the enthusiasm, however, are some uncomfortable realities that most Democrats--and the journalists who enable them--have preferred to ignore. | | ---|---|--- Democrats support imperialism to speak at the DNC, even though an Uncommitted movement responding to the continuing U.S.-enabled Israeli genocide in Gaza registered nearly a million votes in Democratic primaries across the country. Meanwhile, human rights activists at the DNC were . , the job of expressing outrage over the disturbing failures of party elites fell to comedians unfettered by co-opted editors. For instance, that on the stage at the DNC, "Black Americans, Hispanic Americans, Asian Americans, gay Americans, [and] Jewish Americans," all had a chance to speak, while Americans of Palestinian descent were entirely excluded while facing police brutality outside the convention site. While Kamala has indicated some independence from Biden's foreign policy, nothing suggests that she would reign in Israel, or consider suspending weapons shipments. In fact, she appears Biden's strategy of deferring to Netanyahu while bleating about human rights abuses enabled by weapons exports approved in Washington. Thanks for reading Chronicles of a Dying Empire! You can help inform your friends by sharing this post. Similarly, Democrats brag about their in Eastern Europe, relying on their supporters to forget that instigated Russian aggression toward Ukraine. Wrapping their militarism in the flag of "defending democracy," they also enjoy the support of journalists who conveniently ignore long-standing U.S. support for autocrats and dictators, pretending that the US has not been a consistent threat to peace around the world for the last 3/4 of a century. Some writers and Democratic Party activists do pay attention, and have reacted accordingly. For instance, Mehdi Hasan--who has already from a national network based on his choice to report the truth despite the insistence of editors favoring propaganda-- that: If they have time and space for a former Republican congressman, and for Israeli family members of a hostage, they have time and space for an elected Palestinian Democratic lawmaker. Anything else is straight up racism and erasure. Accordingly, on Wednesday, Muslim Women for Harris, a grassroots group previously supporting Kamala's campaign, officially . The group posted a observing that: The family of [Israeli hostage Hersh Goldberg-Polin] was on the stage tonight and has shown more empathy towards Palestinian Americans and Palestinians than our candidate or the DNC has. This is a terrible message to send to Democrats. To be fair, the bipartisan commitment to militarism has unified Washington long before Kamala Harris became the Democratic nominee for president. Biden was an active agent of it during his many years in the Senate, and continued to defend American imperialism even as he was removed as the party's nominee. In , Biden managed to lie almost as much as Trump typically does, enabled by professional journalists unwilling to fact check his comments. For instance, the New York Times uncritically his words, reporting that "Biden has defined the United States as the leading player in an alliance to combat autocracy. 'Who can lead the world other than the United States of America?' he asked last night." While the New York Times had better things to do than observe Biden's consistent support for autocrats from Israel's Benjamin Netanyahu to India's Narendra Modi, other writers have been willing to call it out. For instance, writer Kwame Osei correctly described Biden's comments as "a nationalistic speech replete with American exceptionalism," and cited his rhetorical question above as a case in point. Similarly, Debasish Roy Chowdhury in Time magazine--three years ago--that Biden's claim to support democracy abroad is so preposterous that it could form the butt of a joke. Similarly, Malaika Jabali that: After the largest demonstration against police violence in the U.S., we gained a pro-police administration in 2020. After possibly the biggest movement for Palestinian liberation we have witnessed while seeing the depths of America's imperialist violence, patriotism is being whipped into a frenzy....America is indeed an empire. Its leaders will always serve that function, whatever the party, whatever the race. Sadly, that commitment to militarism is an institutional one shared widely by today's Democrats, regardless of which particular figure stands at the top of the ticket. Imperialism infects both foreign and domestic policy Kamala's support for the Pentagon and America's military industrial complex doesn't stop at the border. The domestic face of militarism includes policing, to which she has been not only thoroughly committed, but on which she built a career preying on the public. Border security is another domestic component of militarism to which Harris appears publicly committed, despite the party's rhetoric supporting human rights. Chronicles of a Dying Empire is a publication supported by readers, rather than advertisers. To receive new posts,sign up for a free subscription! To support my work, please consider becoming a paid subscriber. Kamala's background in criminal justice is dangerously conservative. For instance, as California's Attorney General, she in a state that had prolifically repudiated it. The Los Angeles Times editorial board at the time to praise her decision, describing it as "putting professional responsibility over personal politics," while also noticing inconsistency in Harris choosing not to support a ballot proposition that aimed to halt same-sex marriages. They concluded that "Harris' response to the two cases suggests a willingness to pick and choose the limits of professional obligation." Harris also pioneered a disturbing statewide reform effort enabling the criminal prosecution of parents based on their children's truancy. HuffPost's Molly Redden of Kamala's truancy program in 2019. Her on NPR's Code Switch program in 2020 helped explain why it disproportionately affected families of color. Kamala's support for predatory policing is a big reason why she struggled during the presidential primaries in 2020. She did not win a single state--not even the one that she represented in the U.S. Senate. Ultimately, the support Kamala received before being anointed as the party's presidential candidate came mostly from moderates. She is a creature of the Pelosi wing of the party--and having built her career in the very same city, with the same set of wealthy supporters, herself a Pelosi protege. A memoir missing some details On the eve of the convention, Pelosi a memoir titled "The Art of Power," acclaimed by professional journalists dedicated to supporting power rather than critiquing it. The timing of the publication exemplifies Pelosi's unfortunate and longstanding commitment to leveraging her office to . It also conveniently reified her , predictably overlooking the parts of Pelosi's history that she would rather not publicize. For instance, Pelosi's role as an of the domestic surveillance state and recurring wars for profit did not make the narrative. Nor did her to fund Trump's border concentration camps, his impeachment proceedings, or his impeachment charges to avoid exposing the unfortunately bipartisan pattern of self-enrichment at the taxpayers' expense. Also missing from Pelosi's narrative was a reflection on how she went to Congress, and how she has held her seat for the past 37 years. Her supporters pretend that she is a political genius, but the facts suggest that privilege has played as much a role in her career as acumen. Pelosi was born to a powerful family enabled by connections to organized crime, and hand-picked for her congressional seat by its former occupant based on her fundraising prowess. Once in office, she never debated an opponent during the nearly four decades she has represented San Francisco in Washington. , however, is only part of Pelosi's strategy. Pelosi has also played the press like a fiddle, relying on to perform several functions. Writers covering her work have consistently mislead the public about her bizarrely conservative policy record, while also covering up her longstanding and continuing corruption. Others have chosen to leveraging tropes (while others chose instead to us) on the rare occasion that we have managed to draw political blood. Light without heat Democrats have been eager to promote a narrative about spreading joy, optimism, and unity. But the unity they promote is a fiction enabled only by the deference of some among them to the continuing corruption of American politics in the service of capital and state violence. Earlier this year, two members of the SquadTM in contested elections heavily influenced by AIPAC money. Two of the remaining members, Ilhan Omar and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, found themselves this week over whether to enable the party's imperialism. Papering over concerns about human rights violations enabled by U.S. weapons shipments represents not unity, but conciliation. It is especially remarkable that so many Democrats lack the spine to challenge Israel, when even the head of the Israeli Shin Bet security service has taken the courageous step of right wing Israeli settlers in the west bank as "terrorists." It seems that Democrats are less concerned about human rights abuses than the officials of states who leaders are . It makes sense why Democrats are enthused, if only because their previous nominee was moribund and appeared to be into an election defeat that he described as presaging the end of democracy in America. But the self-congratulation of Democrats who have grown increasingly confident about their prospects in November ignores the hole in the bucket of democracy: an impregnable bipartisan consensus favoring human rights abuses from Gaza to our nation's borders, and across the United States. Democracy Now! co-host Juan Gonzalez summed up the moment when on the convention: One of the things that struck me most was the level...of choreographed mass spectacle, that would be worthy of...Hitler's filmmaker and propagandist in terms of controlling the narrative that the American people receive of what the Democratic party is about.... [B]oth the Republican Convention and the Democratic Convention show the two faces of American capitalism. On the one hand, with the Republicans, you have a party of white supremacist capitalism, of anti-immigrant xenophobia, of patriarchy, and of war on the working class. Now, this past week, we've seen the party of multiracial, neoliberal capitalism, a party that seeks a kindler, gentler form of mass deportation and border militarization, and one that is even more aggressive in the imperial policies of the United States than even the Republican party...and both parties having a disconnect with the rest of the world. Live to fight another day? Retired Fourth Circuit judge Michael Luttig made waves this week by Kamala Harris, despite his preferences for conservative policies. _**[Take it from me, the Senate needs more conservative veterans -- and we have a chance to get the job done in November.](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyUkbGO3CAQhp8Gd6zsAdvrwsVJlqtsbnUpUiLWDLtcAFsD9ilvH3HZS5-W4Z-f7-PnRV208y7ev-uAo_WkKKlIaeEP9Btf1piQDp3dgQpqkLw-c2hVU5mxbgYjZYVj04PsaiHapnqM51Zr20pshrO0UluhZW-HAfrzYGvb2cqNZU99hrZpZSv6U2sG0xrR171dbp0FJmvtkfLJEqJZg47GuxtS_k24rZRPyxoqPz5y3hITLwxmBnPCZSc8fbhIaMoNBnPBYDAfmBNPm3eZv9_4pjmWiJj3HFRA4_bAxIRBO8-gK4dp3WlBJqYVwqcLtennaNFh0-4emZieFEJFrWjhpeVfydGo64t6v-n466_NZzwvTEzztzfgXw6-9q4xY8xMTHaPhrRLLt4ZdKkEXuFyfXv9cWXQUcGkMhNTph0ZdDrkbU0uu7W8SlY0mu3Dee9S1zNZ3wvYp7L8P997jPAnAAD__wQlsSU)**_

name: Jon T.
subject: slump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
We have to make up serious ground
| | |
---
This doesn't make any sense, folks:
**A group of generous donors is matching every donation supporters make to my campaign until midnight, but somehow we're still short of our weekly fundraising goal.**
National Republicans have made defeating me a top priority and experts are rating my Senate race a tossup, so I really need your support to compete against my self-funding opponent and the waves of outside spending crashing into Montana.
This slowdown could not have come at a worse time. While outside special interest groups ramp up, with $4 million in new spending, our fundraising is slowing to a crawl.
I’m not here to beg for a donation, but falling short has real consequences. If everyone who received this email chipped in $5, we could close the gap _tonight_ , but the truth is not everyone will.
**[So I’m humbly reaching out to ask you to split a donation before midnight and help reach these crucial goals. Team Sherrod
**Please read on for a personal message from Sen. Sherrod Brown:** Friend – thank you for being a part of our grassroots movement and for sharing our commitment to the Dignity of Work. Fighting for workers means building an economy that prioritizes the needs of workers over tax breaks for billionaires and corporations. body:
Every time I see a new attack on abortion rights and women’s reproductive freedoms, I think of my dad.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91498880/494030030/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTQ1NzExMi1mYjYyLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NcHDYuLgWu5Fz3oLJ6F1Uz4-Cyr0xcu9QnS77Yw4kNI=&emci=f35a2b00-4162-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&emdi=45457112-fb62-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&ceid=19445147)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91498881/494030031/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTQ1NzExMi1mYjYyLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NcHDYuLgWu5Fz3oLJ6F1Uz4-Cyr0xcu9QnS77Yw4kNI=&emci=f35a2b00-4162-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&emdi=45457112-fb62-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&ceid=19445147)
Hello,
Every time I see a new attack on abortion rights and women’s reproductive freedoms, I think of my dad.
For the first few years of my life, my family lived on an Indian reservation in Northern Montana. Dad was an OB-GYN – in the years before _Roe v. Wade_ ...
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91498882/494030032/1610638071?refcode=em20240825mid-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=45457112-fb62-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTQ1NzExMi1mYjYyLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NcHDYuLgWu5Fz3oLJ6F1Uz4-Cyr0xcu9QnS77Yw4kNI=)
Years later, Dad recounted how he saw patients that came from all walks of life. Black, brown, and white. Younger and older. Rich and poor. And just as many Republicans walked through his doors as did Democrats.
Looking back, having a father who provided women with access to health care – especially at a time when so many were being denied the right – really shaped how I think about the issue.
My dad is in his 80’s and retired now, but for years, he helped train the next generation of health care providers at Planned Parenthood. And my sister, who later also became an OB-GYN, is continuing on his legacy.
**Extremists like Lauren Boebert and my new Republican opponent want you to think that women having the freedom to make their own medical decisions is some extreme idea. It’s not.**
What’s extreme is pushing a bill in Congress that would make all abortions illegal – including in cases of rape or incest – and wanting to ban a medication that’s been approved for decades for abortions and miscarriages.
Their views are a fringe one – supported by people who think that the government should be dictating women’s medical decisions, instead of allowing women the freedom to make choices with their doctor.
I would have thought that after almost losing this seat last year, they might have at least pretended to moderate on this issue. But they've only doubled down on the extreme.
**Only 546 votes separated Lauren Boebert and me in 2022, and I’m ready to finish the job in 2024 by winning this seat in Congress.**
[**Please, if you’re able to, will you consider chipping in to my campaign today to help me win this critical House seat? Our race was the closest in the country, but I’m not taking money from corporate PACs. I’m counting on grassroots donors like you if I’m going to win.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91498883/494030033/1610638071?refcode=em20240825mid-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=45457112-fb62-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTQ1NzExMi1mYjYyLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NcHDYuLgWu5Fz3oLJ6F1Uz4-Cyr0xcu9QnS77Yw4kNI=)

body:
Less than 25% of the people receiving this have given -- which is why Senator Murphy is counting on those who truly understand the stakes of this election.
#

🇺🇸To all Chris Murphy supporters 🧢
Please don’t click away from this important request. We know this isn’t the first time we’ve asked for your financial support, but please hear us out.

If every Chris Murphy supporter donated even $3, we would not only send a powerful message about the demand to change our gun laws, but we would have the resources to elect gun safety champions up and down the ballot who will help us pass universal background checks and an assault weapons ban.

Unfortunately, less than 25% of the people receiving this have given -- which is why Senator Murphy is counting on those who truly understand the stakes of this election to contribute. We cannot take our progress or our freedom for granted.

And the truth is our task is even harder because Chris refuses to take money from PACs and corporations. He’s passionate about that model. Our movement is powered by people just like because power comes from the bottom-up.

**If re-electing Chris and making progressive change in Washington is worth $3 to you, then we are asking you to do just that:**

# FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Reader,**I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.

I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.

**But there's also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be.

I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way.

**The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun.** A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.**My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.**

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts.
---

body:
|

Folks, Hopefully you haven’t had the displeasure of listening to a Trump rally lately. But if you have, you may have noticed he’s been *obsessed* with Hannibal Lecter lately. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91500018/494033227/1071238057?refcode=em-8.25.24-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWQyNzBlMi1mYzYyLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PbqXWvbhNa3_RKwznv4FIgn-SmeJuztwMLlqRjy6A7Q=) _Yes, that Hannibal Lecter....._ Seriously, he talks about this fictional character every chance he gets: | _**"Has anyone seen The Silence of the Lambs? The late, great Hannibal Lecter.”**
\- Donald Trump, July 19 in Wisconsin at his RNC acceptance speech_ _**“The late great Hannibal Lecter. They say why would he mention Hannibal Lecter, he must be cognitively in trouble. No. These are real stories.”**
\- Donald Trump, July 24 in North Carolina_ _**“You know, they go crazy when I mention Dr. Hannibal Lecter. You know who that was. He was a slightly troubled patient in an insane asylum.”**
\- Donald Trump, July 27 in Minnesota_
---
It’s all just very, very strange...
Instead of focusing on issues that impact everyday Americans, Trump is just going on hours-long monologues – about nothing.
But don’t let this weird behavior distract you from how truly dangerous Donald Trump is.
This is the same guy who incited an insurrection, called for the “termination” of parts of the Constitution, and even promised to be a ‘dictator on day one.’
[**Trump and his MAGA allies are a clear and present danger to our democracy, and we need strong Democratic Secretaries of State who will defend our democracy. clean_body: | = Folks, Hopefully you haven’t had the displeasure of listening to a Trump rally lately. But if you have, you may have noticed he’s been obsessed with Hannibal Lecter lately. = Yes, that Hannibal Lecter..... Seriously, he talks about this fictional character every chance he gets: | "Has anyone seen The Silence of the Lambs? The late, great Hannibal Lecter.” \- Donald Trump, July 19 in Wisconsin at his RNC acceptance speech “The late great Hannibal Lecter. They say why would he mention Hannibal Lecter, he must be cognitively in trouble. No. These are real stories.” \- Donald Trump, July 24 in North Carolina “You know, they go crazy when I mention Dr. Hannibal Lecter. You know who that was. He was a slightly troubled patient in an insane asylum.” \- Donald Trump, July 27 in Minnesota It’s all just very, very strange... Instead of focusing on issues that impact everyday Americans, Trump is just going on hours-long monologues – about nothing. But don’t let this weird behavior distract you from how truly dangerous Donald Trump is. Hello, I’m Gavin Newsom – Governor of California.
I intend to spend the next several months working to defeat Donald Trump and elect Democrats everywhere. But President Kamala Harris will also need a Democratic Senate, and there is no holding the Senate without Lisa Blunt Rochester winning her race in Delaware.
Lisa can’t do it alone. So if you already know the stakes of this race and are ready to chip in to help make sure she gets to the Senate this November, then use this link:
[**_https://secure.actblue.com/donate/elect-lisa_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91500233/494033904/-843060894?source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.08.25_GavinNewsom_B1_F1_S1_C1_30DOxDC_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzI4NmNmYS1mYzYyLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JfFlD0zF8MDYqzQW5vsN5pl1CtkuU52LtEj7m8dJhEk=)
Otherwise, please give me a chance to explain why this request is so important:
Throughout her entire career, Lisa has been dedicated to serving Delawareans by fighting to strengthen our economy and protect our fundamental freedoms.
Not only that, but Lisa made history when she was elected in 2016 as the first woman and person of color to represent Delaware in the House.
Now we need to help her make history again as she runs for U.S. Senate.
But her victory is not something we can just sit back and witness. We all have an important role in making it happen. So I am asking:
[**_Can I count on you to contribute directly to Lisa Blunt Rochester’s campaign for U.S. Senate today? Her average online contribution is $15. Some give less. Many give more. name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Intel
subject: Get “The Great Principles of Chemistry” on DVD
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWHyxF-WNI

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWHyxF-WNI

Dear
Friend,

There's a
tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

Here it
is...What is true about the world?

Tough,
right?

It's a
question mankind has asked since ancient times-since creation
itself. So, if you don't know the answer, that's fine (if you do,
email me because I would love to know more!).

This
question is especially pressing today because of the growing
power modern humans have to change and manipulate the material
world.

That's
one of the reasons we released our free online course, "The
Great Principles of Chemistry."

Why
chemistry?

For one,
this course brings a core subject studied at Hillsdale College to
millions of Americans, including you.

More
fundamentally, we study chemistry as part of our liberal arts
education at Hillsdale because the sciences help us understand
important aspects of reality. It helps us think about our role as
humans in the world around us and reveals the framework,
implications, and potential for human life.

Like all
our courses, "The Great Principles of Chemistry" contains
stunning visuals, study guides, quizzes, and in this case,
hands-on experiments. This content is especially well-suited for
science teachers, homeschool parents, or lifelong learners.

And our
online courses are free. That's why we depend on the generosity
of people like you to help us share the course with as many
people as possible.

Would you
consider making a tax-deductible donation to help promote this
course?

For any
donation of $100 or more, you will receive this beautiful DVD box
set for "The Great Principles of Chemistry," by clicking the link
below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/63497220:WHyxF-WNI:m:3:2627245898:08A88B881521FC11587DD8080A2C61A3:r

The
proper study of chemistry helps us understand the world and
inspires wonder and awe at the beauty of creation and its
Creator.

For these
reasons, please join us in helping others gain a greater
appreciation for the world around us with "The Great Principles
of Chemistry."

Let's
promote what's true about our world together.

Warm
Regards,

Bill
Gray, '01
Vice
President

Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale
College

subject: We’re being crushed

**Meet Bernie Moreno:** | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=ae70009a71ea4b73b23b1b3f9194867d&_e=cHjDLII_0ESEg2nPR6xsPFDVDpqwj_u9xhmcWHpkiuMoo9vFSdWqjhyprCCRimsUBHNDWK_kulfOcmVeC4KwKlKhnAmdYYrFsy_jnMoSos6bZQ4oxCNhIGPewVOKy1BmE5QDBL5W-w6ZjSB0MutfVJ81uCgtoNSZf_ysMZ3v2vTKzEGvyV_U28UjrnXtuAbznZ3sM9n5xRgpQCh4fIq1jpUA_Aodl4QVY1XwDj5oq9qDADKb8CbWMlsOlRlnCAnNKNeKuij-unZejmRit2TSylB1G8ZhWPL7IZsyePsMhLwUCJFKg1gbxn0H34inGcmULmXipGiPCwJraZv0gHa4bgeo-WIevZBqPOWd8W_boaqoc7ufUmApGyboCMz-S2pGJaDexOPBgnbXGEq2Ey7fmw%3D%3D) Bernie Moreno fights for the American Dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American Dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

name: VoteVets HQ
subject: Humbly asking for $5 to support the VoteVets mission.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
#
Peter, [**in just a moment we’re going to ask you to make a $5 donation to VoteVets](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-aug24.ccu_CS&refcode=em240825-1-30&t=1&akid=28021%2E3013755%2Evrcyr7)** to support our mission of electing Veterans to all levels of government — and to defeat Donald Trump, once and for all.
Please, let us explain why that donation is so important to make today.
Since we launched almost 20 years ago, VoteVets has spent millions and millions of dollars supporting candidates who otherwise might not have the resources they need to win.
From school board all the way to the presidency, we’ve endorsed and supported candidates from all walks of life in every corner of this country. Each of them has had one thing in common — they’ve either served in the Military, or have worked to defend and protect our National Security in government.
We count Tim Walz, Ruben Gallego, Mark Kelly, Tammy Duckworth, Pete Buttigieg, and hundreds more elected officials and candidates among our ranks. We’re damn proud of our track record, and we’d measure it up against any other organization. We get results. Period.
VoteVets will be one of the biggest players in the country in this year's elections. We have already spent millions of dollars in 2023 and 2024 advocating for our folks and fighting against the MAGA-right.
We plan to spend millions more down to Election Day. We’ve got ambitious goals to hit, and this is arguably the most important time for us. Every dollar we raise right now we can put directly back into the races we’re working in. Every dollar we raise can go directly into defeating Trump and other MAGA-right Republicans.
If that sounds good to you, and you’re ready to chip in to an organization that’s going to use your donation effectively, we’re humbly asking:
[**Make a donation to VoteVets today. You’ve got our word that we’ll put whatever you can afford to give right back into our efforts this election cycle.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-aug24.ccu_CS&refcode=em240825-1-30&t=2&akid=28021%2E3013755%2Evrcyr7)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Rush $10 now](https://act.votevets.org/go/2934?c0=vv-pac-em-aug24.pzfwNu&refcode=em240825-1-30&t=21&akid=28021%2E3013755%2Evrcyr7)**
---
****
| **[Rush $25 now](https://act.votevets.org/go/2935?c0=vv-pac-em-aug24.fHBGI0&refcode=em240825-1-30&t=22&akid=28021%2E3013755%2Evrcyr7)**
---
****
| | **[Rush $50 now](https://act.votevets.org/go/2928?c0=vv-pac-em-aug24.ochf6H&refcode=em240825-1-30&t=23&akid=28021%2E3013755%2Evrcyr7)**
---
****
| **[Rush $100 now](https://act.votevets.org/go/2929?c0=vv-pac-em-aug24.zeTvbK&refcode=em240825-1-30&t=24&akid=28021%2E3013755%2Evrcyr7)**
---
****
| | **[Rush $250 now](https://act.votevets.org/go/2930?c0=vv-pac-em-aug24.Vl0JFv&refcode=em240825-1-30&t=25&akid=28021%2E3013755%2Evrcyr7)**
---
****
| **[Another Amount](https://act.votevets.org/go/2933?c0=vv-pac-em-aug24.Kf2HR9&refcode=em240825-1-30&t=26&akid=28021%2E3013755%2Evrcyr7)**
---
****
Thank you. Your support means a lot to us.
The team at VoteVets

clean_body: our weekend plans... | = | We are still riding a positive wave from this week’s Democratic National Committee. But we need to re-focus our attention on the task at hand: Flipping the U.S. House and defeating Donald Trump. = = = = = = Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi said something remarkable during the Democratic National Convention. Did you hear about it? She told a reporter that she believed Democrats were on track to take back the U.S. House (hooray!) but we would NEED to flip seats in California in order to take control back. Her expert political assessment confirms reporting from election forecasters, media outlets, and even Republicans that control of the House of Representatives will come down to California. That’s why we are working to hire more organizers, open more regional offices, and reach every single undecided voter. = = \- CADEM HQ P.S. name: Team Pramila
subject: The heartbreaking consequences of corporate greed and a cruel health care system
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
It doesn’t have to be this way.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20240825-4235-footer&t=1&akid=4235%2E420207%2Ee2-h9j)
Mountains of medical debt.
Cutting pills in half.
People dying because they lack proper insurance.
These are the heartbreaking consequences of corporate greed and a cruel health care system, Peter. But it doesn’t have to be this way.
**It’s time to finally guarantee free, quality health care to every American as a human right. It’s time for Medicare for All.** [**If you agree, add your name to show your support.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/pass-m4a-em20240825/?refcode=em20240825-1&amount=3&akid=4235%2E420207%2Ee2-h9j)

name: Powered By People
subject: re: October 7th deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
Texas’ voter registration deadline is almost here...
#
If it seems like election day is coming up fast, we’ve got some bad news: **the deadline to register voters in Texas — October 7th — _is even sooner._**
That means we have just over _40 days left_ to add as many names to the voter rolls as we possibly can.
We’re working around the clock to reach, register, and mobilize Democratic voters across Texas. But the clock is ticking, and we need your help: [**Can you chip in $3 or more today to ensure we register as many Texans as possible before time runs out?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20240825.zJMlj1&refcode=ema20240825-239784&t=1&akid=239784%2E444211%2EoxDW8v)

Let’s do this.
Team Powered by People

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pbp-em-2023-footer?refcode=em20240825-239784-footer&t=21&refcode2=239784_444211_oxDW8v&akid=239784%2E444211%2EoxDW8v)**

---
Lucas is running for U.S. Senate to take back power for real Missourians, no matter who they’ve voted for before — and that’s exactly why Hawley’s running scared.
Hawley knows that his record of corruption and control has already made him the least popular GOP U.S. Senator up for re-election this November, with even lower approval than Ted Cruz and Rick Scott. name: Sharice Davids
subject: Some things you may not know about me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91502547/494040393/-1743609016?refcode=email_082524_my-story&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C75%2C100%2C250%2C500&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjRlMDZhYi0wMDYzLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vgDiXqhz6WcLZf5-AQ-DfCmO5lrI2B3ViSmZVmlO59Y=) Friend, I’ve mentioned before that I was raised by a single Army mom. But something you may not know about me is that I used to be a first-generation college student. I say “used to be,” because my mom — after spending more than 20 years in the Army — went back to school and earned her degree a few years after I earned mine. My mom taught me the value of hard work, and the importance of serving both your country and your community. And she taught me never to let any artificial barrier stand in the way. Those are lessons I carried with me as I juggled multiple jobs to pay my own way through school — and after I graduated, when I went to work in economic and community development on Native American reservations. I carried them with me when I flipped a Republican-held seat to become the first LGBTQ+ Native American _ever_ elected to Congress. And I carry them with me every day in this job, as I fight for my community and the values we share. As we get closer and closer to Election Day, so much attention will get paid to the daily news cycle of election season — cable news headlines, attack ads, a lot of things that are pretty far removed from what’s on the mind of everyday Americans. [_**So I wanted to take this moment to share a bit with you about where I come from and why I’m in this fight. And if, after reading this, you feel like supporting me in this campaign, I’d be extremely grateful to have your help in getting my message out far and wide.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91502548/494040394/-1743609016?refcode=email_082524_my-story&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C75%2C100%2C250%2C500&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjRlMDZhYi0wMDYzLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vgDiXqhz6WcLZf5-AQ-DfCmO5lrI2B3ViSmZVmlO59Y=) | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91502549/494040395/-1743609016?refcode=email_082524_my-story&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C75%2C100%2C250%2C500&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjRlMDZhYi0wMDYzLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vgDiXqhz6WcLZf5-AQ-DfCmO5lrI2B3ViSmZVmlO59Y=)

Sharice

name: Gallego for Arizona
subject: Why Trump came to Arizona earlier this week
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
We know you’re getting a ton of requests right now — but please, let us explain why this one is so important today. Especially today.
#

Peter, in just a moment, we’re going to ask you to make a donation to Ruben Gallego’s campaign for the U.S. Senate. We know you’re getting a ton of requests right now — but please, let us explain why this one is so important today. Especially today.
**FIRST:** The National Republican Senatorial Committee released a poll two weeks ago showing Ruben Gallego and Kari Lake tied in Arizona.
**THEN:** Trump moved fast to capitalize. On the same day that Ruben spoke at the DNC, Trump held an event in Arizona. And the next day, he held a rally in Phoenix at the EXACT SAME arena we held our own rally just a few weeks before. He attacked Ruben directly, called him a "maniac" and said if he wins in Arizona he will win the presidency.
**NOW:** We need a surge of donations to stay in the fight. Trump, Lake, the MAGA-right, and the Republican establishment are pouring everything they have into Arizona. We can’t fall short.
We know you can’t chip in to every email we send, but we sincerely hope that this is one you choose to make a donation to. SO much is at stake here in Arizona, and we have to stick the landing here to ensure we defeat Trump and Lake for good.
[**Please make a $5 contribution before our 48-hour fundraising drive ends at midnight tonight. Trump is staring us down right now, and we can’t blink.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-august24.kZit_I&refcode=em240825-2-160&t=1&akid=2943%2E734936%2EkwVWil)

name: Baccam HQ
subject: Zach Nunn doesn’t care about public schools
body:
while Lanon is working to strengthen public schools

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91503681/494044712/-1141683812?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkyOTIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjZhY2EzMmUtMDM2My1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qylxd3kcdOFXIE1oM8pSe24dEkcDFchW94aeb-hcEPg=&emci=44c94fd2-305f-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&emdi=66aca32e-0363-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&ceid=23786099)
---
| | Peter, Back to school has started. Educators across our district are welcoming students into their classes after the summer break! Educators are the heart and soul of our public schools. The hours they spend helping our children learn while expanding their horizons are immeasurable. The commitment of our educators to their profession deserves full and proper acknowledgment. Unfortunately, Lanon’s opponent in this race, Zack Nunn, doesn’t feel the same way. _Nunn’s record on public education speaks volumes — and it gets a failing grade._ During his lackluster time in the state legislature, Nunn voted for the forerunners of the Iowa school voucher program. **Out of step and out of touch with his constituents, Nunn was more interested in pushing an anti-public education agenda that rewards the few while penalizing public schools, parents, and children.** [**Peter, as a dad with a daughter in public school, Lanon knows just how important our public education system is — and that’s why he’ll ALWAYS fight to protect it in Congress. Will you join Lanon in standing against Nunn’s attacks on our public schools by signing on to our petition today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91503682/494044713/1476725305?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkyOTIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjZhY2EzMmUtMDM2My1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qylxd3kcdOFXIE1oM8pSe24dEkcDFchW94aeb-hcEPg=&emci=44c94fd2-305f-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&emdi=66aca32e-0363-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&ceid=23786099) | [PROTECT IOWA’S PUBLIC SCHOOLS »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91503683/494044714/1476725305?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkyOTIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjZhY2EzMmUtMDM2My1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qylxd3kcdOFXIE1oM8pSe24dEkcDFchW94aeb-hcEPg=&emci=44c94fd2-305f-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&emdi=66aca32e-0363-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&ceid=23786099)
---
During his unremarkable term in Congress, Nunn has called for abolishing the Department of Education.
**To make matters even worse, Peter, instead of putting the families of our district first, Nunn marched in lockstep with other congressional Republicans and voted for a ‘Continuing Resolution’ that proposed dangerous and extreme cuts across federal agencies.**
If it had been successful, the CR would have harmed K-12 education by threatening the jobs of up to 145,000 teachers and staff — and eliminating access to Head Start slots for 290,000 children.
_But, Nunn didn’t stop there ..._
He also voted for GOP legislation that, if implemented, would have cut approximately $4 billion in funding for schools serving low-income children ... reduced financing for as many as 7.5 million students with disabilities ... and slashed student mental health services by approximately $300 million.
**Let’s face it, Peter: Zach Nunn is a complete failure in public education and other vital issues for hard-working families in our district. All Nunn cares about is doing what Republican leaders in the House have told him to do.**

clean_body: while Lanon is working to strengthen public schools | | | Peter, Back to school has started. Educators across our district are welcoming students into their classes after the summer break! Educators are the heart and soul of our public schools. The hours they spend helping our children learn while expanding their horizons are immeasurable. The commitment of our educators to their profession deserves full and proper acknowledgment. Unfortunately, Lanon’s opponent in this race, Zack Nunn, doesn’t feel the same way. Nunn’s record on public education speaks volumes — and it gets a failing grade. During his lackluster time in the state legislature, Nunn voted for the forerunners of the Iowa school voucher program. Out of step and out of touch with his constituents, Nunn was more interested in pushing an anti-public education agenda that rewards the few while penalizing public schools, parents, and children. | During his unremarkable term in Congress, Nunn has called for abolishing the Department of Education. To make matters even worse, Peter, instead of putting the families of our district first, Nunn marched in lockstep with other congressional Republicans and voted for a ‘Continuing Resolution’ that proposed dangerous and extreme cuts across federal agencies. If it had been successful, the CR would have harmed K-12 education by threatening the jobs of up to 145,000 teachers and staff — and eliminating access to Head Start slots for 290,000 children. But, Nunn didn’t stop there ... He also voted for GOP legislation that, if implemented, would have cut approximately $4 billion in funding for schools serving low-income children ... reduced financing for as many as 7.5 million students with disabilities ... and slashed student mental health services by approximately $300 million. Let’s face it, Peter: Zach Nunn is a complete failure in public education and other vital issues for hard-working families in our district. All Nunn cares about is doing what Republican leaders in the House have told him to do. Meanwhile, Lanon is fighting for a quality education for all Iowans and strengthening our public schools. Thanks for standing up for our public schools, educators, and children. — Team Baccam | = | ---|--- Lanon Baccam is a veteran, a lifelong Iowan, and now, he's running to restore principled, effective leadership in Washington. Peter, I’ll make this quick.

My end-of-month fundraising deadline is less than a week away and we’re still $2,818 short of where we’d like to be, so I'm asking _directly_ for the help of top supporters like you, Peter.

**I need you to know that I don’t do a second of “call time”** — I’d rather focus on legislating and doing the work I was elected to do.

This campaign is by and for the people, and I wouldn’t change it... but it means we _all_ need to do our part to protect this seat and take back the House.

[So Peter, can you chip in $3 or $7 to help my team stay on track for victory this November? Finishing this month on the right foot is absolutely crucial. »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91503846/494045445/-723981995?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20240825_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWFjYTMyZS0wMzYzLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b9FWC3fetDHN55kbjl94YmxjCt1eu7dy1b1s8fDsUxY=) | [CHIP IN $3 TO RE-ELECT RITCHIE TORRES »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91503847/494045446/-723981995?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20240825_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWFjYTMyZS0wMzYzLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b9FWC3fetDHN55kbjl94YmxjCt1eu7dy1b1s8fDsUxY=)

| | Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
www.torres.nyc

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in. Peter, please, consider making a =.
