What a month it’s been, y’all! With our primary win and the incredible energy from the Democratic National Convention, it’s clear that momentum is on our side. But let me be honest — this is no time to let our foot off the gas pedal. We need to turn this energy into results. Unlike Marsha Blackburn, who relies on contributions from the gun lobby, the oil industry, and pharmaceutical companies, I rely on YOU. I don’t take a single cent from corporate PACs — it’s the right way to run this race, but it also means I have to ask more from my supporters, more often. **That’s why I’m reaching out today. Our team has set an ambitious $250,000 goal to close out August strong. This is crucial if we want to carry our momentum through to November and give Marsha the boot.** This race could be won or lost on a dime. Meeting our financial goals is key to our success, and I’m relying on grassroots donations to get there. (Small-dollar gifts really do add up!) **_[So, I’m humbly asking you to give whatever you can — it would make a HUGE difference in helping us meet our August fundraising goal before time runs out. clean_body: Would you be able to help me out? | What a month it’s been, y’all! With our primary win and the incredible energy from the Democratic National Convention, it’s clear that momentum is on our side. But let me be honest — this is no time to let our foot off the gas pedal. We need to turn this energy into results. Unlike Marsha Blackburn, who relies on contributions from the gun lobby, the oil industry, and pharmaceutical companies, I rely on YOU. I don’t take a single cent from corporate PACs — it’s the right way to run this race, but it also means I have to ask more from my supporters, more often. That’s why I’m reaching out today. Our team has set an ambitious $250,000 goal to close out August strong. This is crucial if we want to carry our momentum through to November and give Marsha the boot. This race could be won or lost on a dime. Meeting our financial goals is key to our success, and I’m relying on grassroots donations to get there. (Small-dollar gifts really do add up!) = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = I couldn’t do this without you! Gloria Johnson = | = Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights. | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Contributions or gifts to Gloria for Tennessee are not tax deductible. Look, Fellow Patriot. I'm a combat Veteran - when I fought, burned, and nearly died in combat I didn't do it for praise or recognition. **_[**_I did it because I love my country and I saw it as my God -given duty._**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=a8708b7f16544a3db22d0123cf2a4bd0&_e=MZOVjjq1z7pKjtpD2mCMQG6-slB405CbjmVyHUzX1YUI9jdfccfDYjILV9gJkDrPalJMmSC-roftdkvR5LA-1hS-4Z5KDhSEBzIsT4QamRFOhgxYZbSTVq2EghQoSX-nZfZzjfNJiFnbAnGV0TTTmJC41XM7Sl7KAANj060rZMtHe25A4T7vE2dCv_aD79UyrnFDWHfuBufztX5dlT8mup6ETlKbURW3L2nzSAIPL0BNG4v9pNF9ohK4B2I3_80pBcrVwSbBwiqf0i0kALnL2dkK4j_ClL0ZBvywUTAOg-O1ag63I8CedbtcsvvLQy1YTA8BLHOSdGQLVUHmLD13vawybGKqqkmWHX6BB_ZLHrbabceyWSokqFAW_qcnff51V6mVs355HRZsLW3unOOSRZ6LN2Jrb2fx35-q_EnbrLWNHEULPLTYPTVIL8aDB8bt6-kt85X2iO28qQRSzsA_ONVuGYHXnUJCr--I_bHXVWI%3D)_** That's why I was so humbled and honored to hear President Trump recognize and endorse me during his first public appearance after the attempt on his life. _**[But it'd mean the world to me if I could get YOUR endorsement too, Fellow Patriot.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=a8708b7f16544a3db22d0123cf2a4bd0&_e=MZOVjjq1z7pKjtpD2mCMQG6-slB405CbjmVyHUzX1YUI9jdfccfDYjILV9gJkDrPalJMmSC-roftdkvR5LA-1hS-4Z5KDhSEBzIsT4QamRFOhgxYZbSTVq2EghQoSX-nZfZzjfNJiFnbAnGV0TTTmJC41XM7Sl7KAANj060rZMtHe25A4T7vE2dCv_aD79UyrnFDWHfuBufztX5dlT8mup6ETlKbURW3L2nzSAIPL0BNG4v9pNF9ohK4B2I3_80pBcrVwSbBwiqf0i0kALnL2dkK4j_ClL0ZBvywUTAOg-O1ag63I8CedbtcsvvLQy1YTA8BLHOSdGQLVUHmLD13vbcZGl_slY7IELGL_E1PlMMNfYrurf4TWL0POBCvS9XVh36VGGVdRBke28fBfOwdObExCNpWVGXz_RMGJxdEsg2W9UsnxoauWR5Y1DaxW2mnApoet06eDA1sfu85g_0ZLE86PxtHQDNdsDRSny6bgMo%3D)**_ My name is Sam Brown. I'm a former Army Captain and I got blown up in Afghanistan. I narrowly survived by the grace of God and I'm continuing my mission of duty and service by running for U.S. Senate in the toughest race on the map. I'm not going to chatter your ear off by telling you things you already know - Kamala's a radical & we need to win back the Senate to STOP her agenda and turn this country around. _**[But I am going to humbly request that you join President Trump in endorsing me...](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=a8708b7f16544a3db22d0123cf2a4bd0&_e=MZOVjjq1z7pKjtpD2mCMQG6-slB405CbjmVyHUzX1YUI9jdfccfDYjILV9gJkDrPalJMmSC-roftdkvR5LA-1hS-4Z5KDhSEBzIsT4QamRFOhgxYZbSTVq2EghQoSX-nZfZzjfNJiFnbAnGV0TTTmJC41XM7Sl7KAANj060rZMtHe25A4T7vE2dCv_aD79UyrnFDWHfuBufztX5dlT8mup6ETlKbURW3L2nzSAIPL0BNG4v9pNF9ohK4B2I3_80pBcrVwSbBwiqf0i0kALnL2dkK4j_ClL0ZBvywUTAOg-O1ag63I8CedbtcsvvLQy1YTA8BLHOSdGQLVUHmLD13ve5pn9TPfgtzddSkRInidDMP7YUKiUr65Yr0y18YwATnoyf4-AvqxeR_5PifjBCzgUom4iU43Ql8DO8M2BmXiA2Bi-yVtJvcRoS85Rr_CNSALHedQbnBt07D81xIF4XXR09Y7xZq4ncEiXr7-GC27LI%3D)**_ If you don't think your endorsement can make a difference - consider this: The polls between me and my leftist opponent are neck & neck. This race, and control of the ENTIRE SENATE could come down to just a few hundreds votes. _**[With the heart of a veteran, I'm asking you to lend me your endorsement TODAY.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=a8708b7f16544a3db22d0123cf2a4bd0&_e=MZOVjjq1z7pKjtpD2mCMQG6-slB405CbjmVyHUzX1YUI9jdfccfDYjILV9gJkDrPalJMmSC-roftdkvR5LA-1hS-4Z5KDhSEBzIsT4QamRFOhgxYZbSTVq2EghQoSX-nZfZzjfNJiFnbAnGV0TTTmJC41XM7Sl7KAANj060rZMtHe25A4T7vE2dCv_aD79UyrnFDWHfuBufztX5dlT8mup6ETlKbURW3L2nzSAIPL0BNG4v9pNF9ohK4B2I3_80pBcrVwSbBwiqf0i0kALnL2dkK4j_ClL0ZBvywUTAOg-O1ag63I8CedbtcsvvLQy1YTA8BLHOSdGQLVUHmLD13vZ6Wpj8q85kpkGgWim83gMSBZ1q0Z2KS5kFmW7T2DIH_rtVBI9xnyZejJh4NSTokEd3EY5nWicj-AuDxXe9skfMgquXWaxHSQDcGEKz-8rCL7WjHMNucME9jP5Uhs0uW_UZgy_wgrwpLuCLaoa1Cu10%3D)**_ Nevada, I've got you. name: Jon Tester
subject: My family farm
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Can I tell you a story about my family farm, Derek? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024-tester]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024-tester [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024-tester]
In 1910, my grandfather came to Montana. He found a piece of grassy land, took a look at it, and said, “This is the place.” And that’s where the farm began.
He farmed the land until the early 1940s, and then passed it down to my folks. In 1978, my wife Sharla and I took over the farm and we’re still here today, three generations and more than 40 years later.
We’ve made a lot of progress here — Sharla and I built a new home, several steel buildings, and more storage.
The truth is, I love this work. Yes, it makes for early mornings and late nights during planting and harvest seasons, but it also keeps me grounded and gives me perspective on the issues we face every day.
When I think about climate change, I’m thinking of folks on farms like mine struggling with catastrophic droughts or historic levels of flooding. When I think about reforming the USPS, I’m thinking of the people in rural communities across Montana who rely on timely mail delivery for their medication or Social Security checks. And when I think about infrastructure, I’m thinking of the rural towns near mine that need access to affordable, high-speed internet.
These aren’t abstract issues or talking points. They’re very real challenges that deserve real solutions, and that’s what I’m fighting for in Washington. I spend every single day trying to do right by working families, farmers, students, and veterans here in Montana and across the country.
I’m running for reelection because there’s still work to be done. Just like my parents and grandparents on the family farm, when I commit to something, I see it through. Can you make a split donation of any amount today to help me keep up the fight in Washington? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024-tester]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024-tester]
I’ll leave you with one last truth about farming: Some years, you get the right amount of rain, and things work out really well. Other years, you get a whole lot less.
That means it’s important to be prepared for any outcome and to have a support system by your side when things get difficult. We don’t know what this campaign will look like or what Republicans will throw our way over these final few months. But with your support, we’ll be ready.
I appreciate anything you can contribute. Thanks for your help, and I hope I make you proud.
—Jon Tester
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024-tester]
Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #272
Williamsburg, VA 23185

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: we're officially being outspent on TV ads
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
|
---
Friend, I spoke recently with my campaign manager, and she broke some tough news: **We're officially being outspent on TV ads.** I know, friend, I almost spit out my coffee when she told me. But here's the deal: **The GOP is zeroing in on our race because they know control of the Senate hinges on what happens here in Ohio**. That's why they've named me a top target for defeat and why they're making record-breaking investments to defeat me. Let me make one thing clear, friend: The GOP might outspend us in this race, but they will not outwork us. If we can keep reaching voters with our pro-worker message, we'll win. **To make sure we have what it takes to win this race, my team and I have set an ambitious $200,000 daily fundraising goal to hit before midnight tonight. And I'm counting on top supporters like you to help me reach it.** [**So please, friend, will you chip in $5, $25, or more now to split between my campaign and Serve America to help me raise the resources I need to win in Ohio and defend our Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91504744/494048095/-2003341165?refcode=240825&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjZkNzdmZi0wNDYzLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qaH56DvBZrvSx1OPo1WVQ_5gfzcAi8jTyuK_ulwtXQc=) Thank you, Sherrod [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91504745/494048096/-2003341165?refcode=240825&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjZkNzdmZi0wNDYzLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qaH56DvBZrvSx1OPo1WVQ_5gfzcAi8jTyuK_ulwtXQc=)

name: Will Rollins
subject: You’re not an ATM...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
| Peter,

You don’t have to tell me how irritating fundraising emails can be sometimes... **500% MATCH!**
**YOU MUST DONATE!**
**WE ARE BEGGING YOU!** Yeah, those same unhinged emails you get, I get too. It’s exhausting, and it can feel like a relentless barrage that makes you want to delete your email account forever. (Please don’t do that.)

You’ve probably received a few of my emails, and I hope you’ve gathered that we’re not running a campaign based on scare tactics. That was a promise I made on day one of launching our online program.

**Others might treat you like one, but you are not an ATM. I am grateful for every contribution we receive, and I also realize the importance of respecting your time, your inbox, and your intelligence.**

So rest assured, when you hear from the team and I, it's not all urgency for urgency's sake, it’s about sharing meaningful updates about our work to flip this seat blue and end Calvert’s 30+ year career in Congress.

[**I hope this was a refreshing enough email to convince you to split $3 between Mark Takano and my campaign today. clean_body: | Peter, You don’t have to tell me how irritating fundraising emails can be sometimes... 500% MATCH! YOU MUST DONATE! WE ARE BEGGING YOU! Yeah, those same unhinged emails you get, I get too. It’s exhausting, and it can feel like a relentless barrage that makes you want to delete your email account forever. (Please don’t do that.) You’ve probably received a few of my emails, and I hope you’ve gathered that we’re not running a campaign based on scare tactics. That was a promise I made on day one of launching our online program. Others might treat you like one, but you are not an ATM. I am grateful for every contribution we receive, and I also realize the importance of respecting your time, your inbox, and your intelligence. So rest assured, when you hear from the team and I, it's not all urgency for urgency's sake, it’s about sharing meaningful updates about our work to flip this seat blue and end Calvert’s 30+ year career in Congress. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Will Rollins and Mark Takano will go through immediately: | = = = Thank you, Will | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American Dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

Peter,

We wanted to share a bit about Rick Scott’s incredible journey - a story that shows what it means to live the American Dream.

Rick Scott’s life story is truly inspiring. He grew up in public housing, served in the Navy, built a successful business, and then led Florida as Governor - his life demonstrates what hard work and dedication can achieve.

As Florida’s Governor, Rick rolled back government regulations and revitalized the state’s economy. Now, as a U.S. Senator, he’s fighting for fiscal responsibility, secure borders, and conservative principles.

He’s a true champion for our conservative values.

However, the radical left is targeting Rick with everything they’ve got. To keep him in the fight and ensure he can continue his important work in the Senate, we need your support.

**[Can you donate $25, $50, or whatever you can afford to help Rick Scott’s campaign?](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=bf8e94cb40ca42669ffa4056fecca265&_e=iXwLuvzRixCtt5JWxbKe-nI9IXQuDQwFbTZRDoybRecGG4UZny-38dvhSxIgng3AApJMCD6pLOs1npltXM1xhOl6tuHxIE248jxR_SeQd0OBHI9rwkAofjDEB5AtO7ZXScJc631WExEqgIOr5o1g80IacUP5nWK8C65vePHfi4HNAUaCLWlgfKVvWxgrvXE2zWqAiEt4yw_obENahzfhYblZyWAewDeg6LsbAmSRhhm2seL1GJMM5YvLqEmsdYTQCoXFYfuM-JrpuYNeFKIlohA2ny5HGVYO_DL9pOSLEJmwv06yQHecnvSzAfOFgmc_G9S6hz65H7ulR9syskiBSz9Ipjk5JYGrq2IxZ2K-S2U%3D)**

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: Let’s talk about JD Vance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Look, there’s A LOT to say about JD Vance.
The guy is the first VP pick to have a net-negative favorable rating coming out of a convention since 1980 (before either he or I were born!), and it’s pretty easy to see why.
Obvious disdain for women? Check.
Blind adoration of Donald Trump? Check.
Support for a national abortion ban? Check.
Obsession with culture wars and “the woke left”? Check.
The list could go on, but it all boils down to the same thing: Vance has made it clear he has no real core values – except his own political ambition...and maybe really, really not liking independent-minded women.
He says he’s pro-family, but the policies he supports put IVF and reproductive care at risk. He said Trump was “America’s Hitler,” and now he’s his #1 fan. He says he’s from Appalachia, but his book about Appalachian communities leaned on tired stereotypes and blamed folks for their own struggles.
We all know that Donald Trump is dangerous. He’s a wannabe dictator and a threat to the future of American democracy. But JD Vance is just as dangerous – and what’s more, he hides behind hypocrisy and lies about where he stands and what he believes.
I’m going to do *everything* I can to make sure Kamala Harris and Tim Walz defeat these guys.
But at the end of the day, we also need to make sure we’re fighting to flip the House – because a Democratic House could be the only thing standing between a Trump-Vance White House and the extreme agenda they want to enact.
Will you pitch in to my re-election campaign today to help me hold onto my seat and flip the House blue? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?express_lane=true&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?express_lane=true&amount=100]
OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
This is so important, so we need all hands on deck.
Thanks for everything.
-Sara
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
If you can’t give much right now, I want you to know that even $1 or $5 makes a difference. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em] And if you can’t give at all, I understand. I appreciate you taking the time to read these emails and stay connected with my campaign – regardless of whether or not you’re able to chip in financially. Thank you!

name: No Dem Left Behind
subject: Urgent: We Need Your Help Protecting Rural America
body:
| | | | | |
---
| | | | [MAX my impact →](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2ukd3q-ep9387-kyd76rh5/)
---
| | | |
# **2024: Protect Rural America**
---
|
---
| | | | Hello folks! We just wrapped up an inspiring week at the Democratic National Convention, and the energy was electric! But despite the excitement, we’re still falling short of our fundraising goals—and we need your help. At the convention, leaders from across the country, including those from our most rural communities, took the stage to remind us all of the power we hold when we come together. They spoke passionately about the need to protect our rights, our lands, and our future. The message was clear: We cannot afford to leave anyone behind. No Dem Left Behind is on the frontlines of this fight. We’re working to empower rural America, to boost voter turnout, and to lead with the issues that matter most—like protecting reproductive rights, combating climate change, ensuring access to rural broadband, and so much more. But here’s the thing: The opposition is well-funded, and they’re determined to keep rural voices silenced. They know that if we succeed, it could change the course of this election. This is where you come in. We can’t do this without you. We need every grassroots supporter to step up and help us reach our goal. Will you stand with us and contribute $1 (or more) to ensure we have the resources to keep fighting? The stakes are high, and the time to act is now. Let’s harness the momentum from the convention and show the world that rural America is ready to lead the charge for change. [**_Now, more than ever, we need your support. Your contribution will help us elect Democrats who will champion these causes and build a brighter future for rural America._**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2ukd3q-ep9388-kyd76rh6/)
---

Help us make a real difference this November!

name: DC Daily Journal
subject: This Hidden Player RUNS the Country NOW
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.

Dear Like-Minded American,

You need to be clear-eyed about the state of
the country right now.

The Constitution is under attack.

The Bill of Rights? It's gone.

Statues of Thomas Jefferson and George
Washington are being destroyed in public squares.

And on campuses across the country, George
Soros-backed infiltrators are chanting, "Death to America."

This presentation itself will probably be
taken down in days - if not hours.

America isn't what Americans think it is
anymore.

And hasn't been for a long time now.

Because let's face it, Joe Biden was never in
control of anything.

Neither is Kamala Harris.

So, who's really calling the shots?

It's not Obama... or George Soros... or even
the U.S. Congress...

But this hidden player who exercises power
behind the scenes.

And I can promise you, he will not stop until
the entire country is in ruins.

That's why I put this presentation together
at great personal risk because there are simple moves you can

name: David Hogg
subject: Change IS possible
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
They told us we couldn’t do it – but we did it anyway.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=20240825&t=1&akid=1101%2E587540%2EbC5LZz)
Peter,
The reason change doesn’t happen is not because it’s impossible — **but because people think it is impossible.**
**I believe this idea that change is impossible is the single greatest threat to American democracy.[Before I tell you more, can you take a moment to support our mission to elect young, progressive leaders with a small donation?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240825?refcode=20240825&amount=5&refcode2=1101_587540_bC5LZz&akid=1101%2E587540%2EbC5LZz)**
After Parkland, many adults said:
**“What happened is terrible and it’s amazing you kids are standing up,_but you’ll never change anything because this is Florida._ ”**
But guess what?
Outraged students and parents of victims — like Fred Guttenberg and Manuel Oliver — said we don’t care; we’re still going to try. We showed up and protested by the thousands in Tallahassee. And guess what? We actually did change gun laws. We raised the age to buy guns in Florida to 21 and passed a red flag law.
**Later, my mother got a death threat from an NRA supporter that said: “F with the NRA and you’ll be DOA.”**
We used the law we passed after Parkland to disarm the man that threatened to kill my mother, and since the passage of that law, **over 12,000 other people who were a risk to themselves or others have been disarmed.**
**[If we didn’t have the audacity to hope – I may have had to bury my own mother. I’m still fighting to keep others safe from gun violence, Peter. Can you give $5 to support the work Leaders We Deserve is doing to create a safer future?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240825?refcode=20240825&amount=5&refcode2=1101_587540_bC5LZz&akid=1101%2E587540%2EbC5LZz)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240825?amount=5&refcode=20240825-1101&refcode2=1101_587540_bC5LZz&akid=1101%2E587540%2EbC5LZz)**
A few years later, I hired a young guy named Maxwell Frost from my freshman dorm room in college to be the March for Our Lives National Organizing Director. In my junior year of college, he called me up and said he would have to leave March for Our Lives because he wanted to run for Congress and asked for my help.
Before this, I hadn’t really helped anyone run for office in a major way because I didn’t trust politicians who only wanted to use me to get elected and then do nothing about gun violence.
But I didn’t see Maxwell as a politician – I saw him as a friend, so I did everything I could to help him run.
Once again, I heard the same thing from professors and “experts”:
“He’s too young.”

“He doesn’t have the political or donor connections to win.”

“How is he going to win against two former members of Congress?”
I didn’t care and decided to keep supporting him because I knew what an incredible leader he could be, and I wanted to prove everyone who said it wasn’t possible wrong. So, I helped Maxwell raise $380,000 in his first two quarters, **which helped him win by a margin of 10% — _and he became the youngest member of Congress._**
Once elected, Maxwell’s first bill was to create a Federal Office of Gun Violence Prevention (something March for Our Lives had been pushing for over three years) and within 1 year of his election, Maxwell was introducing the President of the United States, who was announcing the creation of the Office of Gun Violence Prevention. **That office has overseen a 20% reduction of gun homicides in the first quarter of 2024.**
If we listened to the people who said Maxwell couldn’t win, and if he didn’t bother to try, we wouldn’t have:
* The youngest and first Gen Z member of Congress;
* an Office of Gun Violence Prevention;
* first member of March for Our Lives in Congress.

**[Peter, we’re changing the status quo and getting more young leaders elected to office. Can you donate $5 to fuel our work to elect young progressives up-and-down the ballot?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240825?refcode=20240825&amount=5&refcode2=1101_587540_bC5LZz&akid=1101%2E587540%2EbC5LZz)**
We are in a vicious cycle of cynicism and hopelessness that will destroy us if we don’t break it. Hopelessness is a self-fulfilling prophecy. If we never think things can get better, they never will.
That’s why – with Maxwell’s campaign manager, Kevin Lata – we created Leaders We Deserve. An organization dedicated to funding and advising the best Democrats of our generation to get them elected, so we can have leaders in office that will inspire young people to vote.
Our candidates are pro-gun reform, pro-choice, and pro-environment. They also don’t take money from large corporations and neither does Leaders We Deserve.
Just recently, we spent $300,000 supporting Molly Cook, who won by just 62 votes, and is now the youngest member of the Texas Senate.
CHANGE IS POSSIBLE! And we’re making it happen.
**[Peter, join the thousands of people supporting Leaders We Deserve. We rely on grassroots support to get young progressives elected to office, and with November 5 getting closer, we need a big surge of donations to get all of our candidates elected. Can we count on you to give $5 to support the work we’re doing?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240825?refcode=20240825&amount=5&refcode2=1101_587540_bC5LZz&akid=1101%2E587540%2EbC5LZz)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240825?amount=5&refcode=20240825-1101&refcode2=1101_587540_bC5LZz&akid=1101%2E587540%2EbC5LZz)**
We’re in this fight together.
Thank you,
**David Hogg**
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=20240825&t=2&refcode2=1101_587540_bC5LZz&akid=1101%2E587540%2EbC5LZz)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1101%2E587540%2EbC5LZz)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1101%2E587540%2EbC5LZz)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

Friend,

The crisis on our southern border MUST end.

It is not just a headline – it is a deadly reality affecting every community not just in New Mexico, but the entire country.

[**Did you see our latest ad?**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=b410292b29aa4efe95c835fcd1452443&_e=lRFsHcDpeioIUX6BsqtubdH_QMuoBx6BdcmNGd66282Z_RwOaaC4pujNCR0gqbetiAzXqj1bRJWoN0VJP_lGEwGa6rpOYXk1bWV6IZyfq0U-hUzYFfxxUmTY2Sj23HCrNGGExX44v37Evm7tQ7PVNEORrAFU1enfjVkH_dUjUl5bofOEFZAfk199S1lCTIi11ybPQFEVfLRwvB4mKNKCaaaQ8JYQ1SGtekx03w-ZsFr9lGJYPYHVSgldsdd64iriqyJWOASuFPD7iTJTCjgFaMME-8c-OzQ8gSQQ54dY7bkFnfqBc8s8x_JacLhD9F_RUlflpGXExJ4kQ5xmwlN_qfcmHWBy1WIkyvVTbzHfxYDwg65zS1n7qazYKRhH5omWji9NFJq1AdALxiZTSykQpA%3D%3D) We’re exposing Martin Heinrich’s reckless agenda and his betrayal of our national security.

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=b410292b29aa4efe95c835fcd1452443&_e=lRFsHcDpeioIUX6BsqtubdH_QMuoBx6BdcmNGd66282Z_RwOaaC4pujNCR0gqbetiAzXqj1bRJWoN0VJP_lGEwGa6rpOYXk1bWV6IZyfq0U-hUzYFfxxUmTY2Sj23HCrNGGExX44v37Evm7tQ7PVNEORrAFU1enfjVkH_dUjUl5bofOEFZAfk199S1lCTIi11ybPQFEVfLRwvB4mKNKCaaaQ8JYQ1SGtekx03w-ZsFoYira_d5uBGNzMp0QKXVVi5WPsBiAGmmzgpxS6yvA-oR-LzawUYPqO_YT8ig7RdI2uSfi8GHUN9jgsEbLgVJ2sA07XQ2j0IBFLfr5QcHB7ZD2l9swCxAlZQfJ3gVGBomccxxR8a5l5KOuhqTh_-zRbiDrAoEbwvpxCncrKMHnmkQ%3D%3D) [ **_ WATCH NOW » _**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=b410292b29aa4efe95c835fcd1452443&_e=lRFsHcDpeioIUX6BsqtubdH_QMuoBx6BdcmNGd66282Z_RwOaaC4pujNCR0gqbetiAzXqj1bRJWoN0VJP_lGEwGa6rpOYXk1bWV6IZyfq0U-hUzYFfxxUmTY2Sj23HCrNGGExX44v37Evm7tQ7PVNEORrAFU1enfjVkH_dUjUl5bofOEFZAfk199S1lCTIi11ybPQFEVfLRwvB4mKNKCaaaQ8JYQ1SGtekx03w-ZsFoea6er6kc9F1IdZQQ9fm-FxMaHYYiroZRGSSygQNTYuqeoIspoQJFvI3EtYUT3kT0LAmhr5aAy0reDJ-mH-uWcK_c465tWLS0OeScWf4XUTSV-Mj-ow4tZKX-VzoFKlB1lyRsMbZ5H40BaMx1KhUzvZaQTNg97XsxE-RUIddikwg%3D%3D)
Here’s the truth:
* _Chinese labs are churning out deadly drugs._
* _Mexican cartels are smuggling these poisons across our border._
* _Martin Heinrich is making it worse by opposing crucial funding for our border agencies, throwing open the floodgates to these cartels, and unleashing a wave of illicit drugs and lawlessness into our communities._

Heinrich’s negligence is _**dangerous**_ , and the consequences have proved _**fatal**_. This election is our chance to take back control and put an end to these radical leftist policies that Martin Heinrich has forced upon New Mexico.

[**Will you stand with me in this fight to secure our southern border?**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=b410292b29aa4efe95c835fcd1452443&_e=lRFsHcDpeioIUX6BsqtubdH_QMuoBx6BdcmNGd66282Z_RwOaaC4pujNCR0gqbetiAzXqj1bRJWoN0VJP_lGEwGa6rpOYXk1bWV6IZyfq0U-hUzYFfxxUmTY2Sj23HCrNGGExX44v37Evm7tQ7PVNEORrAFU1enfjVkH_dUjUl5bofOEFZAfk199S1lCTIi11ybPQFEVfLRwvB4mKNKCaaaQ8JYQ1SGtekx03w-ZsFrxCRFNGNsNp8YgWpRcaUoY2CbeOlE-pWE9Jl3QrqW6Gph9h3uhSRRTKff_hJ6e7J2niIQUY2SWnKV-NhCETsAnuQYFxJpALLY7nTT-9Y9b1HwkG8NK9vOivyjO60KkNO7q03FXjPxtYtsaCV9qIJV1mEl_gxiKJTMw1xuRY5B5pg%3D%3D)

[**Chip in $25, $50, or even $100 today to help us fight back and secure our border once and for all.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=b410292b29aa4efe95c835fcd1452443&_e=lRFsHcDpeioIUX6BsqtubdH_QMuoBx6BdcmNGd66282Z_RwOaaC4pujNCR0gqbetiAzXqj1bRJWoN0VJP_lGEwGa6rpOYXk1bWV6IZyfq0U-hUzYFfxxUmTY2Sj23HCrNGGExX44v37Evm7tQ7PVNEORrAFU1enfjVkH_dUjUl5bofOEFZAfk199S1lCTIi11ybPQFEVfLRwvB4mKNKCaaaQ8JYQ1SGtekx03w-ZsFqKVvZ2goU4vhrUN16Z8a1zWqyGc76jAyzWjUUHHD6H9JTsDEPGK_FFHuAgKY80UWGk_UV_ffepUHYMHOPZVBxVVY2c502Io1cAU-SZuzyiyKVwGAiGQDul6NsnvtYwdlNi__r78sPJm2lNM2bXuxXehR49nfRm4v8NUDiToU-Kuw%3D%3D) Every dollar you give helps us reach more voters, air more ads, and spread the truth about the dangers Martin Heinrich poses.

This is our moment to protect New Mexico and our national security. In a race as close as this, we need all the support we can muster to defeat Martin Heinrich and take back the Senate majority.

For New Mexico,
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=b410292b29aa4efe95c835fcd1452443&_e=lRFsHcDpeioIUX6BsqtubdH_QMuoBx6BdcmNGd66282Z_RwOaaC4pujNCR0gqbetiAzXqj1bRJWoN0VJP_lGEwGa6rpOYXk1bWV6IZyfq0U-hUzYFfxxUmTY2Sj23HCrNGGExX44v37Evm7tQ7PVNEORrAFU1enfjVkH_dUjUl5bofOEFZAfk199S1lCTIi11ybPQFEVfLRwvB4mKNKCaaaQ8JYQ1SGtekx03w-ZsFqfe-LcxikawWm2usrnDbhONE71FxiBLBqn2wK8ni1hFxz57YyoEWilynpaoUN0RbVbHK2o-2brfTw1bVK-EAWf-6qL-lua4qkeLENW49hLkB18lz0C2Ej3U6M9Jok8k08xnYGfByXQtYc6eSk_6oVV8Ub-p2sp73Zjp8AXz4wUeQ%3D%3D)
**Nella Domenici**
Republican for Senate

| **ABOUT NELLA**
**New Mexico is Nella Domenici’s home. She was born in Albuquerque and lived for most of her childhood in a home near the intersection of Lomas and Monroe with her seven siblings, and her parents - Pete and Nancy Domenici. Nella began her education at Our Lady of Fatima, where she learned the values she holds today. Nella is a proud third-generation New Mexican, devoted mother of two, step-mom of four, and the wife of a Navy Veteran. Nella’s family’s roots run deep in New Mexico and she and her husband Pat enjoy their family home in New Mexico that they have owned for nearly twenty years.

Like most New Mexicans, Nella Domenici understands the importance of hard work. She waited tables to help pay for her undergraduate degree from Georgetown University, and worked her way through night school at Georgetown Law while holding down a full time job. She then graduated from Harvard Business School as a Baker Scholar, top 5% of the class, while 9 months pregnant.

Nella began her career at the bottom and worked her way up through the complex finance world, eventually serving as CFO for one of the world’s largest, most successful investment firms. In her career, Nella advised, invested in, grew, and led many companies, and served on public company boards. The industries she has worked in are vast and include areas such as health care, AI, food service, lodging, commercial real estate, mortgage lending, and consumer products. These companies have ranged from small family-owned businesses, to rapidly growing venture backed enterprises, to a Fortune 200 company. Several of these have been headquartered in New Mexico. Collectively, the companies Nella has been heavily involved with have employed thousands of Americans.

Like her father and mother, Nella has been a warrior for those who most need an advocate: for women competing in academics or business, for families dealing with mental illness, and for those without access to quality healthcare or education. **

[ ** JOIN NELLA **](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=b410292b29aa4efe95c835fcd1452443&_e=lRFsHcDpeioIUX6BsqtubdH_QMuoBx6BdcmNGd66282Z_RwOaaC4pujNCR0gqbetiAzXqj1bRJWoN0VJP_lGEwGa6rpOYXk1bWV6IZyfq0U-hUzYFfxxUmTY2Sj23HCrNGGExX44v37Evm7tQ7PVNEORrAFU1enfjVkH_dUjUl5bofOEFZAfk199S1lCTIi11ybPQFEVfLRwvB4mKNKCaaaQ8JYQ1SGtekx03w-ZsFp3O_efmi6W1Y2FYnOWaGGaDiNhBtGyRI-8CP_N2uRGKVaEfK7Ke9GFXJTtOAyELitoXXGqLVlVXw1WFYn0Dc_99MRDVd01nM8JntDPGs9jYSZGygcdN5qAy1UQlDdUTaiIctZHgOaEmvdj2_VzVUywNy8mDhoeu0vfRWoSy79Z0w%3D%3D)

clean_body: Heinrich’s negligence is dangerous, and the consequences have proved fatal. | Friend, The crisis on our southern border MUST end. It is not just a headline – it is a deadly reality affecting every community not just in New Mexico, but the entire country. We’re exposing Martin Heinrich’s reckless agenda and his betrayal of our national security. Here’s the truth: Chinese labs are churning out deadly drugs. Mexican cartels are smuggling these poisons across our border. Martin Heinrich is making it worse by opposing crucial funding for our border agencies, throwing open the floodgates to these cartels, and unleashing a wave of illicit drugs and lawlessness into our communities. Heinrich’s negligence is dangerous , and the consequences have proved fatal. This election is our chance to take back control and put an end to these radical leftist policies that Martin Heinrich has forced upon New Mexico. Every dollar you give helps us reach more voters, air more ads, and spread the truth about the dangers Martin Heinrich poses. This is our moment to protect New Mexico and our national security. In a race as close as this, we need all the support we can muster to defeat Martin Heinrich and take back the Senate majority. For New Mexico, Nella Domenici Republican for Senate | ABOUT NELLA New Mexico is Nella Domenici’s home. She was born in Albuquerque and lived for most of her childhood in a home near the intersection of Lomas and Monroe with her seven siblings, and her parents - Pete and Nancy Domenici. Nella began her education at Our Lady of Fatima, where she learned the values she holds today. Nella is a proud third-generation New Mexican, devoted mother of two, step-mom of four, and the wife of a Navy Veteran. Nella’s family’s roots run deep in New Mexico and she and her husband Pat enjoy their family home in New Mexico that they have owned for nearly twenty years. Like most New Mexicans, Nella Domenici understands the importance of hard work. She waited tables to help pay for her undergraduate degree from Georgetown University, and worked her way through night school at Georgetown Law while holding down a full time job. She then graduated from Harvard Business School as a Baker Scholar, top 5% of the class, while 9 months pregnant. Nella began her career at the bottom and worked her way up through the complex finance world, eventually serving as CFO for one of the world’s largest, most successful investment firms. In her career, Nella advised, invested in, grew, and led many companies, and served on public company boards. The industries she has worked in are vast and include areas such as health care, AI, food service, lodging, commercial real estate, mortgage lending, and consumer products. These companies have ranged from small family-owned businesses, to rapidly growing venture backed enterprises, to a Fortune 200 company. Several of these have been headquartered in New Mexico. Collectively, the companies Nella has been heavily involved with have employed thousands of Americans. Like her father and mother, Nella has been a warrior for those who most need an advocate: for women competing in academics or business, for families dealing with mental illness, and for those without access to quality healthcare or education. Follow Nella Online** Checks can be made payable to Nella for Senate and mailed to PO Box 92918 | Albuquerque, NM 87199 | Paid for by Nella for Senate Don't want to receive any more of our emails? clean_body: We’ve got a plan to ensure that when Election Day comes, we can block MAGA Republicans from gaining power in the states, but we’ll need your support to set it into action. | | | | | ---|--- With just over 70 days until Election Day, we need to come together as a team. VP Harris said it best: With Trump’s MAGA movement raising over $50 million in the first 24 hours following his guilty conviction, extreme Republicans raising $331 million last quarter, and the RSLC's $38 million plan to win in state races, it’s clear we’ve got our work cut out for us. We’ve got a plan to ensure that when Election Day comes, we can block MAGA Republicans from gaining power in the states, but we’ll need your support to set it into action. Here’s what we’ve got on our agenda: Mobilize grassroots support to counteract the GOP’s financial advantage, Strengthen voter outreach through door-knocking and phone banking, Invest in key battleground states where Democrats need us the most, and Develop winning strategies to secure victories this fall, in 2025, and beyond. We cannot continue this work without your support. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | Thank you for stepping up when it matters the most. name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Taking back the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
The campaign to take back America is underway. We are fighting for the America First agenda and to elect true conservatives loyal to President Trump. | **Joe Biden and Kamala Harris are the worst political duo in modern American history, Peter.**

They have:

**Opened our country up to an invasion over our southern border.** **Made a mockery of our country with his weak foreign policy.** **Protected the vile Democrats who want to transition children and have pornography in school libraries.** **Destroyed the once -thriving Trump economy they were handed to begin this administration. **
[**The Senate elections are vital.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=48b5bf79993142ba833dc0af5fc998fd&_e=4rO2UY0ewniiA6EmZG51244QEeI-iKOBLHIl_bOmLcsz0QnCxAL3qBh8rYIephVqF7QM4AtCi9BejRsHnfwFswGC4VUvjmKgrDxkcPpBu9obZM0j2QT7Jbu-A48qOTpI89Abf3h-gzi_sXXlPkdZHzyE9vxtcInpT2CN2q9wBH1VDndMbm6C4C3zpK8_Ln6IB4VrsbFE4usUeepk3_3L_KISdj-TJyhtUlJz2qGXNDTOF4M4h5V9OIN_rYAzsM7ch21JpFvUKQc8f9B0z1H8hpQLpypti8IDCdUFSa9og2wO6O1iK3x_uzRZrCZpIV9khrqcO4EUpC5B5Ca205L_rnoPk1F3OL9DI8oVAEroLyw5OzvHkZF0I6gf4WO7A0EFv3hCipzPrN1NkbFmUraNmcLrRwy4UYS_ngl9zKoIA--jZ8ATf7V6g2851jbv6BxrAqAADJCG3FEHqs77UF20Hg%3D%3D) We can't waste President Trump's time in office. We need to be able to capitalize on and pass critical legislation that will secure our border, restore sanity to our schools, protect America's international interests, and restore the thriving Trump economy.

That only happens if we take back the Senate so President Trump can pass the America First agenda into law.

[ **TAKE BACK THE SENATE ->**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=48b5bf79993142ba833dc0af5fc998fd&_e=4rO2UY0ewniiA6EmZG51244QEeI-iKOBLHIl_bOmLcsz0QnCxAL3qBh8rYIephVqF7QM4AtCi9BejRsHnfwFswGC4VUvjmKgrDxkcPpBu9obZM0j2QT7Jbu-A48qOTpI89Abf3h-gzi_sXXlPkdZHzyE9vxtcInpT2CN2q9wBH1VDndMbm6C4C3zpK8_Ln6IB4VrsbFE4usUeepk3_3L_KISdj-TJyhtUlJz2qGXNDTOF4M4h5V9OIN_rYAzsM7ch21JpFvUKQc8f9B0z1H8hpQLpypti8IDCdUFSa9og2wO6O1iK3x_uzRZrCZpIV9kSbx_LxvsR42eO4HS_ZCCGvOom2NTghjnGsY6n3xv75qMeuBhU4mWAmxu9T2OfHQ1iNXAqOZ4RQsLEBA1F4Ix_H_XHhdgYlgR6zXX5iRUhhQg9i7AnH7Emw22c1KFjnHNm6m-80ryfAmWaWdzAyz0eA%3D%3D)
It is understandable to believe that America is under attack from within. These radicals in the Democrat party don't love America; they **hate** our country and want to see us fall. They are enacting policies that will destroy our Nation if we let them.

It's time to get into the game. This election cycle will be the most competitive on record, with billions of dollars spent determining who controls the U.S. House, the U.S. Senate, and the White House.

We can't afford for you to sit on the sidelines, Peter.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=48b5bf79993142ba833dc0af5fc998fd&_e=4rO2UY0ewniiA6EmZG51244QEeI-iKOBLHIl_bOmLcsz0QnCxAL3qBh8rYIephVqF7QM4AtCi9BejRsHnfwFswGC4VUvjmKgrDxkcPpBu9obZM0j2QT7Jbu-A48qOTpI89Abf3h-gzi_sXXlPkdZHzyE9vxtcInpT2CN2q9wBH1VDndMbm6C4C3zpK8_Ln6IB4VrsbFE4usUeepk3_3L_KISdj-TJyhtUlJz2qGXNDTOF4M4h5V9OIN_rYAzsM7ch21JpFvUKQc8f9B0z1H8hpQLpypti8IDCdUFSa9og2wO6O1iK3x_uzRZrCZpIV9ksM6zdbU5YgLcM8Vkbxmm8erllsupIl4BKpQNXhMNaTDX8YAQh4MtEtB-ti_r69n4ILffUhWh9cWxTqDTu-FXR9-wvZCWSHi28bPth34zgL3Ci8awJc_OrjnqODRdpXKX0XY4efSFh4UgvG9d86hE4Q%3D%3D)

Marjorie Taylor Greene

Jon Tester CRUSHED us in online fundraising in July. He hauled in just shy of $4.5 million online. 34% of the money came from the left coasts! 21% from California 8% from New York and, 5% from Washington state. Over 1/3 of Jon Tester’s total fundraising is coming from out-of-state liberals who want to control Montana from afar. The left coasts fund Tester fully, and I need your help to avoid being outraised by a margin of 4 AGAIN in August. Please make an urgent donation to keep me in this race – we are falling behind at a critical moment that could QUICKLY doom my campaign. Jon Tester can keep the support of the DC establishment and the left-coast radicals that are funding his corrupt campaign. I’m fighting for YOUR support and the support of millions of patriots like you, who I need to step up and help fund my campaign for the last 75 days. Unlike my opponent who is the #1 recipient of lobbyist cash, I will NEVER sell out to political special interests in Washington. I’m a former Navy SEAL, proud father and husband, aerial firefighter, and successful business owner. I’m a limited government conservative who knows America must lead with peace through strength, or global chaos ensues. Thank you for standing with me at this critical moment. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. Peter,
Even with inflation lowering, food prices still seem sky-high.
It’s another sign of corporate greed hurting Arizonan consumers. CEOs shouldn’t be lining their pockets with record profits while families struggle to put food on the table or pay for medications.
When I was in the Arizona legislature, I took on price-gouging corporations, but Republicans killed the bill.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_email?refcode=X_082524_PriceGouging_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_email?refcode=X_082524_PriceGouging_act]
Similarly, my opponent seems more interested in giving breaks to corporations writing campaign checks than taking on price-gouging. He opposed the Inflation Reduction Act, which has brought down the prices of the ten top-selling prescription drugs by as much as 79%, cracked down on corporations that don’t pay federal taxes, and made it easier for Arizona families to afford their energy bills.
And now, he’s taking millions of dollars from corporate PACs that want to protect his seat.
We can prove that Arizona’s Sixth Congressional District can’t be bought this November.
Even if it's just $5, your grassroots support will help flip this frontline district blue. With my opponent's allies outspending us on TV, I have to ask: Can you rush a donation now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_email?refcode=X_082524_PriceGouging_act]

subject: Our movement depends on a fair count
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
Project 2025 represents a radical anti-democracy agenda, and we need to stop that agenda in its tracks.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/91508516/494062095/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRmYmQzZmYwLTBkNjMtZWYxMS05OTFhLTYwNDViZGRiZmM0YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=cPSZowVQ1FWwnsYCirOhzdh8VQDPYYG5Evqqp2CdSO0=&emci=96d601d2-8e61-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&emdi=4fbd3ff0-0d63-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, Donald Trump tried to upend the U.S. Census while he was president, and the fair maps movement rallied to stop him. **But now, Project 2025’s plan for the census would be _even worse_.** Not only does Project 2025 call for green-lighting Trump’s racist and unconstitutional citizenship question on the census, it would also turn management of the census over to the same types of right-wing political operatives that authored Project 2025. They're clearly trying to reshape the census — which plays a critical role in the process of map drawing and redistricting, as well as allocating funds from the government. **We know that our fight for fair maps and our movement to end partisan gerrymandering depends on a fair count of the voters. If we’re going to be successful in our mission, we need to stop the radical anti-democracy agenda that Project 2025 represents.[That’s why we’re asking you to rush a donation to the NDRC right away. → ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/91508520/494062099/-1472687013?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_Proj2025CensusRedux_email_20240825-NDRC-Tier1-Proj2025CensusRedux-NOR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20240825-NDRC-Tier1-Proj2025CensusRedux-NOR_&utm_campaign=Proj2025CensusRedux&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRmYmQzZmYwLTBkNjMtZWYxMS05OTFhLTYwNDViZGRiZmM0YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=cPSZowVQ1FWwnsYCirOhzdh8VQDPYYG5Evqqp2CdSO0=)** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: Project 2025 represents a radical anti-democracy agenda, and we need to stop that agenda in its tracks. | Peter, Donald Trump tried to upend the U.S. Census while he was president, and the fair maps movement rallied to stop him. But now, Project 2025’s plan for the census would be even worse. Not only does Project 2025 call for green-lighting Trump’s racist and unconstitutional citizenship question on the census, it would also turn management of the census over to the same types of right-wing political operatives that authored Project 2025. They're clearly trying to reshape the census — which plays a critical role in the process of map drawing and redistricting, as well as allocating funds from the government. We know that our fight for fair maps and our movement to end partisan gerrymandering depends on a fair count of the voters. If we’re going to be successful in our mission, we need to stop the radical anti-democracy agenda that Project 2025 represents.= | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = The more we learn about Project 2025, the more we know just how much of a disaster it would be for our country and our democracy. As a supporter of the NDRC, you have a unique understanding of what’s at stake. You know that everything that we care about, and all the progress we need to make, depends on having fair maps so the voice of the people can be heard. So if Project 2025 makes ANY sort of advancement in our government, we could be in serious trouble. = Thank you, —NDRC HQ = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 1015 18th Street NW, Suite 1000 Washington, DC 20036 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

Peter,

Without a doubt, the most rewarding part of running for office is getting to meet Granite Staters like you. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91508738/494062586/1380915657?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024.08.25_FAVORITEPART_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDMwNmQ1Yi0wZTYzLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q07v1OEcB8zI9tqUtm_4j4cVAc_r1nyrnYz9Ero6aWA=) From the North Country to the Seacoast, I’ve cherished every opportunity to connect with folks from all walks of life, listening to their hopes, concerns, and struggles.

Each conversation reminds me of why I’m in this race — to fight for a New Hampshire that works for everyone, where our rights and freedoms are protected.

Unfortunately, __driving all over New Hampshire isn’t cheap__. The costs of traveling add up quickly, especially as I strive to reach every corner of our community.

**That’s where you come in, Peter. **[Can you chip in $10 today to keep me on the road, meeting as many New Hampshire voters as possible? Your contribution will make a real difference in my ability to connect with people like you and bring our message of hope and change to every town and city. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91508739/494062587/43219686?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024.08.25_FAVORITEPART_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDMwNmQ1Yi0wZTYzLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q07v1OEcB8zI9tqUtm_4j4cVAc_r1nyrnYz9Ero6aWA=) | | [**$10 »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91508740/494062588/43219686?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024.08.25_FAVORITEPART_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDMwNmQ1Yi0wZTYzLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q07v1OEcB8zI9tqUtm_4j4cVAc_r1nyrnYz9Ero6aWA=)

subject: A great rebuke to Betsy DeVos...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1821%2E135344%2E1KMhZI)

If everyone reading this donated $3 to Elissa Slotkin’s Senate campaign, we would not only have a huge number of donations, but we would reach the incremental goals we need to hit in order to win this race and keep Michigan’s Senate seat BLUE.
Unfortunately, not everyone gives. And the fact that Elissa rejects corporate PAC money makes things harder than they could be. [**So she's relying on people who understand how important this race is -- and Michigan is -- to chip in.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-aug24._YMjeK&refcode=em240825-2-900&t=2&akid=1821%2E135344%2E1KMhZI)**
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-aug24._YMjeK&refcode=em240825-2-900&t=3&akid=1821%2E135344%2E1KMhZI)
Friends --
The DeVos family has supported opponents of Elissa in the past, and it looks like they’re ready to double down on this Senate race.
Republican Mike Rogers' first FEC report was filled with donations from a bunch of members of the DeVos family -- contributions totaling $46,200 all made on one single day.
By contrast, the majority of the donations we receive come from people contributing significantly smaller donations than the DeVos family made to Mike Rogers.
And what you may not know is that one of the single greatest sources of individual donations to our campaign is the response to emails like this.
That’s why Elissa would love to earn your support today. [**Your help using this link to make a contribution to Elissa’s campaign for United States Senate would be a great rebuke to the DeVos support.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-aug24._YMjeK&refcode=em240825-2-900&t=4&akid=1821%2E135344%2E1KMhZI)

For more than 25 years, Ryan was a successful gun industry executive. But he also saw how unchecked extremism could take away American freedoms and even jeopardize our democracy. Ryan sees the same thing happening to Montana: wealthy extremist Greg Gianforte bought his seat with his own millions, and now he’s raising our taxes in order to give tax breaks to corporations, making Montana unaffordable, defunding our public schools, locking up our public lands, hijacking our freedoms, and rigging the system for the rich.

Ryan chose Raph Graybill as his running mate because no Montanan has done more to protect constitutional rights and freedoms from Greg Gianforte. Since Gianforte became governor, Raph has blocked more than a dozen different unconstitutional laws that invaded Montanans’ constitutional rights.

name: Debbie
subject: Did you catch me on MSNBC?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
What I told Joy Reid on air:
| | |
---
Hi, friend — **did you see me on MSNBC?**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91509711/494065865/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1780-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzE5ODgxYjctMTA2My1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KjeJG-SioNF9Fk_-5BrAqI7g_GPRu5GImCBOPpkt_-o=)
A lot has happened in the last few weeks: Vice President Kamala Harris became the official Democratic Presidential nominee running to keep Donald Trump out of the White House, bringing on Tim Walz as her running mate, and I became the official Democratic nominee for Florida's U.S. Senate seat. Now, we’re seeing a surge of grassroots momentum from Democrats across the country — I was so excited to watch this excitement grow even more at the Democratic National Convention last week. With just 71 days left until the General Election, my team and I are doing everything we can, from traveling across the state to connect with voters, launching Spanish radio ads to fight back against Rick Scott's attack ads naming me directly during the _Copa América_ broadcast, to filming brand-new TV ads.
That's why I was so glad to discuss these major updates with Joy Reid to spread the word nationwide about how high the stakes are in Florida's elections.
Listen: **Rick Scott co-sponsored a nationwide ban on abortions, he wrote the plan to end Medicare and Social Security, and he wants to raise taxes on the middle class.** This is a guy whose agenda is too extreme for even Mitch McConnell — and now he’s running to take McConnell’s place as the next Senate Republican leader.
_Friend, we absolutely cannot let him become the Senate majority leader this November._
**Make no mistake: Mitch McConnell's time as Senate GOP leader was one of the worst things to ever happen to the Senate.** It will take years for our country and our democracy to fully recover from his decades of corruption, cronyism, extremism, and obstruction.
_**But Rick Scott as Senate GOP leader would be much, much worse.**_
He's already spent over** $4 MILLION **running attack ads, and he can keep writing checks from his massive fortune of almost a quarter-billion dollars. Last time around, he spent **$64 million **of his own fortune to buy his seat.
**I'm not just up against an extremist, friend — I'm up against a _multi-millionaire_ extremist. With this momentum on our side, we have a golden opportunity to build the resources it'll take to retire him, so long as I can count on your help. [Will you please rush $5 to help me build a grassroots campaign that can defeat Scott's fortune, flip Florida blue, and stop the GOP's anti-choice extremism in Florida and across the nation?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91509712/494065866/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1780-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzE5ODgxYjctMTA2My1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KjeJG-SioNF9Fk_-5BrAqI7g_GPRu5GImCBOPpkt_-o=)**
_Please use the links in this email to start a weekly donation through ActBlue._ | | | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91509713/494065867/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1780-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzE5ODgxYjctMTA2My1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KjeJG-SioNF9Fk_-5BrAqI7g_GPRu5GImCBOPpkt_-o=)

name: Jon Tester
subject: Seven
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
Tammy Baldwin here — I wanted to make sure you saw this message from my
colleague, Jon Tester. Jon is running for reelection in Montana to defend
our Democratic Senate majority, so I hope you'll read his message and
[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-tester.Z0aSwr&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240825_PM1_V1_S1&t=1003&akid=3456%2E35263%2EPhQy5y ]chip in if you can.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Hey Peter, it’s Jon
Tester.

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-tester.Z0aSwr&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240825_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=3456%2E35263%2EPhQy5y ]Jon Tester

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3695?c0=tbe-em-tester.-kgxmD&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240825_PM1_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=3456%2E35263%2EPhQy5y ]I’m reaching out to see if you could split a donation of $7 or more
between Tammy Baldwin and my campaign to help us defend Montana’s Senate
seat. Here are 7 reasons why your donation today is so important (that’s
one for every finger!):

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3695?c0=tbe-em-tester.-kgxmD&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240825_PM1_V1_S1&t=1006&akid=3456%2E35263%2EPhQy5y ]DONATE $7

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-tester.Z0aSwr&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240825_PM1_V1_S1&t=1007&akid=3456%2E35263%2EPhQy5y ]OTHER AMOUNT

1. Political experts rank this race a toss-up, which means your gift will
have a huge impact on our ability to raise the resources we need to
win.
2. Tim Sheehy is wrong for Montana. He wants to privatize health care,
sell off our public lands, and would support a national abortion ban.
3. Mitch McConnell is desperate to beat me. He named me one of his top
targets, and outside groups are spending millions to pummel me with
attacks.
4. Their attacks are working. The polls have tightened into a statistical
tie, and this race couldn’t be any closer—[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3695?c0=tbe-em-tester.-kgxmD&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240825_PM1_V1_S1&t=1008&akid=3456%2E35263%2EPhQy5y ]your $7 will help us pull
ahead.
5. I won my first Senate race by just 3,562 votes... and this election
could be even closer.
6. We’re less than 100 days out from Election Day, and we’re falling
behind in our fundraising. If we can’t afford to keep our ads up, our

Jon is running for reelection in Montana to defend our Democratic Senate majority, so I hope you'll read his message and [ ]chip in if you can. Hey Peter, it’s Jon Tester. [ ]Jon Tester [ ]I’m reaching out to see if you could split a donation of $7 or more between Tammy Baldwin and my campaign to help us defend Montana’s Senate seat. Here are 7 reasons why your donation today is so important (that’s one for every finger!): [ ]DONATE $7 [ ]OTHER AMOUNT 1. Political experts rank this race a toss-up, which means your gift will have a huge impact on our ability to raise the resources we need to win. 2. Tim Sheehy is wrong for Montana. He wants to privatize health care, sell off our public lands, and would support a national abortion ban. 3. Mitch McConnell is desperate to beat me. He named me one of his top targets, and outside groups are spending millions to pummel me with attacks. 4. Their attacks are working. The polls have tightened into a statistical tie, and this race couldn’t be any closer—[ ]your $7 will help us pull ahead. 5. I won my first Senate race by just 3,562 votes... and this election could be even closer. 6. We’re less than 100 days out from Election Day, and we’re falling behind in our fundraising. If we can’t afford to keep our ads up, our opponent’s attacks will drown us out. 7. We can’t win without you. | | In case you missed it, Google recently removed the PragerU app from the Play Store without warning. Only after our app disappeared from Google’s platform did they bother to notify us that it had been suspended and removed indefinitely for “Violation of Hate Speech.”
---
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=009fd753d6054f9b99af68a492e614fd&_e=El77Iecn_zoTSpMsTZP7ePsD7-SvsAsooko4K09InbGyW-Jw3eI64hWdP8idqzn6wfAm0QBMZe9bFc2q6YdDfcdRF-CJRYoXyOJMoNYH-ylN3r-nucnzQI0V8op3w_9jWYW74W4OEZaENqMWE-vtiso6xIe1kaKa2E22IpRNKkE7Qw6CDyGXRuRa6_16m_cVtv-BdKo9o9VvgxcJn0Yxv4ICaUDwaJnEzFMob5tFCdFlw9Qe7barpT_cAbbyKCVBxIBqRUsD5s7RmUTa4GAtjQ%3D%3D)

[**3X My Support**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=009fd753d6054f9b99af68a492e614fd&_e=El77Iecn_zoTSpMsTZP7ePsD7-SvsAsooko4K09InbGyW-Jw3eI64hWdP8idqzn6wfAm0QBMZe9bFc2q6YdDfcdRF-CJRYoXyOJMoNYH-ylN3r-nucnzQI0V8op3w_9jY1diGtpiqfTYsJtrYpyz2UGR0K6Ik1Mw_eEzrtzHilsYMZajJ-hoVHJ4mp_KwGDbk4dSmZ6rLEQp0Rohd1laqQpMEdud-nuIC9AR87p6xnsHTdNfox13Bc-QneLw2DxHXkNDYQy77nhCiES0sTLh-w%3D%3D)
---
In the email from Google, they said our app contained “content or speech asserting that a protected group is inhuman, inferior, or worthy of being hated,” referring to our recently released short documentary, **Dear Infidels: A Warning to America** , which features first-hand accounts from individuals who escaped the oppressive grip of radical Islamic rule. According to Google, sharing the stories of a former Palestinian refugee, an Arab Muslim born in Israel, and brave U.S. Navy SEALs who witnessed the horrors of Muslim extremism constitutes “hate speech.” **Dear Infidels** went viral on social media, reaching millions of people! Like clockwork, Big Tech reared its ugly head to shut us down and suppress our reach. **[**Fight Big Tech while your tax-deductible gift to PragerU is TRIPLED and has 3X the impact.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=009fd753d6054f9b99af68a492e614fd&_e=El77Iecn_zoTSpMsTZP7ePsD7-SvsAsooko4K09InbGyW-Jw3eI64hWdP8idqzn6wfAm0QBMZe9bFc2q6YdDfcdRF-CJRYoXyOJMoNYH-ylN3r-nucnzQI0V8op3w_9jYMS956_Ij2vrzxuNSnPG750BGzXRbhFvyvcxykeSyq8fVRbpGoZ6dvSoUhHjfxtS0NieYArNvHlsdOPmmHHyChCrKgmmH3hBjCi-VV1HzjptVh70cVs-ITejEDk5v8QLK7aQEd_fJsiCdRg4F-qcZw%3D%3D)** We immediately jumped into action and began sounding the alarm. Thanks to our dedicated followers and supporters, Big Tech did NOT win, and their Soviet-style censorship tactics were thwarted. After major outcry from our supporters and several media outlets, Google put the PragerU app back on the Google Play Store...for now. Unfortunately, we know this won’t be the last time we are targeted by Big Tech giants. It is imperative that we keep fighting for our freedoms. **[**At PragerU, we always fight back, but we need your help.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=009fd753d6054f9b99af68a492e614fd&_e=El77Iecn_zoTSpMsTZP7ePsD7-SvsAsooko4K09InbGyW-Jw3eI64hWdP8idqzn6wfAm0QBMZe9bFc2q6YdDfcdRF-CJRYoXyOJMoNYH-ylN3r-nucnzQI0V8op3w_9jmZU1ZL3u6ICQzKoutZwprwnM4ZeqEcFnfmbCZc0Mc86QVUn6BWrNZeASTczmh7aCjBYJqkXBOwmrOONuenJOcCtbHKodcu8VLhIaATLxBQXa9R3Rl6tCD8MKhRSQRXjAvbNRW96U1-9k206sb4ST5Q%3D%3D)** This is a David vs. Goliath battle. They may expect us to give up and throw in the towel, but as long as there is breath in our lungs, and courageous supporters like you standing beside us, we refuse to be silenced. **[**Join us in the fight against Big Tech censorship and your 100% tax-deductible donation will be TRIPLED.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=009fd753d6054f9b99af68a492e614fd&_e=El77Iecn_zoTSpMsTZP7ePsD7-SvsAsooko4K09InbGyW-Jw3eI64hWdP8idqzn6wfAm0QBMZe9bFc2q6YdDfcdRF-CJRYoXyOJMoNYH-ylN3r-nucnzQI0V8op3w_9jubDuvgA12XPAwEIXy1i9AicLdQWIJIUhoYzGvBEs6NxeUH-oMMsqqm65jDizpohbKh_w2xVFXP6DpqwHZZmkzMcS6G5o_23FyTv7eq5i_nUMFcsnsgsgOYNHAxneFPys2mxvCBWeP3Aq7_le7qmJFw%3D%3D)** Your generous tax-deductible donation will help us to keep fighting Big Tech, expand our reach, and continue our mission to educate and inspire Americans with the truth. Every TRIPLE-MATCHED dollar counts in this battle for free speech and the future of our nation. Donate now to 3X your gift and ensure PragerU’s voice remains loud and clear! Sincerely, Your PragerU team
---
[**3X My Support**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=009fd753d6054f9b99af68a492e614fd&_e=El77Iecn_zoTSpMsTZP7ePsD7-SvsAsooko4K09InbGyW-Jw3eI64hWdP8idqzn6wfAm0QBMZe9bFc2q6YdDfcdRF-CJRYoXyOJMoNYH-ylN3r-nucnzQI0V8op3w_9jAYpPSaZGX5u20fgDf2plJ4CbEmWDhgVKa23yCW28_lFCsqGJXxQQCHqVv-3FJ9pifO03VvwYMUfCeb0Z11DfHc6PMLFse8C0hjxFeocENV80LYi5dA75tGAdWpYl1Td13PO0VvkwHYCBCgQ8I22tGw%3D%3D)

I've been doing this stuff for decades, and I can't remember an election that feels as important as this one. The polls are tight as can be. Republican megadonors are spending over A HUNDRED MILLION BUCKS to defeat Senate Dems.**And if we lose, they could push through ALL of the _crazy_ you-know-what in Project 2025.

We can't let them do that. We just can't. So instead we've gotta act -- here's how:

** On my recommendation, the folks at the DSCC have agreed to unlock an _exclusive_ Triple-Impact Match -- _but only until midnight_. When the stakes are this high -- and the polls this close -- every dollar counts.

**This better light a fire under you. It's time to get going, so please:

[Chip in $5 (_becomes $15!_) to help win tight races like these and defend our Senate majority. Your support right now will help stop MAGA Republicans from taking the Senate.](https://go.dscc.org/go/19585?amount=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20240825-JamesCarville-CarvilleSenatePollUpdateTIMRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20240825-JamesCarville-CarvilleSenatePollUpdateTIMRF-Pros-sl1&akid=16750%2E9716520%2EqUX1Hs)**

clean_body: | | | Hey, it's James Carville.Frankly, I'm pretty freakin' nervous. I've been doing this stuff for decades, and I can't remember an election that feels as important as this one. The polls are tight as can be. Republican megadonors are spending over A HUNDRED MILLION BUCKS to defeat Senate Dems.And if we lose, they could push through ALL of the crazy you-know-what in Project 2025. We can't let them do that. We just can't. So instead we've gotta act -- here's how: On my recommendation, the folks at the DSCC have agreed to unlock an exclusive Triple-Impact Match -- but only until midnight. When the stakes are this high -- and the polls this close -- every dollar counts. This better light a fire under you. It's time to get going, so please: If you've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | Thanks. \- James Derivative of by JD Lasica. . The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please . to receive fewer emails. to unsubscribe. name: Reject Netanyahu via Our Revolution
subject: Add your name: Ilhan Omar - "If you really wanted a Ceasefire, you'd just stop sending the weapons"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis, as the
Israeli military continues bombing innocent civilians in Gaza, the United
States continues supporting Netanyahu’s atrocities with funding and bombs.

The Biden administration just closed a $20 billion weapons sale to Israel.
U.S.-made weapons have been used by Netanyahu’s military in atrocity after
atrocity, including one recently that killed nearly 100 people at a
school. 40,000 people in Gaza are dead. Palestinians face mass starvation.
And America keeps sending Israel more bombs.

Outside the DNC last week, Ilhan Omar said what many elected Democrats
refuse to admit: “If you really wanted a Ceasefire, you'd just stop
sending the weapons.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/19267?source=email-20240825&t=1011&akid=6640%2E5885482%2E6e07kg ]Add your name: Stop sending bombs to Netanyahu and the Israeli
military! It is unconscionable to continue American support for the
atrocities against the Palestinian people.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/19267?source=email-20240825&t=1012&akid=6640%2E5885482%2E6e07kg ]ADD YOUR NAME

One of the reasons that Ilhan Omar made her statement outside of the DNC
is because the Democratic Party refused to give a speaking slot to
Palestinian-Americans and the Uncommitted Movement.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/19267?source=email-20240825&t=1013&akid=6640%2E5885482%2E6e07kg ][IMG]

When the Uncommitted Movement and pro-Peace progressives like Ilhan and
Summer Lee heard this news, they began a sit-in outside the DNC.

Inside the DNC, there was a panel on Palestinian rights, and we know Trump
will be worse on this issue, but we must keep building pressure and
momentum to end this senseless killing of Palestinian civilians and
children with American-made bombs.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/19267?source=email-20240825&t=1014&akid=6640%2E5885482%2E6e07kg ][IMG]

The U.S. government’s concerns over dead civilians means nothing without
changing policy. Netanyahu cannot continue the atrocities in Gaza without
U.S. support and weapons.

The Biden administration is spinning its wheels as Netanyahu continues to
block a peace deal. But that hasn’t stopped Biden and Congress from
sending billions of dollars and more weapons to Israel. The Democratic
Party and the Biden administration must listen to our movement for peace.
Our elected leaders must show the will and courage to change American
policy and end the bombing of Gaza.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/19267?source=email-20240825&t=1015&akid=6640%2E5885482%2E6e07kg ]Add your name: President Biden and Congress MUST end weapons sales to
Israel.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=6640%2E5885482%2E6e07kg ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=6640%2E5885482%2E6e07kg ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=6640%2E5885482%2E6e07kg ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=6640%2E5885482%2E6e07kg ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=6640%2E5885482%2E6e07kg ]Website |

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13120?c0=email-20240825.IlKQmg&t=1008&akid=6640%2E5885482%2E6e07kg ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a 2024 Movement Builder with a
recurring donation of just $5 or more a month!

But it's actually a guy named Bernie Moreno, who "simply tries to ride Trump's coattails," according to _CNN_. Sound familiar?

Well, Moreno, Trump, and JD Vance are rallying their dark-money donors to try to flip this seat because they know our race will decide Senate control. Now, we're officially being outspent.

We need to fight back ASAP, or we could put all our progress in danger. That's why we set a goal to raise $500,000 in the next 48 hours – and unlike our MAGA opponent, we're relying on grassroots donations from folks like YOU, friend, to help us get there.

Project 2025 will be devastating for military families like mine.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91511589/494072254/-601345983?amount=25&amounts=5,10,5,50,250,500&refcode=em_fr_2024.08.25_b1_dt&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjhiYzUzYzMtMTU2My1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YlSzBPy2uNM94NymvV7SYoy5Wy-E0MzOTs9yO7GlHcQ=)

Friend, I wanted to reach out about something important: **Project 2025 and the danger it presents to America.** Project 2025 proposes a lot of extreme, dangerous ideas – from limiting choice to hurting the middle class, the whole agenda is a dangerous attack on democracy. As a proud Army veteran, I wanted to bring attention to how **Project 2025 specifically targets families who have sacrificed for this country: **
* Project 2025 will slash benefits for active-duty military personnel. The agenda proposes making **massive cuts to housing allowances that military families rely on to make ends meet.**
* They plan to make disastrous cuts to Veterans Affairs, eliminating VA medical care eligibility to “low priority” veterans... **Friend, I cannot believe that they would ever make someone _who made their freedoms a priority,_ a low priority for receiving basic medical care. **
* They plan to pardon and elevate insurrectionists. **This feels like a slap in the face to anyone who has fought for democracy.**

We need to elect leaders who will defend military families and prioritize their needs over people who tried to overthrow the government. **As a veteran myself, I am committed to making sure that military families receive the protection they deserve.** **I cannot say the same for my opponent and her track record of signing off on any extreme far-right legislation that crosses her desk. ** [Friend, will you help me oust dangerous leaders like Michelle Steel and ensure we have a House Majority that will shut down dangerous policies like the ones outlined in Project 2025?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91511590/494072255/-601345983?amount=25&refcode=em_fr_2024.08.25_b1_dt&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjhiYzUzYzMtMTU2My1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YlSzBPy2uNM94NymvV7SYoy5Wy-E0MzOTs9yO7GlHcQ=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Derek Tran will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91511591/494072256/-601345983?amount=5&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&refcode=em_fr_2024.08.25_b1_dt&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjhiYzUzYzMtMTU2My1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YlSzBPy2uNM94NymvV7SYoy5Wy-E0MzOTs9yO7GlHcQ=)
