name: Janelle Bynum
subject: Good news and bad news
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JANELLE BYNUM FOR CONGRESS
body:
Team, I’ve really enjoyed hitting the campaign trail and meeting with voters who are fired up and ready to win this competitive race. We’re one step closer to flipping OR-05 and taking back the House.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91511728/494072928/476240536?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2024.08.25_b1_jb_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzExMjZkNTItMTY2My1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=l9ZaDpIyKeOFtTjdTdZ6TchJJV3l9QPokgFDerBrHto=) Team, I’ve really enjoyed hitting the campaign trail and meeting with voters who are fired up and ready to win this competitive race. We’re one step closer to **flipping OR-05 and taking back the House.**

**But here's the bad news: We’re up against millions of dollars in spending by deep-pocketed Republicans.** My opponent, Lori Chavez-DeRemer, launched TV ads last week, and Republicans announced that they’re spending $6 million in ads against me this fall...the most in any market in the entire country. As Republicans gear up to pour more money into this race, we need a flood of support to fight back and make sure we’re not getting drowned out on the airwaves. **[That's why I'm personally asking: Can you give $5 right now to help us keep our ads on the air, and continue to reach undecided voters? With everything we’re up against, we can’t afford to fall short. Our momentum is at an all-time high, but to ensure we enter these final months stronger than ever we’ve set a $15,000 goal to hit by midnight on Saturday, August 31st. I cannot emphasize enough how fired up I am to continue making critical progress for my home district of NC-04, and our nation as a whole.
But, I’ll admit, as much as this race is historic — it’s tough. As we get closer and closer to Election Day, we need to be reaching as many voters as possible — and that’s only possible if we have the resources, Peter.
[Our end-of-month goal of $15,000 will provide us with the critical foundation of grassroots support needed to recruit more volunteers, mobilize more swing voters, and connect with the diverse communities that span this district. clean_body: Our end-of-month goal is on Saturday... If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Hi Peter, It’s impossible to convey how historic last week was. Democrats from across the nation united in Chicago to celebrate democracy, adopt a comprehensive party platform, and officially nominate Kamala Harris for President of the United States. I had the privilege of being there as the first Black woman officially accepted the nomination at the top of the Democratic ticket — President of the United States. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = I cannot emphasize enough how fired up I am to continue making critical progress for my home district of NC-04, and our nation as a whole. But, I’ll admit, as much as this race is historic — it’s tough. As we get closer and closer to Election Day, we need to be reaching as many voters as possible — and that’s only possible if we have the resources, Peter. = = Thank you, Valerie | = Paid for by Foushee for Congress Valerie Foushee for Congress PO Box 16446 Chapel Hill, NC 27516 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, You can also =.

body:
Since our last survey in July, a whole lot has happened in the political world. | | | Peter — since our last monthly member survey in July, _a whole lot_ has happened in the political world. **Before we head into the stretch run of the 2024 campaign, we wanted to take a moment to get caught up with you.** [**Can you take our quick August 2024 WFP Member Survey to share your thoughts on Kamala Harris' campaign and the current political moment?**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRJ-DmxrOgNSm5J37YZeN7Yhvkpe0Qg17JHjpMVnlqPduMqvpKfAbjee2audVxEtyblekMiXdx4t4X0YtPlqvuPtCBH9WFi85eTyCZOCKYARolWDlRJEy8Twsg8B0eHj1ospsEXrgojPr0BYSDwGgNKE_pqAp5JmWuF7ocKXS20-CZlGs4msj47Dlp7RPNmFgSf9wT1wl5OnaCTpWEB8xS-m3eAKCOxLJpLVbLoqPZK1801qx8mRRgnIRrlhQJG9IHmXoGB9K0kpJDemq19Aamx5/497/6cpDGWT0RwO4e5Fn_8eJng/h0/h001.szjtgFTbl-oFAr9pQy9cfF4NqgE426hnvQFx4mPitHI) To get started, here's the first question: **_1\. **[5 (very excited)](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRJ-DmxrOgNSm5J37YZeN7Yhvkpe0Qg17JHjpMVnlqPduMqvpKfAbjee2audVxEtybl2O1Q6N-8KA23ddmrWJJFDftr9m70uvgNWgmM4dsYU41bVhLUzglR-Yu8Zk71Xte-Zox4f40ZOC5CXxti4sNKe_y31_GQ2pG8QwiX4NYo0E3f9aLj3A9nQAeTc07vFlMtai8A3IMcuSUB3pQ2IuK4IUwn3_L70LYDbz6PsZj9KokVNm45o91_xQlGjFISZC9PocipvzNxPW5W93qZglDeoIx1vo6PJBjihoVAgz9xTJ22USjqiNhjyQae3h0pt18Mgz0HoqwUU2fTWeXwfTAnO/497/6cpDGWT0RwO4e5Fn_8eJng/h5/h001.1e9mIzU79sjoJve4u800H-ind3hYthiyUoZdEkzf7XE)** Last week, VP Kamala Harris officially accepted the nomination for President at the Democratic National Convention in Chicago and shared her vision for our country. We were also proud to see the voices of so many WFP champions lifted up all week long. That includes voices who inspired us from the convention stage — like Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Rep. Jasmine Crockett, Rep. Maxwell Frost, Chicago Mayor Brandon Johnson, Sen. Bernie Sanders, Sen. Elizabeth Warren, and others. And it also includes those who made their voices heard from off-stage, like the courageous delegates from the Uncommitted Movement and Georgia State Rep. Ruwa Romman (you can read the remarks she was prepared to deliver to the convention [here](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMZ0ws1DfJmNfsubcOy4Lqn65-eckGOvqaPMFmxW_PN0cfoFSiYFivmwSbTG9Jc2MmBHc7j1HIaWuVHhV9yHBUyGOK-m2JxkHdorkVcHVpzsjrbQ3AvpXABlRSSPqHbmf78CfRquY04jEwkahWYjW0DtKaGfEoqfm_iegRCeby-Q9t_6sDtGX3FgwUVcukv82UVordqViOj0o5Nj_te_-wye2ZmHDRS2f4bC1n5athG6EiwQQG6sfrbKnTKl_lMm5eOYdffHMh8tO_ybGqUYwtvtAM4-GDPb-S8jPJgDoKF0FcDTCiWQT7SG1K9iHye2m9hfiNkZslS4H7Fpd-dQ7Cbr086PA5aM-eBfKHwUWHxMs/497/6cpDGWT0RwO4e5Fn_8eJng/h6/h001.uEPXl7d3dZmzLNpZWCIUiLdvQdy1M4pWtaDU1wrXYNc)). All week long, we've heard their perspectives, and their commitment to our strategy of _blocking_ the far-right and _building_ working class power. But to keep our movement accountable to the people we’re fighting for – _people like you_ – we also need to hear from our grassroots supporters. **Our monthly member pulse survey takes only a couple of minutes to fill out — and your responses matter each and every month.** [**Can we count on you to take our August 2024 Pulse Survey now? Your thoughts matter deeply to us as we head into the final 10 weeks of this election season.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRJ-DmxrOgNSm5J37YZeN7Yhvkpe0Qg17JHjpMVnlqPduMqvpKfAbjee2audVxEtyblekMiXdx4t4X0YtPlqvuPtCBH9WFi85eTyCZOCKYARolHzHV57dNlZW_vMI17WtPHOdD79O0qKqrXVlg05zMC1ZMnEgleM_ZVKa_4pdp7YMCrJJc_3WltluuXziVS_qgSYjdivXPrh24WrGoeoZ95iENt8y4I-1quU3ch6tXTfTzE4X-M_0DjqXLaHGSTC3mnw4xDomQTKxodkoERPblYO/497/6cpDGWT0RwO4e5Fn_8eJng/h7/h001.iDqiEJideKoHG0l6Q_TPoAM81z2_UCsGWJDF0DTn5qg) clean_body: Since our last survey in July, a whole lot has happened in the political world. | | | Peter — since our last monthly member survey in July, a whole lot has happened in the political world. Before we head into the stretch run of the 2024 campaign, we wanted to take a moment to get caught up with you. To get started, here's the first question: 1\. On a scale of 1 (not at all excited) to 5 (very excited), how excited are you about Kamala Harris’ campaign for President of the United States? Last week, VP Kamala Harris officially accepted the nomination for President at the Democratic National Convention in Chicago and shared her vision for our country. We were also proud to see the voices of so many WFP champions lifted up all week long. That includes voices who inspired us from the convention stage — like Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Rep. Jasmine Crockett, Rep. Maxwell Frost, Chicago Mayor Brandon Johnson, Sen. Bernie Sanders, Sen. Elizabeth Warren, and others. And it also includes those who made their voices heard from off-stage, like the courageous delegates from the Uncommitted Movement and Georgia State Rep. Ruwa Romman (you can read the remarks she was prepared to deliver to the convention ). All week long, we've heard their perspectives, and their commitment to our strategy of blocking the far-right and building working class power. But to keep our movement accountable to the people we’re fighting for – people like you – we also need to hear from our grassroots supporters. Our monthly member pulse survey takes only a couple of minutes to fill out — and your responses matter each and every month. In solidarity, WFP Digital Team Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Working Families, please .

name: Hannah, Caroline's Finance Team
subject: Looking at the numbers
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE COMMITTEE TO ELECT CAROLINE GLEICH
body:
We have a big update, Friend
---
|
---
We'd hate to see you go, but to unsubscribe from future communications, [please click here.](https://cg4ut.us/l/sSw1NP8m0kL3)
---
| [ ](https://cg4ut.us/l/aSJrG45cBFdT)
---
Hi Friend, it's Hannah from Caroline Gleich's finance team. I have a big update for you. **As we near Election Day, our campaign is working overtime to reach out to people throughout the state and make sure that they understand just how important this race is.** Our teams have been gathering a large amount of support from Utahns across the political spectrum, and with less than three months until the election, we need to continue to spread Caroline's people-first message. **Our goal now is to reach out to as many people as possible before the election, and to do that, we need your help.** While our opponent may have **_big businesses and special interests_** to bankroll his campaign, we count on grassroots contributions from people like you. [**Friend, your support is integral to winning this race. Looking at the numbers shows that the grassroots support this campaign has received not only makes it unique but also powerful. To help us run an election-winning outreach program, can you please donate what you can today?**](https://cg4ut.us/l/6cMiFoEfzh4t)
---
[ DONATE TODAY ](https://cg4ut.us/l/IQcNxAhU0Fgd)
---
Thank you, Hannah Finance Team
---
|
---
We'd hate to see you go, but to unsubscribe from future communications, [please click here.](https://cg4ut.us/l/H1SHj1UtKLK9)
---
| | | Caroline is a professional ski mountaineer, activist, and candidate for US Senate.

[](https://cg4ut.us/l/EzSmQM8AYkCP)

Her journey has been defined by conquering challenging mountain lines, demonstrating resilience, and maintaining an unwavering commitment to positive change.

Caroline is advancing a vision for a sustainable and equitable future, and she hopes to earn your support.

**Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:**

**The Committee to Elect Caroline Gleich**
2223 S Highland Drive #E6, #185
Salt Lake City, UT 84106
---
[ SUPPORT CAROLINE ](https://cg4ut.us/l/lqFqqPMCBrzr)
---
| | PAID FOR BY THE COMMITTEE TO ELECT CAROLINE GLEICH
---

As Kristen’s campaign manager, it’s my job to ensure we have the plan and resources to win.
Central to tha plan are generous grassroots supporters like you. Your donation helps us print yard signs, knock on doors, make phone calls, get our ads on TV and do everything needed to win this race.
We have some big decisions to make in the coming weeks: How many more ads can we run? How many voters can we talk to? All amidst attacks funded by our opponent’s trust fund.
With your support, we can reach every single voter we’ll need to win this race and help Democrats take back the House. But we need your help now.
[_**Can you pitch in today to close the gap before the end of the month and keep us on track to win this majority-making race?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91512221/494074242/-1174386162?refcode=email_082524_budget-update&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2M5NTQ5NC0xNzYzLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JyfE2uOAmQSGmRoiDL50H57DQban8k3Tm-DGcdLxWII=)
Thanks,
Shane
Kristen for Michigan, Campaign Manager

body:
The Republican presidential ticket support Project 2025, a far-reaching and extreme policy platform that would negatively transform America as we know it.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/91512388/494075063/664783965?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOWFjY2U2YS0xODYzLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1fCMEe18pucoHWeE744PORUbNS8CNOsBwr-y2mz2iIM=&emci=3a7bc0d4-9f61-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&emdi=e9acce6a-1863-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&ceid=864787)
Hi Peter,
The Republican presidential ticket supports **Project 2025** , a far-reaching and extreme policy platform that would negatively transform America as we know it, including cutting vital care services and worsen the affordability crisis.
“The conservative policy platform Project 2025 could result in cuts to the long-term care services on which millions of Americans depend.

The plan, published by the conservative think tank the Heritage Foundation, outlines a policy playbook for a future conservative administration. The roughly 900‐page document includes changes that would likely result in cuts to Medicaid... **This includes home-based and nursing home care for roughly six million Americans, both older adults and younger adults who have disabilities and chronic illnesses.”**

\- Barrons, July 19, 2024
---
We can’t let this happen, Peter — that’s why we’re organizing to**elect Care Champions up and down the ballot this November.**
[**_Join the fight by becoming a Care in Action member today to fight for workers and families:_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/91512389/494075064/-886428516?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOWFjY2U2YS0xODYzLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1fCMEe18pucoHWeE744PORUbNS8CNOsBwr-y2mz2iIM=&emci=3a7bc0d4-9f61-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&emdi=e9acce6a-1863-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&ceid=864787)
[BECOME A MEMBER](https://click.everyaction.com/k/91512390/494075065/-886428516?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOWFjY2U2YS0xODYzLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1fCMEe18pucoHWeE744PORUbNS8CNOsBwr-y2mz2iIM=&emci=3a7bc0d4-9f61-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&emdi=e9acce6a-1863-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&ceid=864787)
**_There are two vastly contrasting visions this fall:_**
**⇨** Kamala Harris is running for President and will build on the Biden‐Harris administration’s incredible achievements for care workers and caring families.
**⇨** But Project 2025 would **eliminate critical programs and agencies for families and cut funding from care services** — hurting the workers and families most in need.
The stakes couldn’t be higher for these elections, and we’re organizing in key states to get out the vote and elect Care Champions around the country.
By joining as a Care in Action member, you’re helping power the care worker movement and our efforts to elect Care Champions.
[**_Become a member today to protect the care agenda and ensure Project 2025 never comes to pass._**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/91512391/494075066/-886428516?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOWFjY2U2YS0xODYzLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1fCMEe18pucoHWeE744PORUbNS8CNOsBwr-y2mz2iIM=&emci=3a7bc0d4-9f61-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&emdi=e9acce6a-1863-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&ceid=864787)

clean_body: | | | = Peter, I have a big favor to ask: = | | = | = Thousands of folks have chipped in since we launched this campaign. And whether you’ve given $5, $50, or $500, I couldn’t be more grateful to have your support. Your donation helps us show pundits and my opponent that we have grassroots momentum on our side. Trust me, I know how far a few bucks can go: My flattop haircut costs just $12. In all seriousness, we’ve got our work cut for us. Outside groups are spending up a storm to defeat me. My multimillionaire opponent has already cut his campaign $2.4 million from his own wallet. And virtually every election expert ranks this race a toss-up. It would mean a lot to have your support in this race, because every donation goes a long way. name: Colin Allred
subject: Did you catch my DNC speech?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| I got to speak at the Democratic National Convention on Thursday, and I have to tell you: the energy that Democrats have right now – the energy that was in this completely packed building – is unlike anything I’ve ever felt before. [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/76109?t=6&akid=16373%2E878179%2Ep9D8GC) Everywhere I look, I'm seeing people who are hopeful and excited about this election – and it's not just what I felt on Thursday. I've been feeling it in Dallas and San Antonio and all across Texas, too.

That's how I know we're going to win this race. I've been saying since day one of this campaign that we're going to defeat Ted Cruz and protect our Senate majority – now, I need people like you behind me to get us across the finish line.

[If you’re ready to kick Ted Cruz out of the Senate and protect our Democratic Senate majority, will you rush a split donation of $10 or more between me and Voter Protection Project to help my campaign keep building on this momentum so we can win on Nov. 5?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/76109?t=7&akid=16373%2E878179%2Ep9D8GC) | [DONATE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/76109?t=8&akid=16373%2E878179%2Ep9D8GC)
---
I’m honored to be the Democratic nominee for the U.S. Senate from Texas. I’m a fourth-generation Texan, and everything I’ve done in my life – from making it to the NFL, to law school, and finally to Congress – is thanks to opportunities that Texas has given me. In my Texas, we believe that WE is more powerful than ME.

But Ted Cruz doesn’t believe in the Texas that I know and love. He doesn’t believe you should help your neighbors when things get tough. He doesn’t believe that our seniors deserve the Social Security and Medicare they have earned. He doesn’t believe that women should be able to make their own health care decisions.

**All Ted Cruz cares about is himself – and Texas deserves much better than a me-guy who runs to Cancun when we’re in crisis.

Right now, we’re building the largest grassroots team Texas has ever seen to defeat Ted Cruz and flip Texas blue. But he’s got an army of right-wing donors and far-right super PACs behind him, and I can’t win this race without your support.**

[So please, if you're ready to defeat Ted Cruz, bring real leadership to Texas, and defend our narrow Senate majority, will you rush a split donation of $10 or whatever you can afford between me and Voter Protection Project right now?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/76109?t=9&akid=16373%2E878179%2Ep9D8GC)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Colin Allred and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/76110?t=10&akid=16373%2E878179%2Ep9D8GC)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/76111?t=11&akid=16373%2E878179%2Ep9D8GC)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/76112?t=12&akid=16373%2E878179%2Ep9D8GC)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/76113?t=13&akid=16373%2E878179%2Ep9D8GC)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/76109?t=14&akid=16373%2E878179%2Ep9D8GC)
Let's win this.

– Colin

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=16373%2E878179%2Ep9D8GC). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=16373%2E878179%2Ep9D8GC).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=16373%2E878179%2Ep9D8GC) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=15&akid=16373%2E878179%2Ep9D8GC). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=16373%2E878179%2Ep9D8GC)

These two races could decide the Senate

_**[" To guarantee control, Republicans are looking for victories in Montana and Ohio."](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/qSmzY5icHF_dNp2gZzceCQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRorhbwP0T6aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9ucnNjLzItcmFjZXMtY291bGQtZGVjaWRlLXRoZS1zZW5hdGUtcGEtZS8_dXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPW8ybV9ucnNjX3BhJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDgyM19uYV8ycmFjZXNjb3VsZGRlY2lkZXRoZXNlbmF0ZS12MV9QQV90Y290dG9uX25yc2MmdXRtX3RjPUFGUjItMjAyNDA4MjUmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9ZnVuZHJhaXNpbmcmc2M9TzJNUFJPU1AmYW10cG9zaXRpb249NFcDc3BjQgpmu-SJy2bEwSNdUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)**_

That's exactly right. Those two Senate races could decide the entire ballgame.

**[In Montana, Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/qSmzY5icHF_dNp2gZzceCQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRorhbwP0T6aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9ucnNjLzItcmFjZXMtY291bGQtZGVjaWRlLXRoZS1zZW5hdGUtcGEtZS8_dXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPW8ybV9ucnNjX3BhJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDgyM19uYV8ycmFjZXNjb3VsZGRlY2lkZXRoZXNlbmF0ZS12MV9QQV90Y290dG9uX25yc2MmdXRtX3RjPUFGUjItMjAyNDA4MjUmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9ZnVuZHJhaXNpbmcmc2M9TzJNUFJPU1AmYW10cG9zaXRpb249NFcDc3BjQgpmu-SJy2bEwSNdUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)** is running against liberal Jon Tester.

**[In Ohio, business leader Bernie Moreno](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/qSmzY5icHF_dNp2gZzceCQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRorhbwP0T6aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9ucnNjLzItcmFjZXMtY291bGQtZGVjaWRlLXRoZS1zZW5hdGUtcGEtZS8_dXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPW8ybV9ucnNjX3BhJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDgyM19uYV8ycmFjZXNjb3VsZGRlY2lkZXRoZXNlbmF0ZS12MV9QQV90Y290dG9uX25yc2MmdXRtX3RjPUFGUjItMjAyNDA4MjUmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9ZnVuZHJhaXNpbmcmc2M9TzJNUFJPU1AmYW10cG9zaXRpb249NFcDc3BjQgpmu-SJy2bEwSNdUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) **is running against another liberal, Sherrod Brown.

body:
| Hey Team,

Our primary is right around the corner, and the stakes couldn’t be higher. We have a chance to elect a governor who will fight for our values and protect our rights — or we could see Kelly Ayotte's extreme agenda take hold in New Hampshire.

While Ayotte is backed by radical out-of-state donors who want nothing more than to advance a MAGA agenda, our campaign is powered by people like you. And with the election day in sight, we need your support more than ever.

[We’re working to raise $25,000 by the end of the month. Will you chip in $10 now to help us close the gap?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91512847/494076572/1937307897?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_CW_20240825_FR_EOM2_0_3MO_philipstein_NA_NA_eom2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTU2MjdjOC0xYTYzLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sQWVRzmNONCWCdh17dx5zAwHWtvHlGKHwvnePY6ioH8=)

Kamala Harris just held one of the biggest political rallies in Arizona’s history, a whopping 15,000 Arizonans showed up to support the Harris-Walz ticket. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91513073/494077492/1961347261?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240825_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmJkOWZiNzctMWM2My1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=PwXShklCamyfl-jfdBVO-XtJzVcAmia-k_Lu4vu7w8g=) Arizona's role in this election is monumental — we have the power to decide who wins the presidency and controls Congress, and we are home to some of the nation’s tightest legislative races. Right now, Kamala Harris is ahead in the polls by a sizeable margin across demographics, including among independents in Arizona. It’s a pattern we are seeing nationwide, powering the wave of momentum we’re riding through Election Day. Places like Arizona and Nevada make up a crucial “Western Wall” for Democrats — a wall that could ensure Harris secures the White House, that we secure the House, and expand our majority in the Senate. Arizona Democrats are in a position to protect Arizona’s ideals by backing Democratic candidates at every level. Let’s mobilize like never before during this pivotal moment. | | I'm back in Oregon from the Democratic National Convention in Chicago, and I had to tell you about my experience. Simply put, it was hard to not feel a sense of wonder. A palpable excitement. A feeling missing from our politics for too long: **joy.** A feeling you would find at Autzen stadium in Eugene on a Saturday. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91513107/494077748/-118994385?refcode=2024-08-25-dnc&recurring=&amount=5&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=0e16a49c-1c63-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTE2YTQ5Yy0xYzYzLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K0MrcHGOAXk_mMTF3Id5lhUQ91xt-WbIBRDDvxNq4-I=) Joy is watching Kamala Harris make history and unapologetically endorse a platform of freedom and opportunity. Joy is watching a humble, service-driven man like Tim Walz introduce himself to America and showcase what compassionate, neighborly leadership looks like. Joy is knowing that — even as the stakes could not be higher — our cause is just and the arc of history bends toward progress. **And we have an opportunity in 72 days to achieve unbelievable progress.** [**Will you split $5 to help elect Kamala Harris and fuel my efforts to elect a Democratic Congress? We have incredible momentum right now – and it's important that we have the resources to sustain that momentum and get to the finish line.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91513108/494077749/-118994385?refcode=2024-08-25-dnc&recurring=&amount=5&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=0e16a49c-1c63-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTE2YTQ5Yy0xYzYzLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K0MrcHGOAXk_mMTF3Id5lhUQ91xt-WbIBRDDvxNq4-I=) [Donate Today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91513109/494077750/-118994385?refcode=2024-08-25-dnc&recurring=&amount=5&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=0e16a49c-1c63-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTE2YTQ5Yy0xYzYzLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K0MrcHGOAXk_mMTF3Id5lhUQ91xt-WbIBRDDvxNq4-I=) Reproductive freedom. Paid family leave. Climate security. Social Security and Medicare funded for generations to come. Bold new investments in working class families. **All of this – and so much more – is possible if we win on November 5.** We can't take anything for granted. Donadl Trump, JD Vance and their MAGA allies aren't going down without a fight. But as our next President Kamala Harris would say, when _we_ fight...we win. [**Let's make it happen. Split $5 today to help deliver a government for the people >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91513110/494077777/-118994385?refcode=2024-08-25-dnc&recurring=&amount=5&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=0e16a49c-1c63-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTE2YTQ5Yy0xYzYzLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K0MrcHGOAXk_mMTF3Id5lhUQ91xt-WbIBRDDvxNq4-I=) Onward, _Ron_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly and split it between Kamala Harris and Ron Wyden:

clean_body: | | | | I'm back in Oregon from the Democratic National Convention in Chicago, and I had to tell you about my experience. Simply put, it was hard to not feel a sense of wonder. A palpable excitement. A feeling missing from our politics for too long: joy. A feeling you would find at Autzen stadium in Eugene on a Saturday. = Joy is watching Kamala Harris make history and unapologetically endorse a platform of freedom and opportunity. Joy is watching a humble, service-driven man like Tim Walz introduce himself to America and showcase what compassionate, neighborly leadership looks like. Joy is knowing that — even as the stakes could not be higher — our cause is just and the arc of history bends toward progress. And we have an opportunity in 72 days to achieve unbelievable progress. = = Reproductive freedom. Paid family leave. Climate security. Social Security and Medicare funded for generations to come. Bold new investments in working class families. All of this – and so much more – is possible if we win on November 5. We can't take anything for granted. Donadl Trump, JD Vance and their MAGA allies aren't going down without a fight. But as our next President Kamala Harris would say, when we fight...we win. = Onward, Ron | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly and split it between Kamala Harris and Ron Wyden: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate. | This email was sent by Wyden for Senate P.O. name: Maggie Goodlander
subject: Reproductive rights are at the heart of our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Maggie Goodlander is running for Congress in New Hampshire. Maggie worked alongside Jason Crow during Donald Trump's first impeachment. We hope you’ll read her message below, and then split a donation between her and Jason’s campaigns.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-split-goodlander?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-split-goodlander?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com]

FriendsI’m Maggie Goodlander, and I’m running to represent New Hampshire's Second Congressional District!

Make no mistake, the fundamental rights of American women are on the ballot in November.

Like so many of you, I remember exactly where I was the day Roe v. Wade was overturned. I vowed right there to keep doing what I’ve done my entire life: fight like hell for reproductive freedom with everything I’ve got.

This issue has touched me and my family deeply and personally. And I know it has touched so many of you, too. Reproductive rights are at the heart of our campaign. I will fight like hell in Congress to ensure that every woman in America has the right to make reproductive healthcare decisions free from the interference of extreme politicians and extreme judges.

On day one, I’ll fight to codify Roe v. Wade and ensure access to abortion, contraception, and IVF for everyone in America.

National Republicans have already listed NH-02 on their list of targets for 2024. We can’t afford to lose this seat and let extreme Republicans pass a federal abortion ban.

Will you join me in my fight to defend reproductive rights and codify Roe as the law of the land by chipping in just $10 split between my campaign and Rep. Jason Crow to help us keep NH-02 and CO-06 out of the hands of anti-abortion extremists? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-split-goodlander?amount=10]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between Maggie Goodlander and Jason Crow and processed immediately:

DONATE $10 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-split-goodlander?amount=10&express_lane=true]
DONATE $25 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-split-goodlander?amount=25&express_lane=true]

DONATE $50 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-split-goodlander?amount=50&express_lane=true]
DONATE $100 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-split-goodlander?amount=100&express_lane=true]

DONATE $250 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-split-goodlander?amount=250&express_lane=true]
ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-split-goodlander]

In service,

Maggie Goodlander
Jason Crow for Congress
8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543
Greenwood Village, CO 80112
United States
www.jasoncrowforcongress.com [https://www.jasoncrowforcongress.com/] | info@jasoncrowforcongress.com [info@jasoncrowforcongress.com]

name: LinebergerforUSCongress
subject: Update from Lineberger for US Congress – August 25th, 2024
body:
Hi Friends of Lineberger for US Congress!

*Get Engaged*. *Stay engaged*. We are down to within the last 72 days
until the election is complete.
October 7th is the last day to register and be able to vote in this
election.
October 21 marks the start of early voting. November 5th is election day!
*What we do now will make all of the difference in the quality of our lives
post-election*.

Big picture items:

We have been distributing our supply of 500 yard signs and have about 350
left. We are eager to get them to where they will do the most good –
people’s homes, hopefully visible. We also need a plan to put some out at
the polling places. There will be about 50 early voting sites, and 120
polling locations for election day. That is too many for any one person to
manage. So, *I’m looking for volunteers to set a couple signs each when
the time comes*. And a sign volunteer coordinator would be awesome.

Just to say how important our volunteers truly are, we have done a lot on a
very low budget with your help! Through a shared vision of a Better
Future, we have all contributed and invested our time to make this campaign
fully viable in a way that most political watchers cannot understand. We
are still under the radar of most analysts for this reason. However, with
your help, we are on the radar of many voters and many more to come. Thank
You All!

A couple bigger / different events are coming up. These are special events
to support and interact with our community.

*Football Fun with Ernest Lineberger for US Congress on Saturday, September
21st at UNT DATCU stadium*.
There is a special promotion where half of the football admission
price goes to LISD LEF
(Lewisville Independent School District Educational
Foundation).
We will host a tailgate before the game where we can have our signs
and share our message.
We have rented a 10X20 tent with tables and chairs that will be
set up and waiting for us.
We need to decide on what food and fun we want to have at the
tailgate. (support appreciated)
During the game we can sit together in the end zone seating.
We bought 50 T-shirts to help us stand out.
If you have a light blue shirt, wear it to blend with us if we
run out.
Here is the link for tickets: https://fevo-enterprise.com/event/LEF
Game time is still TBA. I guessed 3 PM for tail gate start, but will
update when solidified.
Mobilize link is:
https://www.mobilize.us/dentondemocrats/event/673008/
But don’t forget to buy the tickets with the other
link too.

*CCA (Christian Community Action)* does a lot of good work in the community
with food pantry, job training, counseling and more. They are having
a *fundraising
5K on Saturday, September 28th, in Old Town Lewisville*. We are planning
to support by showing up as a team to run (or to support) in our
‘Lineberger’ T-shirts (or other light blue shirt).
Our special Team 5k Sign up link is:
*https://runsignup.com/Race/TX/Lewisville/hearts?raceRefCode=FcG0YSnd*
<https://runsignup.com/Race/TX/Lewisville/hearts?raceRefCode=FcG0YSnd>
This includes a price break and admission to City
of Lewisville Western Days
The mobilize link is:
https://www.mobilize.us/dentondemocrats/event/675364/
(just for RSVP, use the first link to sign up/pay
for the event)

*Digital Media Campaign* is about to kick off. This is the heavy hitter
that is going to get us more exposure than any of our earlier activities.
These are the short ads that show on digital devices to get a free
service. We should be able to get over one million impressions. That will
help get our name recognition up.

Print ads. So far, I have agreed to one quarter page ad in the Cross
Timbers Gazette September issue.
This is actually more to begin a relationship with the paper,
but may help our name recognition as well.
Let me know if you see it!

If any of you want to play a role in any of these activities or efforts, I
can always use the help.

That said, I want to give a huge shout out to all of you who are already
working it! Thank you!
*Block Walkers* – We continue to have our Saturday morning
block walks with 10 or more working it with us.
Plus, several volunteers have asked for turf maps
to knock doors on their own schedule!
*Phone Bankers* – Our trained a crew is working it on their own
schedule. Let us know if you want to join.
This is a great way to connect voters with our
message from the comfort of your home.
*Postcards* – We bought 10,000 and have handed out 6,950 to be
addressed and mailed so far.
Thank you so much for all you are doing to help in these
efforts!

With that in mind, here is what’s coming up soon.

*Monday, August 26th*, I’ll receive and begin answering League of Women
Voters Candidate Questionnaire
for submission no later than August 30th
Also, a Dallas Morning News Questionnaire is coming this week

*Saturday, August 31st*, Block Walking, 9 AM to Noon, Revisit Castle Hills,
Precinct 2096
Meeting at Castle Hills Community Center, 2501 Queen Margaret
Dr, Lewisville TX
Link to RSVP and details:
https://www.mobilize.us/dentondemocrats/event/671618/

*Sunday, September 1st*, We’ll visit another church in the district to get
to know more of our community.
And let them get to know us through some conversations.

*Friday, September 6th*, United Way Denton County, Breakfast in Denton, TX

*Saturday, September 7th*, Block Walking, 9 AM to Noon, Highland Village,
Precinct 315x?
Meeting at TBD, Highland Village TX
Link to RSVP and details: TBD

*Sunday, Wednesday, Sept 8 – 11*, Ernest and Darlene trip to DC
This trip was planned before the campaign as just a fun event.
We will have a Capitol tour and try to schedule some time with
elected officials and others.

*Tuesday, Sept 10th*, Harris – Trump Presidential Debate,
DCDP has planned a watch party in Carrollton at NICO’s Cocina
3065 N Josey Ln
I can’t be there, but come by and support Denton County
Democratic Party and Kamala Harris.

*Thursday, Sept 12th*, United Way Denton County, Breakfast in Lewisville, TX

To donate, just go to the regular donation link on the campaign website,
https://www.linebergerforuscongress.com/.

Everything you do to support us in our efforts to get our message out,
support our campaign financially, and your own personal efforts to share
our message are making a difference. Thank you!

Giving Voters a Better Choice and Hope for a Better Future!

Ernest Lineberger

Your Democratic Nominee for US House for TX CD26.

And it’s not exactly a mystery why.
Project 2025 calls for banning abortion, taking away access to contraception, legalizing discrimination against LGBTQ+ people, and cutting Medicare and Medicaid — all while giving even more tax breaks to the wealthiest corporations.
These are all things the vast majority of Americans do not want.

clean_body: We will LOSE this race if we don’t close this critical fundraising gap | In July, Team Sheehy raised $1,044,840 vs. Jon Tester's $4,477,219 We will lose this critical race if we keep getting outraised 4 to 1 online, Peter. Jon Tester CRUSHED us in online fundraising in July. He hauled in just shy of $4.5 million online. 34% of the money came from the left coasts! 21% from California 8% from New York and, 5% from Washington state. Over 1/3 of Jon Tester’s total fundraising is coming from out-of-state liberals who want to control Montana from afar. The left coasts fund Tester fully, and I need your help to avoid being outraised by a margin of 4 AGAIN in August. Please make an urgent donation to keep me in this race – we are falling behind at a critical moment that could QUICKLY doom my campaign. Jon Tester can keep the support of the DC establishment and the left-coast radicals that are funding his corrupt campaign. I’m fighting for YOUR support and the support of millions of patriots like you, who I need to step up and help fund my campaign for the last 75 days. Unlike my opponent who is the #1 recipient of lobbyist cash, I will NEVER sell out to political special interests in Washington. I’m a former Navy SEAL, proud father and husband, aerial firefighter, and successful business owner. I’m a limited government conservative who knows America must lead with peace through strength, or global chaos ensues. Thank you for standing with me at this critical moment. The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. **Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress and to flip the House blue this November.**

While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Folks, it’s the team over at Ruiz HQ. In case you missed it, today’s the big day — it’s Congressman Ruiz’s birthday!! 🎂🎉 We’re trying to surprise him by meeting our August fundraising goal early, but here’s the deal: we still haven’t reached our goal and we’re now less than 24 hours from sitting down to go over our fundraising numbers tomorrow morning! = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = | = \---Forwarded Message from Team Ruiz--- Friend, Shhh! Can you keep a secret? Tomorrow is a special day — it’s Congressman Ruiz’s birthday! 🎉🥳 All of us here at Ruiz HQ want to make this his best birthday yet by surprising him in our Monday morning meeting by hitting our August fundraising goal early. It’s going to take all of us, but we know we can get it done. = | = Dr. Ruiz is always hard at work representing the families, small businesses, and communities that make CA-25 so special, and we want to extend our heartfelt appreciation for all he’s done for our district, state, and country with a special birthday surprise when he wakes up tomorrow morning. Up against a MAGA extremist looking to flip California’s 25th red, there’s no better gift than your support in this upcoming election. = | = Let’s make this birthday one to remember! (And don’t tell the Congressman! 🤫) — Team Ruiz | | | ---|---|--- = The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress and to flip the House blue this November.** | = = PAID FOR BY DR. subject: The epicenter of the fight for reproductive rights.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY YASSAMIN ANSARI FOR CONGRESS
body:
It all hinges on Arizona, Peter. It's critical we win here in November!

| |
---
Peter, We're fighting for more than just victory in our race this November. **We have the chance to pass a constitutional amendment in Arizona to protect reproductive rights for generations to come — and we're going to fight like hell to make sure we do.** Our state is at the epicenter of the battle for reproductive rights, Peter. Here in AZ, we've seen an all-out Republican assault on abortion, which even temporarily led to Arizonans living under an abortion ban from 1864. Plus, the races for the White House and for both houses of Congress all hinge on our state. **We need nationwide reproductive rights protections, and that can only happen if we elect Democrats up and down the ballot this November.** That's why there's not a moment to lose, Peter. We're hitting the ground running with our general election campaign, in support of reproductive rights and real progressive victories for our community. **[Will you join clean_body: It all hinges on Arizona, Peter. It's critical we win here in November! | | Peter, We're fighting for more than just victory in our race this November. We have the chance to pass a constitutional amendment in Arizona to protect reproductive rights for generations to come — and we're going to fight like hell to make sure we do. Our state is at the epicenter of the battle for reproductive rights, Peter. Here in AZ, we've seen an all-out Republican assault on abortion, which even temporarily led to Arizonans living under an abortion ban from 1864. Plus, the races for the White House and for both houses of Congress all hinge on our state. We need nationwide reproductive rights protections, and that can only happen if we elect Democrats up and down the ballot this November. That's why there's not a moment to lose, Peter. We're hitting the ground running with our general election campaign, in support of reproductive rights and real progressive victories for our community. = = Thank you, Peter. — Yassamin Ansari Democratic Nominee, AZ-03 PAID FOR BY YASSAMIN ANSARI FOR CONGRESS | | | | ---|---|---|--- Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . Yassamin Ansari for Congress PO Box 13524 Phoenix, AZ 85002 United States

name: Tammy Baldwin (via Mazie Hirono)
subject: My DNC speech
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
_Aloha Peter, last week, I had the opportunity to hear my friend Tammy Baldwin — who is running for re-election is Wisconsin's crucial Senate seat — speak at the Democratic National Convention. If you didn't have a moment to hear her speech, please take a moment to read this message, and **[chip in](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91514356/494082073/-17087835?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240825_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODFlZjdlNC0yMjYzLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OP3_AN6tehJUNLYvKJw_xnDEAa52GDijKGHPEXcubvY=)** , if you can. — Mazie_
* * *
Peter — I just stepped off the stage at the Democratic National Convention in Chicago. [**I want to take a moment to share my thoughts with you, but first, can I count on you to split a donation between my campaign and Mazie to help us protect Wisconsin’s Senate seat, secure our Democratic majority, and send Kamala Harris to the White House?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91514357/494082074/-17087835?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240825_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODFlZjdlNC0yMjYzLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OP3_AN6tehJUNLYvKJw_xnDEAa52GDijKGHPEXcubvY=) During my speech last week, I had the honor of sharing a little bit about my family. My mother was a teenager when I was born and she struggled with addiction. I never met my father. But I had two incredible grandparents who stepped in and raised me. Everything I know, I learned from them. In every way a child needs, my grandparents were there for me. As they grew older, it was my privilege to be there for them. So, when I work to protect Medicare and Social Security, I do it with the personal knowledge of what those big programs meant in small but deeply meaningful ways to my grandparents. I know what they mean for your parents and grandparents. _But let’s be clear: That is all at risk today._ Right-wing extremists like Donald Trump and my opponent, Eric Hovde, want to bring us back. If they had it their way, they’d cut Social Security and Medicare. Overturn the Affordable Care Act. Further restrict our reproductive rights. Give tax breaks to billionaires and big corporations while our working families foot the bill. We can’t let that happen, and as long as we stand together, I know we won’t. This November, we have the opportunity to move our country forward — to protect and expand affordable health care, restore reproductive rights, cut costs for working families, and protect Social Security and Medicare for our parents and grandparents. But it will take ALL of us. [**I’m fighting my heart out to win this race and deliver a Democratic Senate majority for Kamala Harris and Tim Walz so we can keep moving forward — not backwards. If you’re with me, please consider splitting a donation between my campaign and Mazie today to help us keep Wisconsin blue. Every donation matters.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91514358/494082075/-17087835?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240825_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODFlZjdlNC0yMjYzLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OP3_AN6tehJUNLYvKJw_xnDEAa52GDijKGHPEXcubvY=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Mazie Hirono and Tammy Baldwin will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91514359/494082076/-17087835?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240825_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODFlZjdlNC0yMjYzLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OP3_AN6tehJUNLYvKJw_xnDEAa52GDijKGHPEXcubvY=)

name: DNC Alert
subject: Michelle Obama asked you to “do something”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=3976%2E552475%2EWyqMyL)
Peter, did you hear what Michelle Obama said at the DNC the other night?
**“Do something.” – Michelle Obama**
**[Do something and chip in »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240825-3?refcode=em20240825-3&refcode2=3976_552475_WyqMyL&akid=3976%2E552475%2EWyqMyL)**
Her message reminded each and every one of us that we have the power to determine the outcome of this election, and we cannot be complacent. There is too much on the line to sit this election out: voting rights, workers’ rights, and women’s rights are all under attack.
As Michelle Obama said, we have to do something to support candidates like Bob Casey in Pennsylvania, who’s running to continue fighting for our fundamental freedoms. His opponent is a Wall Street multi-millionaire with the backing of Republican super PACs, who are spending $75 million in an attempt to buy this seat and flip the Senate.
Pennsylvania is the battleground that will decide our Senate majority, the House, and the presidency. That means that between now and Election Day we need to do everything we can to make sure we keep our Commonwealth blue.
[**That’s why we're asking you to “do something” by donating to Bob Casey’s re-election campaign. You have the power to make sure we re-elect Bob in November and send Kamala Harris and Tim Walz to the White House, so chip in today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240825-3?refcode=em20240825-3&refcode2=3976_552475_WyqMyL&akid=3976%2E552475%2EWyqMyL)
Thanks so much for your support!
-- Bob Casey HQ

Philadelphia, PA 19102

name: Tamie Wilson
subject: NEW: Media reports on Ohio State Survivors speaking out against Jim Jordan
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/100067/images/LOGO.jpg]
Friends,
Jim Jordan’s past is catching up with him, and Americans are finally waking up to the truth.
Check out the latest report from The New Republic :
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-for-us-c2g?refcode=20240825_new_republic_article_image [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-for-us-c2g?refcode=20240825_new_republic_article_image]
Last week, at the Democratic National Convention, some of Jordan’s former athletes stepped forward to expose his appalling actions – or rather, inactions – during the Ohio State sexual abuse scandal that happened on his watch as an assistant wrestling coach.
These are not just allegations; they’re first-hand testimonies from the very people who trusted Jordan to protect them.
We were proud to stand in solidarity with these brave men, raising their voices and ensuring their stories were heard.
Join us in this fight to hold Jim Jordan accountable and bring real change to Ohio. Your contribution today will fuel our efforts to make history and finally unseat one of the most dangerous and ineffective members of Congress. Let’s do this together—contribute now and be part of the movement that ends Jordan’s reign for good. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-for-us-c2g?refcode=20240825_new_republic_article_link1]
Jordan could have been a hero, but instead, he chose to cover up the abuse, leaving hundreds of young men to suffer.
And now, he has the nerve to ask Ohioans to trust him with even more power?
Get lost, Jim.
As if his record as a "legislative terrorist," as former Speaker John Boehner so aptly put it, isn’t bad enough...
He’s also done nothing to pass legislation that benefits Ohioans in his 17 years in Congress.
This man has failed to pass a single bill and has consistently ranked last in the House in terms of bipartisan cooperation or legislative effectiveness.
This is where you and I come in.
My bipartisan bill, T he Comprehensive Sexual Abuse Prevention and Accountability Act, will make sure that abusers and enablers like Jordan face justice and that our children are protected from monsters like Richard Strauss.
Our campaign is the most well-financed and strategically structured challenge Jim Jordan has ever faced.
We’re not just here to expose Jim Jordan but to defeat him.
Ohio deserves better than a man who would rather protect predators than pass laws that help his constituents.
If you’re as fired up as I am, it’s time to act.
We have the momentum, we have the support, and with your help, we can send Jim Jordan packing once and for all. Contribute today to be part of the movement that finally holds Jordan accountable and ensures he never has the chance to fail Ohio again. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-for-us-c2g?refcode=20240825_new_republic_article_link2]
Working for US,
Tamie Wilson
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/100067/images/Screenshot%202023-08-30%20at%2012.16.45%20PM.jpeg]
Donate to Tamie Today [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-for-us-c2g?refcode=20240825_new_republic_article_button]
Tamie Wilson is the Democratic nominee ready to unseat ULTRA MAGA extremist Jim Jordan in OH-04. A single mom and survivor who knows what it’s like to endure and overcome challenges, Tamie's fighting for jobs, healthcare, and positive change for everyday Americans. Your donations will help Tamie turn out every voter we need to flip this seat and send Jordan packing.
DONATE >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-for-us-c2g?refcode=20240825_new_republic_article_footer]
©2024 Tamie Wilson for US, all rights reserved
To contribute via check, please address to:
Tamie Wilson For US
273 Saratoga St
Delaware, OH 43015
United States
www.tamiewilson.com [https://www.tamiewilson.com/]

name: Stein HQ [DOTL]
subject: 🚨BREAKING: Trump’s special guest
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC
body:
Donate $15 now to help us defeat far-right extremism.

|
---
He’s back, Peter.

Donald Trump came to North Carolina AGAIN because he knows that winning our state is the key to getting him back into the White House. **And this time, he invited a special guest!**

Far-right extremist Mark Robinson joined Donald Trump on stage. **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/91514711/494083296/-723991489?amount=10&refcode=DOTL_20240825_EMSPL_E3_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBhOTI4ZmZkLTI0NjMtZWYxMS05OTFhLTYwNDViZGRiZmM0YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qIKYPiLn_m_zT6WgK51E7LBOaNL3LEM0rCyzaSHtA6w=)**[Rush $10 to Josh Stein and Democracy On The Line to help our team let far-right extremists know they have NO place in North Carolina →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/91514712/494083297/-723991489?amount=10&refcode=DOTL_20240825_EMSPL_E3_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBhOTI4ZmZkLTI0NjMtZWYxMS05OTFhLTYwNDViZGRiZmM0YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qIKYPiLn_m_zT6WgK51E7LBOaNL3LEM0rCyzaSHtA6w=) | **[RUSH $10 NOW »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/91514713/494083298/-723991489?amount=7&refcode=DOTL_20240825_EMSPL_E3_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBhOTI4ZmZkLTI0NjMtZWYxMS05OTFhLTYwNDViZGRiZmM0YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qIKYPiLn_m_zT6WgK51E7LBOaNL3LEM0rCyzaSHtA6w=)**
---
Donald Trump’s brand of politics is already too dangerous for North Carolina — and Mark Robinson’s is even worse.

Democrats up and down the ballot in Pennsylvania are at serious risk.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91514708/494083291/-1072566757?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjkyOGZmZC0yNDYzLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t4YaZyEOVpP23cIJ8jNcY464lWmIYBn0DqfcHauismI=&emci=6907ad8e-365f-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&emdi=0b928ffd-2463-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&ceid=21278485)

Hi, Derek. It's Chrissy, and I've got some pretty worrying news:
**Republicans have now registered FAR more voters than Democrats have here in Pennsylvania. ****Even in Chester and Berks counties, we’re seeing Republicans begin to close the gap and erode the progress we’ve made.**
**That puts Democrats up and down the ballot in Pennsylvania at serious risk.** Our reproductive freedoms, LGBTQ rights, climate change action, our economy, and our very democracy – the GOP, led by former President Trump, will undermine everything we've worked so hard to protect in an instant to champion their dangerous MAGA extremism.
I'm committed to doing everything I can to win in November, help my fellow Democrats across the state, protect President Biden's legacy, and elect Kamala Harris. But right now, I'm coming up on a huge fundraising deadline – **and if I don't raise $5,000 by midnight tonight, I won’t hit our goal to have the resources the campaign needs to keep registering more Democratic voters in PA and to defeat the far right in November.**
That's why I’d love your help today to succeed in one of the most important elections of our lifetimes. [Please, will you give $5 now so that I can hit my $5,000 goal by midnight? Every dollar will help us reach voters in PA to keep this seat blue, take back the House, and get me back to work on the issues that matter to your family.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91514709/494083292/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1032-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjkyOGZmZC0yNDYzLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t4YaZyEOVpP23cIJ8jNcY464lWmIYBn0DqfcHauismI=)
There's work to be done!
Chrissy
| Chrissy Houlahan for Congress

Devon, PA 19333

name: Arizona Voter Action Project
subject: They are trying to end our mail-in voting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=082524_2&amount=25]
AZ Mirror: More than 75% of voters use early ballots. Every AZ House Republican voted to take that away. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=082524_2&amount=25]
This headline says it all, Team.
Arizona made "no-excuse" early and mail-in voting legal back in 1991. For decades, Arizona's mail-in voting laws were the model of ballot accessibility, making it easy for voters to participate in their elections. An overwhelming majority of Arizona voters voted early, either in person at a polling place or via mail-in ballot.
But opponents of voting rights in the Arizona House of Representatives voted to change all that. They voted along straight party lines to pass a bill that would end early voting in the state -- both in person and by mail with just a handful of exceptions for the elderly or those in military service. This sends the bill onto the Arizona Senate, possibly setting up a showdown with Gov. Katie Hobbs over a potential veto.
This is bad news for Arizona voters and bad news for everyone that cares about our democracy. Help us stop suppressive bills like this in Arizona and across the country with $25 or whatever you can today >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=082524_2&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=082524_2&amount=15]
GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=082524_2&amount=25]
GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=082524_2&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=082524_2&amount=100]
GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=082524_2&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=082524_2&amount=35]
Straight from the news report:
" The bill, like many others proposed by Republicans in the state legislature this year, is aimed at addressing conspiracy theories that the 2020 Arizona election was somehow stolen from then-President Donald Trump and that victories in the 2022 election were similarly swiped from several Republicans running for statewide offices. "
Vote-by-mail remains incredibly popular in Arizona , with almost 90% of ballots in 2020 cast by mail and around 75% of Arizona voters signed up to receive early ballots in 2022. But that would all drastically change.
Fuel our efforts to fight the partisan lies that drive these bills and the bad laws that come from them with $25 and help make sure every voice is heard in our elections >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=082524_2&amount=25]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=082524_2&amount=25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=082524_2&amount=25]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://twitter.com/voteractionproj [https://twitter.com/voteractionproj] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=082524_2&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=082524_2&amount=25]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.

Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=bg39LCWafxmD1V2knBxYeV2IH%2F%2FzS4ruVon7mH9TDzan8jISzwkt6SIoIjr%2BRnRFd0ni2xaNGO04dCp8lnVA524h33px5rutP3HdC%2FBVyzyskeOVm9855oKupfhqYtRV9JzAp1WNBbQ%2Bg2d53RYDYxtx7suAGFcewhhiC1vYmMZSjM%2F9kDeu13cd7cE90%2FzFPb6%2FMDGXEH%2B7EY2b%2Bqi3WQFB8OSoWDvt16i2s8PSVWhwYG7gyY%2FYQbKXXsvO9pxCGozjvBLst54DJoBdS39xrknmAwfNC1eiyIkK1MHqS785CRN2UYpvIw16zhzmEUBMGnv8JBzDEpP9H8t1%2FaQMNUYViYKkJZUQCM%2B4LIgycs63G5C2m%2B2yACzRnGu4gEVGUMYk3%2B3w6kVWrUmYlmAIrTgxB%2FtXtiZRGruqSOjgEIU%3D .

body:
Republicans have had their power latched in Arizona for far too long, so our team is working around the clock to gain back power in the House and Senate this November. | | |

| |

State Democrats are only: ✅**Two seats** from flipping the AZ House and
✅**Two seats** from flipping the AZ Senate [Legislative majorities in Arizona and beyond are within arm’s reach if we work together. Folks, it’s Jordan – Colin’s campaign manager. I have some good news and bad news. **First, let me kick things off with the good news:** Folks across NH-02 are loving our yard signs. They’re flying off of our HQ shelves because Colin’s supporters know – just as we do – that this race will come down to the wire. **But here’s the bad news:** Our last order went quicker than we imagined. Now, we have to place a rush order for a new batch of yard signs – and that order needs to be made TONIGHT. Tony is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood, 314 Action, CHC Bold PAC, New Dems Action Fund, Dems Serve, IBEW, Nebraska AFL-CIO, Communication Workers of America, Voter Protection Project, JStreet, and over 40 local elected officials. Email is the best way for Tony to keep his supporters up-to-date with happenings from the campaign trail. We know we send a lot of fundraising emails -- but that’s because his campaign is fueled by grassroots donations from folks like you. = If you only want to receive our most important emails, click . We don’t want to lose you completely -- but if you want to unsubscribe, you can do so here: ** We can't tell you how much we appreciate your grassroots support! Tony Vargas for Congress PO Box 746 Boys Town, NE 68010 United States info@vargasfornebraska.com | | Paid for by Tony Vargas for Congress

clean_body: | Team, this is Jacky Rosen. Republicans are all but celebrating victory in Nevada, and we're getting nervous. Polls have been showing me neck and neck with my far-right opponent for months, and the GOP is now dominating the airwaves and coming close to completely drowning me out. = | = Since Nevada will likely determine control of the Senate this year, losing any ground gives the GOP a clear path to flipping the Senate red – and puts MAGA extremists like my opponent one step closer to pushing through their horrifying far-right agenda known as Project 2025. If we want to prevent a national abortion ban, cuts to Social Security and Medicare, and tax breaks that only benefit the wealthiest Americans – we must fight with everything we have to take the lead and win in Nevada. That’s why my team set an emergency goal to raise $50,000 before midnight to keep getting our message out there – but we’re still way short of our goal. That's why I'm reaching out myself to ask for your help: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Jacky Rosen and Tina Smith will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Jacky Rosen Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States | | Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

name: Mark Kelly
subject: What Trump said about Ruben Gallego on Friday was beyond the pale
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Ruben’s unit did some of the hardest fighting of the entire Iraq War. They suffered some of the heaviest casualties.
#

Mark Kelly here. Trump attacked my friend Ruben Gallego at a rally in Arizona on Friday, Peter.
[**And before I get too far, I’m going to ask you to make a donation to Ruben’s campaign as they get ready to fight back. I know what it’s like to have Trump call you out on stage, and I’ve got Ruben’s back for the attacks ahead. Please, chip in.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-august24.kZit_I&refcode=em240825-3-160&t=1&akid=2955%2E734936%2EQG0aDW)

---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1046?c0=ruben-em-august24.RYns1m&refcode=em240825-3-160&t=21&akid=2955%2E734936%2EQG0aDW)**

****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1039?c0=ruben-em-august24.e1bmOm&refcode=em240825-3-160&t=22&akid=2955%2E734936%2EQG0aDW)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1040?c0=ruben-em-august24.qS7VdT&refcode=em240825-3-160&t=23&akid=2955%2E734936%2EQG0aDW)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1041?c0=ruben-em-august24.g-AiLQ&refcode=em240825-3-160&t=24&akid=2955%2E734936%2EQG0aDW)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-august24.naKVkC&refcode=em240825-3-160&t=25&akid=2955%2E734936%2EQG0aDW)**
---
****
Peter, it wasn’t just that Trump attacked Ruben last night. It’s how he did it.
He butchered the pronunciation of his last name. He called him a “maniac” and said he “shouldn’t even be allowed to run” against Kari Lake. But one thing stuck out more than any other to me...
If you’ve been following the news for a while, you know that **Trump called fallen Marines buried at the Meuse-Argonne American Cemetery in France “suckers” and “losers.”** These men were the bravest of the brave. Heroes from World War I. To Trump, they’re “suckers” and “losers.”
At his rally on Friday, **Trump called Marine combat veteran Ruben Gallego a “loser.”** Ruben’s unit did some of the hardest fighting of the entire Iraq War. They suffered some of the heaviest casualties. Ruben lost some of his best friends over there. He served our country and that deserves respect, no matter what party you belong to.
Trump will never understand the meaning of service or self–sacrifice. He’ll never give our veterans the respect they deserve.
Ruben’s getting pummeled right now by the MAGA Right after Trump’s attacks. As I said, I know what that’s like. So, to help fight back, I’m humbly asking you to chip in to his campaign.
[**If you can afford it, make a $5 donation to Ruben’s campaign. It will go a long way towards fighting back against Trump right now, and these donations add up fast if a ton of people chip in.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-august24.kZit_I&refcode=em240825-3-160&t=26&akid=2955%2E734936%2EQG0aDW)

Mark

name: Team Schiff
subject: Over $13,000 a day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by ECU Non-federal
body:
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=21923%2E4449941%2EWSKJo_)
---
**$1.2 million** , friend.

That’s how much Republican Steve Garvey outraised our campaign by in the latest FEC report. About $13,000 per _day._

Closing this fundraising gap has become even more urgent as national Republicans commit over **$6 million** to win California House races and Vice President Harris expands the number of states Democrats are contesting.

**Each newly competitive state or district puts a strain on our limited resources for Adam to help when we’ve been outraised by $1.2 million with under 80 days to go.**

[**Friend, that’s why we need to generate at least 2,500 grassroots donations before midnight to close the fundraising gap with Adam’s Trump-supporting opponent. Can you split a donation of $10 between my campaign and Fight for Reform to help them elect state and local Democrats?**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/49056?t=7&akid=21923%2E4449941%2EWSKJo_) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Fight for Reform and Adam Schiff will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/49057?t=8&akid=21923%2E4449941%2EWSKJo_)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/49058?t=9&akid=21923%2E4449941%2EWSKJo_)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/49059?t=10&akid=21923%2E4449941%2EWSKJo_)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/49060?t=11&akid=21923%2E4449941%2EWSKJo_)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/49056?t=12&akid=21923%2E4449941%2EWSKJo_)
As long as we aren’t outspent, we have the winning message:

Adam is a former Assistant United States Attorney, Intelligence Committee chairman, lead impeachment manager in Donald Trump’s first Senate trial, and a member of the January 6 Committee that investigated him.

He knows how to prosecute the case against the corrupt, authoritarian ex-president and beat the guy pledging to support him for a _third_ time.

Vice President Kamala Harris is a former elected District Attorney, Attorney General, and United States Senator, who cross-examined Trump’s Supreme Court nominees on the Senate Judiciary Committee and brought con men like Trump who held themselves above the law to justice.

She knows how to prosecute the case against Donald Trump too.

With your $10 of support, we’re going to defeat the Trump-Vance Project 2025 agenda and elect Kamala Harris as president with the blue majorities she will need with Adam in the Senate to get things done.
[**Rush a split donation of $10 or any amount between my campaign before midnight to meet our 2,500 grassroots donation goal and Fight for Reform to help them elect state and local Democrats. Adam doesn’t take a dime of corporate PAC money and every contribution helps us do the work it will take to win.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/49056?t=13&akid=21923%2E4449941%2EWSKJo_)
This is an unprecedented moment in the history of American presidential campaigns, and it is a call to action for each and every one of us to do our part and make history.

Thanks for helping Adam and the rest of our team meet the urgency that this historic moment calls for. We couldn’t do it without you.

— Team Schiff
Adam Schiff is only asking for contributions of up to $5,000 from individuals, federal PACs, and other federally permissible sources for End Citizens United-Nonfederal. Adam Schiff is not asking for contributions in excess of that amount or any contributions from corporations, unions, or other federally prohibited sources. Paid for by ECU Non-federal.

Team, I’ve been around the block a few times, so it takes a lot to catch me off guard. But lemme tell ya — I just got off the phone, and **I almost fell out of my chair when I heard the bad news about Jacky Rosen’s Senate race in Nevada.**
**[I’ll break down the nitty-gritty in a second, but if you already understand the stakes of this election, PLEASE split $5 between Jacky’s reelection campaign and Debbie Mucarsel-Powell's campaign ASAP.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91515594/494086453/560213595?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1786-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjU0NTczYzgtMjc2My1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Tf7piL6TbHXQiDpS4pgO2oUYLNVt6F_1OligVj8Ri3c=)**
