**Here’s where we started:****** Political experts from _The Washington Post_ to _CNN_ ranked Jacky Rosen’s seat in Nevada among the most vulnerable in the entire country. MAGA Republicans are only one battleground seat away from taking back control of the Senate, **so they made unseating Jacky a TOP priority.**
**Here’s what happened:** Donald Trump and national Republicans unleashed wave after wave of attacks against Jacky. Trump even singled out Nevada’s Senate race during his RNC speech to ridicule her — and ever since, right-wing billionaires have poured millions of dollars more into Nevada to flip it red.
**Here’s where we are now:** Their attacks are ramping up, and the GOP’s ads are now drowning out Jacky on the airwaves — **just when Democrats need to surge in this MUST-WIN battleground race that the polls say is in a statistical tie.**

name: Breaking News VA
subject: NEWS: Glenn Youngkin tapping donor network for MAGA Senate candidate Hung Cao
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024]
🚨VA Governor Glenn Youngkin hasn’t just endorsed Tim Kaine’s MAGA opponent, Hung Cao — he’s now fundraising for him, too .
That’s right: Youngkin is officially tapping into the deep-pocketed donor network that got him elected in 2021 in service of Cao’s fight to unseat Tim Kaine.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024]
SUPPORT TIM KAINE >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024]
And it’s not just big-dollar donors that Youngkin is courting — he’s backing Cao on all fronts. In a fundraising email to Cao's supporters, here's what Youngkin had to say about Virginia’s role this year:
“Virginia is in play in 2024 and will play a pivotal role in taking back the White House, taking back the Senate, and growing our majority in the House of Representatives.”
And he thinks they can get it done:
“The polls are moving in our favor, and Hung has a real chance to win.”
Glenn Youngkin, Donald Trump, JD Vance, and Hung Cao are ALL IN on defeating Tim Kaine and flipping Virginia.
And here’s the thing: Trump may not know how to win in Virginia. He lost here in 2016 and 2020. But Glenn Youngkin does.
With Youngkin backing Cao and the Trump-Vance ticket — and throwing the full force of his political power behind their efforts — we need all hands on deck to keep Virginia blue, re-elect Tim Kaine, and deliver our electoral votes for Kamala Harris.
Please rush a donation of $20, $50, or ANY amount to Tim’s campaign today, ahead of our August fundraising deadline. Hitting our fundraising goals can be the difference between building a winning program and falling short. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $20 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024?express_lane=true&amount=20]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024?express_lane=true&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024?express_lane=true&amount=100]
OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024]
Thanks for stepping up.
-Team Kaine for VA
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024]
Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #272
Williamsburg, VA 23185

name: Josh
subject: It’s been a slow month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Peter, August is historically the slowest month for fundraising.

People are traveling and spending time outside in the sun, but just because we’re enjoying the summer doesn’t mean we can afford to fall behind during such an important time in this election.

My end-of-month deadline is coming up, and we can’t risk being outraised by our opponent again.

**[I’m not going to sugarcoat it, if we’re going to hold onto this seat, we can’t afford to miss this one, folks.](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=4582713080274314a8b4195ea3991950&_e=NnZ6rUQo-qTZ7lDIq_sM9_veq9_n97y4ehLd2OBfglBMxegHbkIt93dYoBc6eHdmXGBBV0IAVLfihlTN95lD7xgqDyYSf9aE7FRopIMTeTbeH9f4XYOYfFqOQi0hPb4sTKY2Bw2KeY1eAeaOEA7E_rVVnb1gXhS6FOBqxBHp5_rboVPb5_p-Fdq8YZpqM02U3iFMDMg0vql-b5QdDJbNYERzGSJQwmVrMIV2RGgXrZNA1RGoqtzGPJEQAaEyssgOy1I7kOoSJJkdpafcjmGt95Mvvu1_w957f7Ob0AXXq1ZjYJHhEJfBGAUTSpd1fymcRpf5mT8daLOQ8sRtucNQhVma1rJusX6G_D21mCVIe14%3D)**

The DNC showed just how much strength we have behind this movement. Now, it’s up to us to build on it. | | |

And we’re living through a moment in our country’s history that requires us to fight for our values, especially in the face of Trump’s lies, division, and hatred. [**That work starts now. Not tomorrow, next week, or next month, but right now. Will you do your part and chip in $25 to power our campaign over the next 72 days? Winning this race will be our toughest challenge yet, but we’re not afraid of Donald Trump.
At the RNC, Trump’s hateful rhetoric was laid out for all to see.
**_Meanwhile, at the DNC, delegates from all 50 states danced and celebrated while casting their votes to elect Kamala Harris._**
At the RNC, Republicans embraced January 6th rioters and applauded Trump -- the convicted felon.
**_Meanwhile, at the DNC, Kamala Harris, Tim Walz, and Democrats from across the country embraced freedom._**
At the RNC, the MAGA Right wholeheartedly embraced their extreme and dangerous Project 2025 agenda and promised to implement it if they win in November.
**_Meanwhile, at the DNC, the Bidens, the Obamas, the Clintons, labor leaders, and reproductive rights advocates all came together to share a forward-focused vision for America._**
The future we’re fighting for is one where every American has the chance to not just get by, but get ahead. However, it won’t be ours unless we work for it. **_We have to do something._**
[**Time is running out to make our case to the American people, and it’s going to take each and every one of us doing our part to win. If you’re with Kamala, Tim, and millions of other Americans, make a donation of $25 today.**](https://click.contact.kamalaharris.com/ss/c/u001.NV3IV8RXB3BPG-RgoenRivizIuY7_hyRTlr0Ev1A4jyRess_Z46ivJQExIi6hcFAcJnANik16-vDfNuYKO7yv7zUrl2iH2co_MVaGhsauw3TIhXmurr6-WDM5ElyqFZvfT2slABihMa57Swv_Z31tJwzZSLAhRvDcuJ8ivd4XPza3E3WmkygrTLbwqctl3bUVkaFoyQ45MaZ6-tatIZhm6icVIB6ZaS8WDfsCYyMU16CdDvqGM1iLoNbdNmQ-MEI0atLFRaR2abdxEn6KnpnBokOcFsCvgJOwtrdSKw4Ar6T_aIbbpZpYkoOocaQnCwPgXTQRqlFOJ5iy4PFjXoZfdm44qyOM-C38ShHE8-QxwPUHkw6hEOgjRptItIW56S4jX7tnRqzNDKao6e4Xw1Qk5rx6TmdlVf_whFsaeQj0BOtShmweJ2y_iXO6TaPN3enM5iiHgakIqDJqXVnggC7__6ABYJP_8MojG-185XVaARTd1Yi3eMkFCaNoNIY7BYXVW-JtJlYyHbZVE_JiZTt4SRSd1ufnOnH-ZWsw5u_uSM-MvDrmoRM2O9kX5ASjvLq/497/rFmyQbAtRXmsa0Kw-faV7Q/h7/h001.-xigtLYyNG45v_hgpcd9E7PsQeD0bIBls4b0OgkIRC4)

clean_body: The DNC showed just how much strength we have behind this movement. Now, it’s up to us to build on it. | | | Peter, This much was clear from the Democratic National Convention: We are a campaign of progress. Of faith and freedom. Of joy. And we’re living through a moment in our country’s history that requires us to fight for our values, especially in the face of Trump’s lies, division, and hatred. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Winning this race will be our toughest challenge yet, but we’re not afraid of Donald Trump. At the RNC, Trump’s hateful rhetoric was laid out for all to see. Meanwhile, at the DNC, delegates from all 50 states danced and celebrated while casting their votes to elect Kamala Harris. At the RNC, Republicans embraced January 6th rioters and applauded Trump -- the convicted felon. Meanwhile, at the DNC, Kamala Harris, Tim Walz, and Democrats from across the country embraced freedom. At the RNC, the MAGA Right wholeheartedly embraced their extreme and dangerous Project 2025 agenda and promised to implement it if they win in November. Meanwhile, at the DNC, the Bidens, the Obamas, the Clintons, labor leaders, and reproductive rights advocates all came together to share a forward-focused vision for America. The future we’re fighting for is one where every American has the chance to not just get by, but get ahead. However, it won’t be ours unless we work for it. We have to do something. Thanks for pitching in, Peter. We’re grateful to have you on this team. Thanks, Team Harris-Walz | | | ---|---|---

Peter, can I introduce myself? My name is Mary Peltola, and I represent the reddest district held by a Democrat in Congress: Alaska! In 2022, I ran in the special election against Sarah Palin. Almost no one thought I had any chance at winning in a red state, and the pundits counted me out. But I proved the naysayers wrong, defeated Sarah Palin, and became the first Alaska Native to ever serve in Congress! My shocking victory made national news in 2022, but now, Alaska’s race is getting less attention from the media... _**But here’s the catch: Even though I might be in the news less, my reelection campaign is going to be even tougher than it was in 2022.**_ Mike Johnson’s super PAC and the NRCC are already spending over $7 million in attack ads alone to unseat me... | Friends,

We’re getting ready for a big week, and I want you to join us!

It was an honor to attend last week’s convention, and I couldn’t be more proud and excited about the Democratic ticket in Maryland. We need to do everything we can to make sure Vice President Harris, Governor Walz, Angela Alsobrooks, and our board of education candidates make it across the finish line in November.

**We can keep the momentum going by joining this Tuesday night’s Maryland Women Answer the Call for Kamala virtual event!** I hope you’ll join me and other women across Maryland to help kick the general election into high gear. [**_You can RSVP to attend at this link._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91517795/494094249/-1589630882?fbclid=IwY2xjawE4RsBleHRuA2FlbQIxMAABHRJMOo7sys-R79yZ_ZeFwfZ6EDrNYNUufOaxRHGBRaMVL5ch7FRMsrlMeA_aem_0tPzvsPceFKBSEDvALZHRA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2M5NjYwMS0zMTYzLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5oeDXaiADQevGKHGlIIHwYnefEWgMGbNEdbm5fxgAAs=&emci=e88b96a1-2c63-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&emdi=37c96601-3163-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&ceid=30237190#/registration)

This event is a great opportunity to connect with women across Maryland, but we’ve got work to do right here in the 3rd District, too. That’s why I'm excited to help open coordinated campaign offices in Glen Burnie and Columbia.

clean_body: It was an honor to attend last week’s convention, and I couldn’t be more proud and excited about the Democratic ticket in Maryland. | = | Friends, We’re getting ready for a big week, and I want you to join us! It was an honor to attend last week’s convention, and I couldn’t be more proud and excited about the Democratic ticket in Maryland. We need to do everything we can to make sure Vice President Harris, Governor Walz, Angela Alsobrooks, and our board of education candidates make it across the finish line in November. We can keep the momentum going by joining this Tuesday night’s Maryland Women Answer the Call for Kamala virtual event! I hope you’ll join me and other women across Maryland to help kick the general election into high gear. This event is a great opportunity to connect with women across Maryland, but we’ve got work to do right here in the 3rd District, too. That’s why I'm excited to help open coordinated campaign offices in Glen Burnie and Columbia. to join us Tuesday in Glen Burnie at 5:30 OR you can join us in We can't do this without you! – Sarah Elfreth * | | = Paid for by Elfreth for Maryland Elfreth for Maryland PO Box 5935 Annapolis, MD 21403 United States

name: Senator Josh Hawley
subject: Our Lord has his arms around President Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
By the Grace of God!| | | Friend, on July 13th, God was watching over President Trump.

He is meant for this moment in history, and I thank President Trump for fighting for us every time I see him.

He has been put through impeachments, sham trials, a raid of his home, and an attempt on his life.

While he continues to get attacked and scrutinized by the far Left, I’m proud to stand with him and be a Trump supporter.

It’s Josh Hawley, and I'm praying for President Trump.

**[Will you join me in this prayer?](http://links.gopwinning.org/u/click?_t=ea36c899de41479ca8c7218c6a20a10b&_m=f020c7d08a2e4f2da075979638587f05&_e=nL0Oj69cF3IME6cwp-PAWVw1BE2EUpwqaUKzvdmq98cD-YBh7NXqdK1ZJEO8oBqgjcPv8IiwfcHOkwfWTm2yitmgAKRcrDNbDCN5VlE_YAWp2v3YPRLA_Xhtpm9t4QwtR8oWMQCANBt6HXn6gpl6QB0_Hr7xq5vcsEsU0VRfFPANCHgzynd1qPORh05036umIt5w716uYbwDDYjwh0mAzqmtn_rBYnSSvsVfP8vOtAHcKXt4PL1noiWBmqXdZnelYvuw-KWVlFrmN2zoPKKyyAPVok122qqyGuThwbNd2C4loo12PqjUA1rXnZQTtRP6q-sjssKI9wVDNF4t_9I0ikeuZv-QxpWJuZhkDxPmFhAk8zs66oBpwy153eRPCTD-FYQvuo5l5wfSbUi8cIj-hA%3D%3D)**

subject: One $3 contribution at a time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
Here’s what happens when you donate to the Democratic National Committee...
---
Derek, when you make a donation to the Democratic National Committee, you’re contributing to the organization best positioned to make a difference in the races you care about most. So that’s what we’re asking you to do today: to make a $3 contribution. $3 to help defeat Trump in November and elect Kamala Harris and Tim Walz. $3 to elect a Democratic House and Senate. $3 to help elect Democrats at _all_ levels of government. You may not know that a _lot_ of the Democratic Party’s fundraising comes from $3 contributions -- often in response to messages just like this one. And while $3 by itself may not seem like it will have a major impact, when it’s combined with thousands of $3 contributions from Democrats all over the country, it all adds up. That’s why we’re asking: [**Can Democrats everywhere count on you to make a $3 contribution directly to the Democratic National Committee today? We'll put your donation to work electing Kamala Harris and Tim Walz, winning congressional majorities, and more.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-elect-dems-2024?amount=3&refcode=em_20240825_1014_fr&refcode2=1014_22930333_LR3XNx&akid=1014%2E22930333%2ELR3XNx) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-elect-dems-2024?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20240825_1014_fr&refcode2=1014_22930333_LR3XNx&akid=1014%2E22930333%2ELR3XNx)**

subject: Defeating Trump and his pet chameleon >>>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www
body:
Peter – while the road ahead is uncertain, our hope remains strong. Jamie Raskin didn’t hold back when he declared:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dr-2408?refcode=DR_EM_FR_90DO_240825_2_3&amount=15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dr-2408?refcode=DR_EM_FR_90DO_240825_2_3&amount=15]
Yes, we will DEFEAT them—but only if we come together, Peter. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dr-2408?refcode=DR_EM_FR_90DO_240825_2_3&amount=15]

Trump and Vance think they can take back power, but we know the strength of our grassroots team. When Democrats unite, we’re unstoppable.

But to win this fight, we need everyone on board. That’s why we’re asking you to join us today. Will you chip in $15 to help us power this movement to DEFEAT Donald Trump and JD Vance? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dr-2408?refcode=DR_EM_FR_90DO_240825_2_3&amount=15]
DONATE NOW » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dr-2408?refcode=DR_EM_FR_90DO_240825_2_3&amount=15]

Peter, here’s what’s at stake if we don’t act:
Our Democracy: Trump is a threat to our democratic values—attacking voting rights, undermining free and fair elections, and spreading dangerous lies that fuel violence.
Abortion Rights: JD Vance has openly supported banning abortion nationwide, threatening the health, safety, and freedom of women across the country.
Health Care: Trump and Vance are determined to dismantle the Affordable Care Act, leaving millions of Americans without critical health coverage.
Civil Rights: They will continue to push harmful policies that discriminate against marginalized communities, from LGBTQ+ rights to racial equality.
The Supreme Court: Trump has already stacked the courts with far-right judges. With Vance by his side, they’ll further erode the impartiality of our judiciary and endanger our constitutional rights.
But we have a choice. We can stand together, stronger than ever, and send a clear message: Trump and Vance will not win. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dr-2408?refcode=DR_EM_FR_90DO_240825_2_3&amount=15]
So please, will you rush anything you can right now before midnight tonight to SUPPORT Democrats and PROTECT our country from 4 years of Trump and Vance rule? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dr-2408?refcode=DR_EM_FR_90DO_240825_2_3&amount=15]

name: Jill Stein for President
subject: Notice something similar?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jill Stein for President 2024
body:
Two candidates, one warmongering voice

| | | [ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fight_the_uniparty&n=1)
---
Peter, Last month, Donald Trump accepted the Republican Party’s nomination with off-the-chart jingoism, promising to continue the U.S. policy of full spectrum dominance around the world with no path towards diplomacy and peace. Last week, Kamala Harris accepted the Democratic Party’s nomination with...off-the-chart jingoism, promising to continue the U.S. policy of full spectrum dominance with no path towards diplomacy and peace. Watch this video demonstrating that for all their posturing and jabs at each other, they sound remarkably similar:
---
| [](https://www.jillstein2024.com/uniparty?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fight_the_uniparty&n=2 "WATCH THE VIDEO: FIGHT THE UNIPARTY") [WATCH THE VIDEO: FIGHT THE UNIPARTY](https://www.jillstein2024.com/uniparty?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fight_the_uniparty&n=2)
---
Why did their acceptance speeches sound so similar? Because they’re both funded by the same billionaire donor class of war profiteers and Wall Street predators, and they work hand-in-hand in advancing their interests of austerity at home with endless war and genocide abroad. Jill and Butch are the only choice for voters around the nation who are committed to ending all aid to Israel on day one of their administration to make them stop the genocide and end their occupation of the Palestinian people. Jill and Butch don’t take money from the military industrial complex to push through their agenda – they’re funded by the people and they’re fighting for the people! [**_Can you donate today to make sure that our powerful message of people, planet and peace reaches voters around the nation?_**](https://www.jillstein2024.com/uniparty?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fight_the_uniparty&n=3)
---
| [](https://www.jillstein2024.com/uniparty?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fight_the_uniparty&n=4 "DONATE NOW") [DONATE NOW](https://www.jillstein2024.com/uniparty?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fight_the_uniparty&n=4)
---
We can’t afford four more years of two corrupt parties who speak in one warmongering voice. We need the anti-genocide, pro-worker, pro-planet ticket of Stein/Ware to bring lasting peace. As always, thank you for all you do to support Jill and Butch’s empowering campaign. In solidarity and gratitude, Team Stein/Ware 2024

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Trump’s press conference, summarized
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Democrat Coalition Action Fund
body:
| Friend, allow me to summarize in a few words, from Donald Trump’s perspective, the press conference he recently held at Mar-a-Lago. _Kamala Harris’s campaign rallies are small. Mine are big._

_If the 2020 election were not stolen from me, no bad things would have happened. Only good things would have happened._

_With Democrats our economy is terrible. With me as president our economy was amazing._ **If that sounds insane, that’s because it is. Folks, here is the truth:**

Kamala Harris is drawing thousands of people to her campaign rallies. Trump’s campaign schedule is nonexistent.

During Trump’s presidency, the economy went down, crime went up, and he mismanaged a once-in-a-century global pandemic. Joe Biden and Kamala Harris are leading an economic comeback.

Trump was the first president since Herbert Hoover to**lose jobs. The Biden-Harris Administration has created 15 million.**

If Trump’s press conference showed us one thing, it’s that Democrats are focused on the future, and Trump’s MAGA movement is trying to take us back in time.

[**We have to win up and down the ballot in California to defend the Senate, retake the House, and defeat Trump. Look, I really need your immediate support to respond to Trump’s firehose of disinformation at Mar-a-Lago. Rush a split $10 donation between New Dems and my campaign before midnight. »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91518795/494097886/893662107?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=NDCAF_20240825_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWFlNzEyMC0zODYzLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=idLPl6qIqPSk_dAyVIgNEN3BcsfbLyI9uPwada13tNk=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Schiff and New Dems will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91518796/494097887/893662107?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&refcode=NDCAF_20240825_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWFlNzEyMC0zODYzLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=idLPl6qIqPSk_dAyVIgNEN3BcsfbLyI9uPwada13tNk=)

clean_body: | Friend, allow me to summarize in a few words, from Donald Trump’s perspective, the press conference he recently held at Mar-a-Lago. Kamala Harris’s campaign rallies are small. Mine are big. If the 2020 election were not stolen from me, no bad things would have happened. Only good things would have happened. With Democrats our economy is terrible. With me as president our economy was amazing. If that sounds insane, that’s because it is. Folks, here is the truth: Kamala Harris is drawing thousands of people to her campaign rallies. Trump’s campaign schedule is nonexistent. During Trump’s presidency, the economy went down, crime went up, and he mismanaged a once-in-a-century global pandemic. Joe Biden and Kamala Harris are leading an economic comeback. Trump was the first president since Herbert Hoover tolose jobs. The Biden-Harris Administration has created 15 million. body:
Que Pasa con Al Hurricane? | | | | | [](https://nellaforsenate.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ac79b36261163c3706eb25b8&id=bc17b5530d&e=780129cd82)
---
|
# 📰 _NELLA NEWS_ 📰
_**August 25, 2024**_
---
|
## Follow Nella on Social Media
---
| | | | | [](https://nellaforsenate.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ac79b36261163c3706eb25b8&id=ab1ebffedd&e=780129cd82)
---
[](https://nellaforsenate.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ac79b36261163c3706eb25b8&id=c9caebb01f&e=780129cd82)
---
[](https://nellaforsenate.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ac79b36261163c3706eb25b8&id=45dad5b8f7&e=780129cd82)
---
| | | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
|
---
| **Estamos con Nella** Join special guest Al Hurricane Jr. on Thursday, August 29 at 5:30pm at Tomasita’s in Albuquerque to kick off our Estamos con Nella Coalition. [You can RSVP here.](https://nellaforsenate.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ac79b36261163c3706eb25b8&id=2283f7e945&e=780129cd82)
---
[](https://nellaforsenate.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ac79b36261163c3706eb25b8&id=9cc147bc4b&e=780129cd82)
| **Martin Heinrich is dangerous:** Martin Heinrich recently popped up near the US-Mexico border for a quick photo-op. But he spent years voting against security and safety, only to start acting like he cares weeks before an election because he’s losing to someone who does care. Heinrich has actively made our border crisis worse, with a dangerous voting record of opening our border and unleashing cartels and lethal drugs from China into our state.
---
[](https://nellaforsenate.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ac79b36261163c3706eb25b8&id=b92c2a32d2&e=780129cd82)
| To read more about Heinrich’s voting record on border security, drugs, and cartels, click [here](https://nellaforsenate.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ac79b36261163c3706eb25b8&id=bd6972cc6e&e=780129cd82).
**New Mexico Sheriffs: Yeah, right!** Several of New Mexico’s top law enforcement officials from around the state couldn’t believe what they were hearing from the MIA Heinrich. [Read what they had to say. ](https://nellaforsenate.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ac79b36261163c3706eb25b8&id=4eac9767d0&e=780129cd82)
---
| | | | | | | | | |
---
| | **Valencia County Sheriff
Denise Vigil:**_“We’ve seen an influx of illegal immigrants transported to and through Valencia County, and our families have felt the devastating impact of Fentanyl._
_“_[ _Martin Heinrich_](https://nellaforsenate.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ac79b36261163c3706eb25b8&id=f643b4f268&e=780129cd82) _hasn’t done nearly enough to help us address these issues and it’s very disappointing._
_“I’ve been sheriff for six years, and I’ve never seen these problems as bad as they are now._
_“Nella Domenici is tough as nails and wants to address our border and fentanyl issues.****_
_**I trust Nella Domenici.”**_
---
| **Albuquerque Cops Endorse Nella** The Albuquerque Police Officers Association (APOA), representing more than 800 police officers from the Albuquerque Police Department and the Aviation Police, [has endorsed Nella Domenici over her opponent](https://nellaforsenate.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ac79b36261163c3706eb25b8&id=712522b165&e=780129cd82), an incumbent senator with a record of complete failure.
---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://nellaforsenate.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ac79b36261163c3706eb25b8&id=29f9bce2dd&e=780129cd82)
---
| | Heinrich has made New Mexico’s crime problem a crisis with his misplaced priorities, including following Biden’s and Harris' open border policies enabling dangerous criminals, cartels, terrorists, and a massive flow of deadly fentanyl throughout New Mexico and the United States.
---
| **Experiencing Ground Zero** Last week Nella hit the streets in Albuquerque’s International District with police officers to learn first-hand about crime in New Mexico.
Nella learned that fentanyl pills cost less than 30 cents apiece and are extremely easy to obtain. She also spoke to a neighbor who is sick of the crime that is so pervasive in her neighborhood. Her backyard is littered with discarded tin foil from fentanyl users, and stolen purses stripped of credit cards, cash, and any other valuable belongings.
---
[](https://nellaforsenate.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ac79b36261163c3706eb25b8&id=b48790f082&e=780129cd82)
| “I saw block after block of people openly smoking Fentanyl from foil wrappers. They wander the streets like zombies. They sleep in alleys only to wake and repeat their addictive behavior until they overdose and die.” said Nella. "Many are malnourished and dehydrated with sores on their skin. They prostitute themselves, and commit crimes, some violent, to support their addiction. The night belongs to the addicts and the criminals because everyone else is afraid to leave their homes."
---
| | | | | | | | | | | “Our law enforcement officers place themselves on the front-line. I deeply appreciate the work they do, and it’s time they had a United States Senator who will fight for them and get them the federal support they need to reduce crime.”
---
| [](https://nellaforsenate.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ac79b36261163c3706eb25b8&id=94a9348294&e=780129cd82)
---
|
---
| **Indian Market:** Indian Market last weekend was a magnificent display of Indigenous Native American art— weavings, pottery, jewelry and so much more.
---
| Nella had the privilege of visiting with former Senator Ben Nighthorse Campbell who served in the U.S. with her Dad for many years. He was an Olympic champion in Judo. He said he recently gave up riding his motorcycle and still is up at 4:30 am to make his beautiful, museum-quality jewelry.
---
| **Sandoval County Fun** Sunday saw Nella and top campaign dog Paco head up to Jemez for a meeting of the Jemez Mountain Electrical Co-op, then to Rio Rancho for Sunday Funday at Haynes Park.
---
|
# _🐾 Paco’s Piece 🐾_
---
| | | | | | | | | | | **Top Dog Dancer** Saturday was one of those “dog days of August” on the campaign trail with great events: the Jemez Mountain Rural Electric Co-Op picnic and annual meeting had Breakfast burritos!! Music!! Lots of smells to sniff!!! I collected a belly rub from everyone and shook a few hands—People shook my paw whenever I offered it.
[Carlos and Rita](https://nellaforsenate.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ac79b36261163c3706eb25b8&id=fa4e95a160&e=780129cd82) were there. What great humans. People were dancing but this Campaign Top Dog—me— is a terrible dancer. Why you might be asking? Because I have two left feet!
---
|
---

Several of New Mexico’s top law enforcement officials from around the state couldn’t believe what they were hearing from the MIA Heinrich. | | | | | | | | | | | | Valencia County Sheriff Denise Vigil:“We’ve seen an influx of illegal immigrants transported to and through Valencia County, and our families have felt the devastating impact of Fentanyl. “ hasn’t done nearly enough to help us address these issues and it’s very disappointing. “I’ve been sheriff for six years, and I’ve never seen these problems as bad as they are now. “Nella Domenici is tough as nails and wants to address our border and fentanyl issues.** I trust Nella Domenici.” | Albuquerque Cops Endorse Nella The Albuquerque Police Officers Association (APOA), representing more than 800 police officers from the Albuquerque Police Department and the Aviation Police, , an incumbent senator with a record of complete failure. | | | | | | | | | | | | Heinrich has made New Mexico’s crime problem a crisis with his misplaced priorities, including following Biden’s and Harris' open border policies enabling dangerous criminals, cartels, terrorists, and a massive flow of deadly fentanyl throughout New Mexico and the United States. | Experiencing Ground Zero Last week Nella hit the streets in Albuquerque’s International District with police officers to learn first-hand about crime in New Mexico. Nella learned that fentanyl pills cost less than 30 cents apiece and are extremely easy to obtain. She also spoke to a neighbor who is sick of the crime that is so pervasive in her neighborhood. Her backyard is littered with discarded tin foil from fentanyl users, and stolen purses stripped of credit cards, cash, and any other valuable belongings. | “I saw block after block of people openly smoking Fentanyl from foil wrappers. They wander the streets like zombies. They sleep in alleys only to wake and repeat their addictive behavior until they overdose and die.” said Nella. "Many are malnourished and dehydrated with sores on their skin. They prostitute themselves, and commit crimes, some violent, to support their addiction. The night belongs to the addicts and the criminals because everyone else is afraid to leave their homes." | | | | | | | | | | | “Our law enforcement officers place themselves on the front-line. I deeply appreciate the work they do, and it’s time they had a United States Senator who will fight for them and get them the federal support they need to reduce crime.” | | | Indian Market: Indian Market last weekend was a magnificent display of Indigenous Native American art— weavings, pottery, jewelry and so much more. | Nella had the privilege of visiting with former Senator Ben Nighthorse Campbell who served in the U.S. with her Dad for many years. He was an Olympic champion in Judo. He said he recently gave up riding his motorcycle and still is up at 4:30 am to make his beautiful, museum-quality jewelry. | Sandoval County Fun Sunday saw Nella and top campaign dog Paco head up to Jemez for a meeting of the Jemez Mountain Electrical Co-op, then to Rio Rancho for Sunday Funday at Haynes Park. | 🐾 Paco’s Piece 🐾 | | | | | | | | | | | Top Dog Dancer Saturday was one of those “dog days of August” on the campaign trail with great events: the Jemez Mountain Rural Electric Co-Op picnic and annual meeting had Breakfast burritos!! Music!! Lots of smells to sniff!!! I collected a belly rub from everyone and shook a few hands—People shook my paw whenever I offered it. were there. What great humans. People were dancing but this Campaign Top Dog—me— is a terrible dancer. Why you might be asking? Because I have two left feet! | | Help us spread the word about Nella’s Campaign. Forward this e-mail to friends and family! | | Join the conversation online: | | | | | | [Paid for by Nella for Senate.]() | Copyright (C) 2024 NELLA FOR SENATE All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: P.O. BOX 90574 | ALBUQUERQUE, NM 87199 | | | | | | | | | Nella for Senate PO Box 92918 Albuquerque, NM 87199-2918 USA or |

name: Ohio Dems
subject: The race is on.

body:
We’re in the final stretch.
|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91518828/494098062/-1215787332?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_Horserace_240825_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGY0YWJmMS0zOTYzLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ypkq7jhmAR48KENTK0MJlZG0uIgkiH4g3tfGl10CcwU=) Team,

This election is turning into a real horse race. We’re neck-and-neck with Republicans, and every contribution could push us over the finish line.

[**_This is one race we cannot afford to lose. Will you pitch in $5 or more right now?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91518829/494098063/-1215787332?amount=5&refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_Horserace_240825_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGY0YWJmMS0zOTYzLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ypkq7jhmAR48KENTK0MJlZG0uIgkiH4g3tfGl10CcwU=)

In Ohio, the stakes couldn’t be higher. The GOP is pouring millions into the state, trying to flip key seats like Sherrod Brown’s so they can take control of the Senate. They’ve got deep pockets and a history of playing dirty – but we’ve got something they don’t: a grassroots movement of supporters like you who are ready to fight for the future of Ohio and our country.

If we want to hold onto the Senate and flip the House, we have to give it everything we've got. That means fighting harder and ensuring every Ohio voter can cast their ballot this November.

We’re in the final lap, and we can’t afford to fall behind. But we’re confident that with your support, we can cross the finish line first.

[**_Now is the time to dig deep. Will you donate anything you can to help us sprint past the GOP and win this race?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91518830/494098064/-1215787332?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_Horserace_240825_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGY0YWJmMS0zOTYzLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ypkq7jhmAR48KENTK0MJlZG0uIgkiH4g3tfGl10CcwU=)

Thank you,

Ohio Dems
| **Control of the House and Senate runs right through Ohio this year. name: Team Baldwin
subject: It might seem corny
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1001&akid=3461%2E35263%2E1koIUB ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

Peter — We love
spotting our Tammy Baldwin yard signs across Wisconsin, even among our
spotted livestock friends! (Heck, they’re so popular, Wisconsin even named
a beer after them...)

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-aug24.RD8FO-&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240825_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=3461%2E35263%2E1koIUB ]Tammy Baldwin yard sign in front of cows in Wisconsin

Even though it might seem corny, our yard signs can make a difference.
They show how folks from all over the state are with Tammy in the fight to
keep Wisconsin and our Senate majority blue in this critical election.

Up against a self-funding megamillionaire, we’re building a team of
grassroots supporters from River Falls to Oak Creek who are ready to
reelect Tammy — and blanketing Wisconsin with yard signs to show our
support is a key part of our strategy.

But while that visibility is priceless, getting yard signs printed and
distributed across all 72 counties comes with a pretty steep price, so
we’re hoping you can help us out.

name: Tristan Rader
subject: Tristan Rader and Sherrod Brown Yard Signs
body:
Yard signs are in and I have Sherrod Brown signs as well! Let us know and we can place them in your yard this week! | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/tristanrader/tristan-rader-and-sherrod-brown-yard-signs?e=869bcf0641)
---
| | | [ ](https://tristanrader.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe296f262404fb3f98dc9e04f&id=8c713e2040&e=869bcf0641)
---
| | |
# It's Yard Sign Time!! Free Tristan Rader + Sherrod Brown Signs!
Dear Neighbor, By popular demand, people have been asking me where to get Sherrod Brown signs, so I thought we should make this easy. Now, you can show your support for both me and Sherrod by requesting your yard signs, and our great volunteers and I will personally deliver them to your yard! **Here’s how it works:**
1. Fill out the [form](https://tristanrader.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe296f262404fb3f98dc9e04f&id=e505b77690&e=869bcf0641) to get your **Tristan Rader for State Rep sign**.
2. If you’d also like a **Sherrod Brown sign** , just check the box at the bottom of the form.

Already have a Tristan Rader sign? No problem! If you’d still like a Sherrod Brown sign, just complete the form and check the box – we’ll deliver it to your yard. **[Get Your Free Yard Signs Here](https://tristanrader.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe296f262404fb3f98dc9e04f&id=6119aea0b8&e=869bcf0641)** Your support makes a difference. Thank you for standing with us! Best regards,

_**Tristan Rader**_

**_PS -_ Donations help offset the cost of signs! Anything you can give is most appreciated and welcome! [DONATE HERE](https://tristanrader.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe296f262404fb3f98dc9e04f&id=d1b3c954e4&e=869bcf0641)**
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://tristanrader.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe296f262404fb3f98dc9e04f&id=38fe26cb97&e=869bcf0641)
---

| | [](https://tristanrader.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe296f262404fb3f98dc9e04f&id=db4cee307b&e=869bcf0641)
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2024 Tristan Rader for Ohio, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this e-mail because you shared your address at some point, online or on a sign-up sheet.

**Our mailing address is:**
Tristan Rader for OhioFriends of Tristan Rader Committee14837 Detroit Ave. #141Lakewood, OH 44107
[Add us to your address book](https://tristanrader.us15.list-manage.com/vcard?u=fe296f262404fb3f98dc9e04f&id=202c64d24f)

You can [update your preferences](https://tristanrader.us15.list-manage.com/profile?u=fe296f262404fb3f98dc9e04f&id=202c64d24f&e=869bcf0641&c=d290effca5) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://tristanrader.us15.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=fe296f262404fb3f98dc9e04f&id=202c64d24f&t=b&e=869bcf0641&c=d290effca5).

Anything you can give is most appreciated and welcome! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2024 Tristan Rader for Ohio, All rights reserved.

Like so many of you, I grew up with parents who worked hard in pursuit of the promise of America.
We were taught to see a world beyond just ourselves. To be conscious and compassionate about the struggles of all people. We were raised to believe public service is a noble cause and the fight for justice is everyone’s responsibility.
**In fact, my mother used to say, "Don't sit around and complain about things -- do something.” She was saying,_you have to get up and fight_. _And that is exactly what we are going to do for these next 72 days._**
Our campaign is a fight for the future. And it is a fight for our freedom.
The freedom to vote;
The freedom to live safe from gun violence;
The freedom to love who you love openly and with pride;
And the freedom for a woman to make decisions about her own body.
**Because we believe in the possibility of what our country can look like when we bring people together, not when we tear each other down. That is our America. That is the America we believe in.**
****
[**I could not be more proud to be the official Democratic Presidential nominee, and I am counting on you, one of our dedicated supporters, to help me and Tim win in November.**](https://click.contact.kamalaharris.com/ss/c/u001.NV3IV8RXB3BPG-RgoenRivizIuY7_hyRTlr0Ev1A4jyRess_Z46ivJQExIi6hcFAcJnANik16-vDfNuYKO7yv7zUrl2iH2co_MVaGhsauw2gbwcijYWG_zwDE0Sv7Qq1ujpCoyr4FrASUys6dJHV9-sWlzZaTCkJnEH7nIZuTcLkuU0wuOEdiCCy17qsNzF4Vr2RiCdUogMv6RX8sWZVPh-Yy2HUX8_gv2KPoodc5WSql5Zpqv_2wHUHZgX84nTOoiWhhwNFceX-1d80iYBw2R6Sqd6G9mNM-avOpbi9RaM2MA9f9QWkatqKjzdNs4eKEXLdcy_yPwkiCk0kYPB_LPmSFRlLaRFUoekTnwlRH9D8lV9fFSiaUCsjy7dxoQLzt-64aDv9HxrSmTeS2cMXo3TZhW1z9f09YNq0Rt6xBaO6eJxasO5dM5D_JkvHQwCbrNBHPnFREuZ2bMlLfQDGtfQBuEFVI_Rn2Lm52vqID36Xz6NXrKMIQjgJ2hc1IqfV_vYUMICDytYrWJB0MbJyEWkYVd4mlKwpdvIe8Qwug_k/497/SOEkyRisROWquYD_ywcsYw/h8/h001.aAkb_sz3AUUsvPgwFqqkf8qLo7mwpOULgsRCcI2jAU0)
It is going to take millions of individuals acting together to preserve the promise of America. So every action you take -- whether it is donating for the first time, signing up to volunteer, or spreading our campaign’s message to your friends and neighbors -- will help ensure that we have the power to defeat Donald Trump and keep our country moving forward.
Thank you, Peter, and take care,
Kamala
Kamala Harris

clean_body: It is the honor of my lifetime to be your nominee and it is up to us to fight for a better future. | | | Peter, a few days ago, I formally accepted the nomination for President of the United States at the 2024 Democratic National Convention. First, I want to say thank you. Thank you for making me your Democratic nominee. Thank you for believing that the promise of America is possible for each and every one of us. Thank you for always standing with Tim and me. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Like so many of you, I grew up with parents who worked hard in pursuit of the promise of America. We were taught to see a world beyond just ourselves. To be conscious and compassionate about the struggles of all people. We were raised to believe public service is a noble cause and the fight for justice is everyone’s responsibility. In fact, my mother used to say, "Don't sit around and complain about things -- do something.” She was saying,you have to get up and fight. And that is exactly what we are going to do for these next 72 days. Our campaign is a fight for the future. And it is a fight for our freedom. The freedom to vote; The freedom to live safe from gun violence; The freedom to love who you love openly and with pride; And the freedom for a woman to make decisions about her own body. Because we believe in the possibility of what our country can look like when we bring people together, not when we tear each other down. That is our America. That is the America we believe in. ** It is going to take millions of individuals acting together to preserve the promise of America. So every action you take -- whether it is donating for the first time, signing up to volunteer, or spreading our campaign’s message to your friends and neighbors -- will help ensure that we have the power to defeat Donald Trump and keep our country moving forward. Thank you, Peter, and take care, Kamala Kamala Harris Vice President of the United States | | | ---|---|---
